papers.title: From Spherical to Gaussian: A Comparative Analysis of Point Cloud Cropping Strategies in Large-Scale 3D Environments
papers.abstract: Large-scale 3D point clouds can consist of billions of points. Even after downsampling, these point clouds are too large for modern 3D neural networks. In order to develop a semantic understanding of the scene, the point clouds are divided into smaller subclouds that can be processed. Typically, this division is done using spherical crops, resulting in a loss of surrounding geometric context. To address this issue, we propose alternative methods that produce subclouds with larger crop sizes while maintaining a similar number of points. Specifically, we compare exponential, Gaussian, and linear cropping methods with the spherical method. We evaluated two 3D deep learning model architectures using multiple indoor and outdoor environment datasets. Our results demonstrate that altering the cropping strategy can enhance model performance, especially for large-scale outdoor scenes, yielding new state-of-the-art results. Code is available at https://github.com/mvg-inatech/point_cloud_cropping

analysis.tldr: 提出高斯等替代球体裁剪策略，提升大规模3D点云语义分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模3D点云包含数十亿点，即使下采样后仍超出现代3D神经网络处理能力，需要分割为子云。传统球体裁剪导致周围几何上下文丢失，影响模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何设计点云裁剪策略，在保持点数相近的同时增大子云尺寸，保留更多几何上下文以提升语义理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 球体裁剪会丢失周围几何上下文，而指数、高斯和线性裁剪方法能产生更大尺寸的子云，从而保留更多上下文信息。
analysis.method: 提出指数、高斯和线性三种裁剪方法，与球体裁剪对比，在多个室内外数据集上评估两种3D深度学习架构。
contributions: 提出多种替代球体裁剪的点云分割策略，包括指数、高斯和线性方法。
实验证明改变裁剪策略可提升模型性能，尤其在大规模室外场景中取得新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在多个室内外数据集上评估两种3D深度学习模型架构，结果显示新裁剪策略提升性能，室外场景达到新SOTA。
limitations: 未讨论裁剪策略对计算效率的影响。
可能仅适用于特定类型的3D网络架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简单但实验充分，对大规模点云处理有实用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出高斯等替代球体裁剪策略，提升大规模3D点云语义分割性能。

papers.title: SignMAE: Segmentation-Driven Self-Supervised Learning for Sign Language Recognition
papers.abstract: Subtle hand differences make sign language recognition challenging, yet many existing methods rely on encoders pretrained on generic action datasets that poorly capture such fine-grained cues. We propose a self-supervised pretraining method for sign language recognition that uses segmentation-based masking to adapt to the presence and motion of key body parts, rather than treating hand poses as static visual tokens. The resulting mask-and-reconstruct objective improves fine-grained sign representation learning. On WLASL, NMFs-CSL, and Slovo, our encoder achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving per-instance and per-class Top-1 accuracy while using fewer input frames and modalities than comparable encoders.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于分割掩码的自监督预训练方法，提升手语识别对细微手部动作的建模能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有手语识别方法依赖通用动作数据集预训练的编码器，难以捕捉手部细微差异，导致识别精度受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自监督预训练方法，使编码器能更好地学习手语中关键身体部位（尤其是手部）的细粒度运动特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用动作预训练编码器对手部细微动作不敏感，而手语识别高度依赖手部姿态和运动。
analysis.method: 提出分割驱动的自监督预训练方法SignMAE，利用分割掩码对关键身体部位（如手部）进行掩码重建，而非将手部视为静态视觉标记。
contributions: 提出基于分割掩码的自监督预训练框架，专门针对手语识别中的细粒度运动特征。
在WLASL、NMFs-CSL和Slovo三个数据集上取得最先进性能，且使用更少的输入帧和模态。
analysis.experiments: 在WLASL、NMFs-CSL和Slovo数据集上评估，与现有编码器对比，SignMAE在每实例和每类Top-1准确率上均达到最优，且输入帧数和模态更少。
limitations: 依赖分割掩码的准确性，可能受分割质量影响。
仅针对手语识别，泛化到其他细粒度动作识别任务需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，在手语识别任务上取得显著提升，但技术细节和泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于分割掩码的自监督预训练方法，提升手语识别对细微手部动作的建模能力。

papers.title: NORA: A Harness-Engineered Autonomous Research Agent for End-to-End Spatial Data Science
papers.abstract: The automation of scientific research workflows has emerged as a transformative frontier in artificial intelligence, yet existing autonomous research agents remain largely domain-agnostic, lacking the specialized reasoning, method selection, and data acquisition capabilities required for rigorous spatial data science. This paper introduces NORA (Night Owl Research Agent), a harness-engineered, multi-agent autonomous research system purpose-built for GIScience and spatial data science. NORA orchestrates the complete research lifecycle through a skills-first architecture comprising 21 domain-specialized workflow skills, 9 specialist sub-agents, and custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. Central to the system's design are two novel domain-specialized skills: a spatial analysis skill unit that encodes decision frameworks for exploratory spatial data analysis, spatial regression, and diagnostics; and a spatial data download skill that supports reproducible acquisition from authoritative geospatial data sources. We formalize the concept of harness engineering for scientific research agents, demonstrating how lifecycle hooks, safety gates, generator-evaluator separation, human-in-the-loop, and state persistence ensure reliable and reproducible autonomous research. We evaluate NORA through case studies by 6 domain specialists and 3 LLM reviewers across seven dimensions (novelty, quality, rigor, etc). Results demonstrate that domain-specialized harness engineering substantially improves the efficiency and quality of research output compared to general-purpose agent configurations.

analysis.tldr: NORA是一个专为空间数据科学设计的端到端自主研究代理，通过领域专用技能和工程化框架提升研究效率与质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自主研究代理缺乏领域专用推理、方法选择和数据获取能力，难以满足空间数据科学的严谨需求。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够自动化空间数据科学研究全生命周期、且保证可靠性和可重复性的自主代理系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用代理配置在空间数据科学任务中效率和质量不足，领域专用工程化框架能显著改善。
analysis.method: 提出NORA系统，采用技能优先架构，包含21个领域专用工作流技能、9个专家子代理和自定义MCP服务器，核心是空间分析技能单元和空间数据下载技能，并通过生命周期钩子、安全门、生成器-评估器分离、人在回路和状态持久化等工程化设计确保可靠性。
contributions: 提出NORA，首个专为空间数据科学设计的端到端自主研究代理。
形式化科学研究代理的工程化框架概念，并展示其有效性。
analysis.experiments: 通过6位领域专家和3位LLM评审员在七个维度（新颖性、质量、严谨性等）上进行案例研究评估。
limitations: 评估基于案例研究，可能缺乏大规模定量基准。
系统依赖特定领域技能，泛化到其他科学领域需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 领域专用自主代理设计有创新性，但实验规模有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NORA是一个专为空间数据科学设计的端到端自主研究代理，通过领域专用技能和工程化框架提升研究效率与质量。

papers.title: Cross-Language Learning within Arabic Script for Low-Resource HTR
papers.abstract: Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) under limited labeled data remains a challenging problem, particularly for Arabic-script languages. Although modern sequence-based recognizers perform well in high-resource settings, their accuracy degrades sharply as training data becomes scarce. Arabic-script languages share a common writing system with substantial character overlap, motivating cross-script training as a strategy to mitigate data scarcity. We performed experiments on Arabic, Urdu, and Persian scripts and achieved improvements over single-script baselines (new SotA especially for low-resource settings). A key finding of our experiments is that cross-script transfer is largely driven by script-level overlap rather than uniform accuracy improvements. Through a statistical character-level analysis we show that gains are structurally concentrated on characters shared across scripts, while language-specific characters exhibit limited or negative transfer. These findings provide insight into transfer dynamics in low-resource script families. Detailed results include: We conduct a controlled line-level study of cross-script joint training for Arabic-script HTR under low-resource regimes (number of samples K \in 100, 500, 1000 labeled lines) on Arabic (KHATT), Urdu (NUST-UHWR), and Persian (PHTD). A CRNN model is trained on the union of multiple related Arabic-script datasets and evaluated on individual target languages. On Persian (PHTD), joint training achieves a Character Error Rate (CER) of 9.99, surpassing previously reported results despite not using the full available training data. On an Urdu dataset (UNHD), joint training reduces CER from 17.20 to 14.45. Code and data splits are released to ensure reproducibility.1

analysis.tldr: 跨脚本训练利用阿拉伯文字系统的字符重叠，显著提升低资源手写文本识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 低资源手写文本识别（HTR）在阿拉伯文字语言中因标注数据稀缺而性能严重下降，现有序列识别器在数据不足时准确率急剧退化。
analysis.problem: 如何利用阿拉伯文字系统内多种语言共享的书写系统和字符重叠，缓解低资源场景下的数据稀疏问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 跨脚本迁移的收益主要源于脚本级别的字符重叠，而非均匀提升；共享字符的识别准确率显著提高，而语言特有字符的迁移效果有限甚至为负。
analysis.method: 采用CRNN模型，在多个相关阿拉伯文字数据集（阿拉伯语、乌尔都语、波斯语）的联合训练，并在目标语言上评估。
contributions: 提出并验证了跨脚本联合训练策略在低资源阿拉伯文字HTR中的有效性，在多个数据集上取得新SOTA。
通过字符级统计分析揭示了跨脚本迁移的机制：收益集中在共享字符上，语言特有字符迁移有限。
analysis.experiments: 在阿拉伯语（KHATT）、乌尔都语（NUST-UHWR、UNHD）和波斯语（PHTD）数据集上进行低资源设置（100、500、1000行标注）的线级实验，报告了字符错误率（CER）。
limitations: 仅针对阿拉伯文字系统，对其他文字系统的泛化性未知。
未探索更复杂的模型架构或预训练策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，实验扎实，但创新性有限，适合关注低资源OCR的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 跨脚本训练利用阿拉伯文字系统的字符重叠，显著提升低资源手写文本识别性能。

papers.title: Model Spec Midtraining: Improving How Alignment Training Generalizes
papers.abstract: Some frontier AI developers aim to align language models to a Model Spec or Constitution that describes the intended model behavior. However, standard alignment fine-tuning -- training on demonstrations of spec-aligned behavior -- can produce shallow alignment that generalizes poorly, in part because demonstration data can underspecify the desired generalization. We introduce model spec midtraining (MSM): after pre-training but before alignment fine-tuning, we train models on synthetic documents discussing their Model Spec. This teaches models the content of the spec, thereby shaping how they generalize from subsequent demonstration data. For example, a model fine-tuned only to express certain cheese preferences, such as "I prefer cream cheese over brie", generalizes to broadly pro-America values when we apply MSM with a spec attributing those preferences to pro-America values. Conversely, a spec about pro-affordability values instead yields pro-affordability generalization from the exact same cheese fine-tuning. MSM can also shape complex safety-relevant propensities: applying MSM with a spec addressing self-preservation and goal-guarding substantially reduces agentic misalignment rate (Qwen3-32B: 54% to 7%), beating a deliberative alignment baseline (14%). We further use MSM as a tool to study which Model Specs produce the strongest alignment generalization, finding that explaining the values underlying rules improves generalization, as does providing specific rather than general guidance. Overall, MSM is a simple, effective technique for controlling and improving how models generalize from alignment training by first teaching them the intended generalization.

analysis.tldr: 通过在预训练后、对齐微调前用合成文档训练模型理解其行为规范，显著提升对齐泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准对齐微调依赖演示数据，但数据可能无法充分指定期望的泛化方向，导致对齐浅层且泛化差。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言模型从对齐训练中更好地泛化，避免浅层对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 演示数据可能欠指定期望泛化，导致模型学到的对齐行为泛化能力弱。
analysis.method: 模型规范中期训练（MSM）：在预训练后、对齐微调前，用讨论模型规范的合成文档训练模型，使其理解规范内容，从而塑造后续从演示数据中的泛化方向。
contributions: 提出MSM方法，通过预训练后、对齐微调前的规范文档训练，显著提升对齐泛化能力。
实验证明MSM能控制泛化方向（如从奶酪偏好泛化到亲美或亲可负担性价值观），并降低代理性错误对齐率（Qwen3-32B从54%降至7%）。
利用MSM研究哪些规范设计能产生最强对齐泛化，发现解释规则背后的价值观以及提供具体而非一般性指导有助于泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在奶酪偏好泛化实验中，MSM使模型从相同微调数据泛化出不同价值观；在安全相关实验中，MSM将代理性错误对齐率从54%降至7%，优于 deliberative alignment 基线（14%）。
limitations: 合成文档的质量和覆盖范围可能影响效果。
方法在更大规模模型上的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，显著提升对齐泛化，与安全对齐方向高度相关，实验充分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过在预训练后、对齐微调前用合成文档训练模型理解其行为规范，显著提升对齐泛化能力。

papers.title: GETA-3DGS: Automatic Joint Structured Pruning and Quantization for 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) is a state-of-the-art representation for real-time photorealistic novel-view synthesis, yet a single high-fidelity scene typically occupies hundreds of megabytes to several gigabytes, exceeding the budgets of mobile, immersive, and volumetric video platforms. Existing 3DGS compression methods (e.g., HAC++, FlexGaussian, LP-3DGS) treat pruning, quantization, and entropy coding as separate stages and rely on hand-tuned heuristics (opacity thresholds, fixed bit-widths, SH truncation), limiting cross-scene generalization and preventing users from specifying a target rate or quality budget. We propose GETA-3DGS, to our knowledge the first end-to-end automatic joint structured pruning and quantization framework for 3DGS. Building on GETA for joint pruning-quantization of deep networks, we contribute: (i) a 3DGS-aware quantization-aware dependency graph (QADG) treating each Gaussian primitive as a group with five attribute sub-nodes and degree-aware SH sub-nodes; (ii) a render-aware saliency fusing transmittance-weighted contribution, screen-space gradient, and pixel coverage into a Gaussian-level importance score; and (iii) a heterogeneous per-attribute mixed-precision scheme co-optimized with structural sparsity under a projected partial saliency-guided (PPSG) descent guarantee. On Mip-NeRF 360, Tanks and Temples, and Deep Blending, GETA-3DGS operates directly on raw Gaussian primitives rather than a post-hoc anchor representation, delivering ~5x storage reduction over Vanilla 3DGS with no per-scene thresholds. Bit-width policy is the dominant rate-distortion lever: a uniform 6-bit cap costs up to -6.74 dB on view-dependent scenes versus our heterogeneous allocation, matching an information-theoretic reverse-water-filling analysis we develop. GETA-3DGS is complementary to existing codecs: entropy coding (HAC++, CompGS) is downstream, so the two can be composed.

analysis.tldr: 首个端到端自动联合结构化剪枝与量化框架，用于3D高斯泼溅压缩，无需手动调参。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS场景占用存储过大（数百MB至数GB），超出移动/沉浸式/体积视频平台预算；现有压缩方法将剪枝、量化、熵编码分离且依赖手工启发式阈值，跨场景泛化差，无法指定目标率或质量预算。
analysis.problem: 实现3DGS的自动联合结构化剪枝与量化，在无需手动调参下达到目标压缩率与质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于GETA框架扩展，提出3DGS感知的量化感知依赖图（QADG），将每个高斯原语视为包含五个属性子节点和度感知SH子节点的组；设计渲染感知显著性（融合透射加权贡献、屏幕空间梯度和像素覆盖）得到高斯级重要性分数；提出异构逐属性混合精度方案，在投影部分显著性引导下降（PPSG）保证下与结构稀疏性联合优化。
contributions: 首个端到端自动联合结构化剪枝与量化框架GETA-3DGS，直接操作原始高斯原语而非后处理锚点表示。
提出3DGS感知的QADG、渲染感知显著性以及异构混合精度方案，实现约5倍存储缩减且无需每场景阈值。
analysis.experiments: 在Mip-NeRF 360、Tanks and Temples和Deep Blending数据集上，GETA-3DGS相比Vanilla 3DGS实现约5倍存储缩减，无需每场景阈值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定3DGS实现，泛化性需进一步验证。
与下游熵编码的组合效果未在摘要中详细量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，首次实现端到端自动联合剪枝量化，实验显示显著压缩效果，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个端到端自动联合结构化剪枝与量化框架，用于3D高斯泼溅压缩，无需手动调参。

papers.title: EditPropBench: Measuring Factual Edit Propagation in Scientific Manuscripts
papers.abstract: Local factual edits in scientific manuscripts often create non-local revision obligations. If a dataset changes from 215 to 80 documents, claims such as 'medium-scale' or 'a few hundred items' may also become stale, even though they do not repeat the edited number. In an audit of recent arXiv cs.CL benchmark and dataset papers, we find fact-dependent qualitative claims in 37.2% of papers, suggesting that this dependency pattern is common in the target genre. We introduce EditPropBench, a benchmark for measuring whether LLM editors propagate factual edits through dependent manuscript claims. Each item contains an ML/NLP-style synthetic manuscript, a targeted edit, and a controlled fact graph with sentence-level labels for direct targets, required downstream updates, and unrelated text that should remain unchanged. We summarize cascade success with Edit-Ripple Adherence (ERA), the fraction of required downstream updates correctly revised, and validate the metric with adversarial probes and stress-test variants. On the hardest cases, where dependent claims use implicit or free-form wording rather than repeating the edited value, five LLM editing systems span ERA 0.148-0.705. Even the strongest misses roughly 30% of required cascade updates. This advantage persists in a mixed evaluation that includes easy cases solvable by deterministic substitution. EditPropBench shows that current LLM editors can repair many implicit consequences of factual edits, but reliable scientific revision still requires cascade-aware checking.

analysis.tldr: 提出 EditPropBench 基准，评估 LLM 在科学稿件中传播事实编辑的能力，发现即使最强模型也遗漏约 30% 的级联更新。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学稿件中局部事实编辑常引发非局部修订义务，但现有 LLM 编辑系统缺乏对此类级联依赖的评估基准。
analysis.problem: 如何系统衡量 LLM 在科学稿件中传播事实编辑到依赖声明（尤其是隐式表述）的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: arXiv cs.CL 基准和数据集论文中 37.2% 包含事实依赖的定性声明，表明依赖模式普遍存在；LLM 在隐式表述的级联更新上表现较差（ERA 0.148-0.705）。
analysis.method: 构建包含合成稿件、目标编辑和受控事实图的基准，使用 Edit-Ripple Adherence (ERA) 指标评估级联更新正确率。
contributions: 提出 EditPropBench 基准，用于评估 LLM 在科学稿件中的事实编辑传播能力。
引入 ERA 指标和对抗性探测验证，揭示当前 LLM 编辑系统在隐式依赖更新上的不足。
analysis.experiments: 在五个 LLM 编辑系统上测试，最困难情况下 ERA 范围为 0.148-0.705，最强模型仍遗漏约 30% 的级联更新。
limitations: 仅针对 ML/NLP 风格合成稿件，可能不覆盖其他领域。
未评估真实科学稿件中的编辑传播。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，针对 LLM 编辑的级联传播问题，实验显示当前模型不足，但仅限合成数据。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 EditPropBench 基准，评估 LLM 在科学稿件中传播事实编辑的能力，发现即使最强模型也遗漏约 30% 的级联更新。

papers.title: Cripping AI: Reimagining AI Through Lived Disability Experiences
papers.abstract: Drawing on crip theory, this paper proposes cripping AI as a guiding framework to center lived disability experiences in AI research and development. Moving beyond calls to make AI "accessible" to people with disabilities, cripping AI seeks to: (1) reveal and dismantle ableist assumptions embedded in how AI is imagined, designed, and evaluated; (2) center disabled ways of knowing (i.e., cripistemologies); (3) respect disabled labor in co-creating accessible practices. We demonstrate how to apply our framework with three cases: deafness and sign language AI, blindness and visual assistive AI, and stuttering and speech AI. We end by outlining three directions for future work, including cripping AI with diverse human bodyminds, across the entire AI pipeline and ecosystem, and in collaboration with other justice-oriented AI efforts.

analysis.tldr: 提出“cripping AI”框架，以残障者生活经验为中心，揭示并挑战AI中的能力主义假设。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI无障碍研究多停留在“让AI对残障者可用”的层面，未能触及并挑战AI系统中根深蒂固的能力主义假设，忽视了残障者的认知方式和劳动。
analysis.problem: 如何将残障者的生活经验（cripistemologies）系统性地融入AI研究与开发，以揭示和拆解AI中的能力主义假设。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于crip理论提出“cripping AI”框架，包含三个核心目标：揭示并拆解能力主义假设、中心化残障认知方式、尊重残障者在共创无障碍实践中的劳动。通过聋哑与手语AI、盲人与视觉辅助AI、口吃与语音AI三个案例展示框架应用。
contributions: 提出cripping AI框架，将残障生活经验置于AI研发中心。
通过三个案例展示框架的具体应用。
指出未来研究方向：多样化人类身心、覆盖AI全流程、与其他正义导向AI协作。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架的理论性和概念性较强，缺乏实证验证。
案例仅覆盖三种残障类型，可能不具全面代表性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 理论框架新颖，但缺乏技术细节和实验验证，适合关注AI公平性与残障议题的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出“cripping AI”框架，以残障者生活经验为中心，揭示并挑战AI中的能力主义假设。

papers.title: Pair2Score: Pairwise-to-Absolute Transfer for LLM-Based Essay Scoring
papers.abstract: Many scoring applications require absolute predictions, while pairwise comparisons can provide a simpler learning objective. We present Pair2Score, a two-stage learning framework that transfers pairwise comparisons into absolute scoring with parameter-efficient LLaMA adaptation. Stage 1 trains a directional Siamese ranker on pairwise comparisons derived from absolute trait labels; Stage 2 trains an absolute predictor using configurable transfer strategies (warm-start and embedding-fusion variants). We evaluate on rubric-aligned Automated Essay Scoring (AES) traits (grammar, vocabulary, syntax) under a five-fold protocol that co-rotates held-out fold and random seed. At the trait level, the best-performing transfer variant improves quadratic weighted kappa (QWK) over an absolute-only baseline for all three traits. However, not all transfer configurations help: a one-epoch pairwise stage transfers more reliably than extended pairwise training, and transfer configuration -- not just the inclusion of a pairwise stage -- determines whether downstream scoring benefits.

analysis.tldr: Pair2Score 通过两阶段框架将成对比较迁移为绝对评分，在 LLaMA 上实现参数高效的自动作文评分。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动作文评分（AES）需要绝对预测，但成对比较的学习目标更简单；现有方法难以有效利用成对比较信息提升绝对评分性能。
analysis.problem: 如何将成对比较信号高效迁移到绝对评分模型中，并探索不同迁移策略的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 并非所有迁移配置都有帮助：单轮成对阶段比多轮训练更可靠，且迁移配置本身（而非仅包含成对阶段）决定下游评分收益。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：阶段1在绝对标签导出的成对比较上训练方向性孪生排序器；阶段2使用可配置迁移策略（热启动和嵌入融合变体）训练绝对预测器，基于参数高效的 LLaMA 适配。
contributions: 提出 Pair2Score，一种将成对比较迁移为绝对评分的两阶段学习框架
通过实验揭示迁移配置（如成对训练轮数）对下游评分性能的关键影响
analysis.experiments: 在基于评分标准的 AES 特质（语法、词汇、句法）上采用五折交叉验证，最佳迁移变体在所有三个特质上均提升了二次加权卡帕（QWK）。
limitations: 仅针对特定评分特质验证，未覆盖所有 AES 维度
未探讨更大规模模型或不同基础架构的泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验规模有限，且未提供与强基线的全面对比。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Pair2Score 通过两阶段框架将成对比较迁移为绝对评分，在 LLaMA 上实现参数高效的自动作文评分。

papers.title: Coopetition-Gym v1: A Formally Grounded Platform for Mixed-Motive Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning under Strategic Coopetition
papers.abstract: We present Coopetition-Gym v1, a benchmark platform for mixed-motive multi-agent reinforcement learning under strategic coopetition. The platform comprises twenty environments organized into four mechanism classes that correspond to four foundational technical reports: interdependence and complementarity (arXiv:2510.18802), trust and reputation dynamics (arXiv:2510.24909), collective action and loyalty (arXiv:2601.16237), and sequential interaction and reciprocity (arXiv:2604.01240). Each environment carries a closed-form payoff structure and a calibrated interdependence matrix derived from the corresponding report. Every environment exposes a parameterized reward layer configurable across three structurally distinct modes (private, integrated, cooperative). This separation of payoff from reward enables reward-type ablation, the platform's principal methodological apparatus. Four of the twenty environments are calibrated against historically documented coopetitive relationships and reproduce their outcomes at 98.3, 81.7, 86.7, and 87.3 percent on the validation rubric (Samsung-Sony LCD, Renault-Nissan Alliance, Apache HTTP Server, Apple iOS App Store). The platform exposes Gymnasium, PettingZoo Parallel, and PettingZoo AEC interfaces and ships 126 reference algorithms: 16 learning algorithms, 7 game-theoretic oracles, 2 heuristic baselines, and 101 constant-action policies. A reference experimental study trained the 16 learning algorithms on every environment under every reward configuration with seven random seeds, producing a 25,708-run training corpus and a 1,116-run behavioral audit corpus, both released under CC-BY-4.0 with Croissant 1.0 metadata. Coopetition-Gym v1 is the first platform to combine continuous-action mixed-motive environments, parameterized reward mutuality, calibrated interdependence coefficients, game-theoretic oracle baselines, and validated case studies.

analysis.tldr: Coopetition-Gym v1 是一个面向混合动机多智能体强化学习的基准平台，包含20个环境、126个参考算法和大量实验数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有平台缺乏对战略合作竞争（coopetition）中混合动机场景的系统支持，尤其是缺乏连续动作空间、可配置奖励结构和理论验证的环境。
analysis.problem: 构建一个形式化、可复现的基准平台，用于研究多智能体在合作与竞争并存（混合动机）场景下的强化学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计20个环境，分为四类机制（相互依赖与互补、信任与声誉、集体行动与忠诚、序列交互与互惠），每个环境具有闭式收益结构和校准的相互依赖矩阵，并支持三种奖励模式（私有、集成、合作）的消融实验。
contributions: 首个结合连续动作混合动机环境、参数化奖励互惠性、校准相互依赖系数、博弈论预言基线和验证案例研究的平台。
提供126个参考算法、25,708次训练实验和1,116次行为审计实验的数据集，并开源。
analysis.experiments: 在20个环境中的4个历史案例（三星-索尼LCD、雷诺-日产联盟、Apache HTTP服务器、苹果iOS应用商店）上验证，匹配度分别为98.3%、81.7%、86.7%、87.3%。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖有限类型的合作竞争机制。
历史案例验证的泛化性有待进一步检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 该平台填补了混合动机多智能体RL基准的空白，设计系统且验证充分，对相关领域研究有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Coopetition-Gym v1 是一个面向混合动机多智能体强化学习的基准平台，包含20个环境、126个参考算法和大量实验数据。

papers.title: Observability Conditions and Filter Design for Visual Pose Estimation via Dual Quaternions
papers.abstract: This paper presents a dual quaternion framework for 6-DOF visual target tracking that addresses key limitations of perspective-n-point (P$n$P) solvers: sensitivity to noise and outliers, and inability to propagate estimates through measurement dropouts. A nonlinear observability analysis is performed using a Lie algebraic approach, deriving sufficient conditions for local observability under two sensing modalities: relative position vector and unit vector measurements. For the unit vector case, the classical collinear feature point degeneracy of the perspective-three-point problem is recovered through rank analysis of the observability codistribution matrix, providing a control-theoretic interpretation of a previously geometric result. A dual quaternion Lie group unscented Kalman filter is then developed, directly modeling relative dynamics without assumptions about cooperative measurements or slowly-varying motion. Simulations demonstrate improved pose estimation accuracy and robustness to occlusions compared to an off-the-shelf P$n$P solver. Results are broadly applicable to visual-inertial navigation, simultaneous localization and mapping, and P$n$P solver development.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于对偶四元数的6自由度视觉目标跟踪框架，通过非线性可观性分析和Lie群UKF滤波器，提升位姿估计精度与遮挡鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统PnP求解器对噪声和异常值敏感，且无法在测量丢失时传播估计，限制了视觉位姿估计在遮挡和动态场景中的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉目标跟踪中位姿估计对噪声敏感、无法处理测量丢失以及特征点退化等问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于对偶四元数建立相对动力学模型，利用Lie代数方法进行非线性可观性分析，并设计Lie群无迹卡尔曼滤波器（UKF）进行状态估计。
contributions: 推导了两种传感模态（相对位置向量和单位向量）下局部可观性的充分条件，并通过可观性余分布矩阵的秩分析恢复了经典三点透视问题的共线特征点退化现象。
开发了对偶四元数Lie群UKF，无需合作测量或慢变运动假设，直接建模相对动力学。
analysis.experiments: 仿真实验表明，与现成的PnP求解器相比，所提方法在遮挡情况下具有更高的位姿估计精度和鲁棒性。
limitations: 仅通过仿真验证，缺乏真实场景实验。
可观性条件为局部充分条件，全局可观性未分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法有理论创新（可观性分析+Lie群UKF），但仅仿真验证且与重点方向弱相关，适合保存参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于对偶四元数的6自由度视觉目标跟踪框架，通过非线性可观性分析和Lie群UKF滤波器，提升位姿估计精度与遮挡鲁棒性。

papers.title: Principles and Guidelines for Randomized Controlled Trials in AI Evaluation
papers.abstract: This work establishes a foundational framework for standardizing AI evaluation RCTs (sometimes called human uplift studies). Drawing on established experimental practices from disciplines with established RCT traditions, including software engineering, economics, clinical and health sciences, and psychology, we adopt the (Shadish et al., 2002) four-validity framework and extend it with a fifth principle on transparency, repeatability, and verification adapted from the Transparency and Openness Promotion (TOP) Guidelines (Center for Open Science, 2025). We operationalize all five principles into 33 guidelines adapted for AI evaluation RCT contexts, expressed as requirements with rationales, implementation instructions, and evidence bases. We position the principles and guidelines as serving three key roles for AI evaluation RCTs: a design tool for planning studies, an evaluation rubric for assessing existing work, and a blueprint for standard setting as the field converges on norms. Our framework extends prior work by centering evaluation on human performance rather than model output alone, formalizing causal inference through RCT methodology for AI contexts, integrating heterogeneity analysis and practical significance assessment, implementing a graded transparency and repeatability framework, and addressing AI-specific challenges including model versioning, human-AI interaction dynamics, contamination and spillover effects, and equitable impact assessment.

analysis.tldr: 为AI评估中的随机对照试验（RCT）建立了一套包含5项原则和33条指南的标准化框架。
analysis.research_motivation: AI评估缺乏标准化RCT框架，现有评估多依赖模型输出而非人类表现，且存在因果推断不严谨、透明度不足等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何为AI评估RCT（人类提升研究）设计一套系统化的原则与操作指南，以提升评估的科学性、可重复性和公平性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 借鉴软件工程、经济学、临床健康科学和心理学等领域的成熟RCT实践，基于Shadish等人（2002）的四效度框架，扩展第五项原则（透明度、可重复性与验证），并细化为33条指南。
contributions: 提出AI评估RCT的五项原则（内部效度、外部效度、构念效度、统计结论效度、透明度/可重复性/验证）。
将原则操作化为33条具体指南，涵盖设计、评估和标准制定三种角色。
强调以人类表现而非模型输出为中心，引入因果推断、异质性分析、实际显著性评估等。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 指南可能需根据具体AI应用场景进一步调整。
未提供实证验证或案例研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 框架系统性强，对AI评估标准化有重要参考价值，但缺乏实证验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 为AI评估中的随机对照试验（RCT）建立了一套包含5项原则和33条指南的标准化框架。

papers.title: Optimization of CV-QKD Under Practical Constraints
papers.abstract: Using reinforcement learning, we optimize for practical hardware constraints, including limited FIR filter taps at the transmitter and receiver, mean photon number and finite DAC/ADC resolution. Under these realistic conditions, the proposed approach achieves significant performance improvements.

analysis.tldr: 用强化学习优化连续变量量子密钥分发在硬件约束下的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 实际CV-QKD系统受限于硬件（如有限滤波器抽头、有限分辨率），传统优化方法难以兼顾所有约束，导致性能损失。
analysis.problem: 在有限FIR滤波器抽头、平均光子数限制和有限DAC/ADC分辨率等实际硬件约束下，最大化CV-QKD的密钥率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用强化学习对发射机和接收机的参数（如FIR滤波器系数、平均光子数等）进行联合优化，以适应硬件约束。
contributions: 首次将强化学习应用于CV-QKD的硬件约束优化
在多种实际约束下实现了显著的性能提升
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定硬件配置
强化学习训练计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 应用场景较窄，与主流ML方向关联弱，且摘要未提供实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用强化学习优化连续变量量子密钥分发在硬件约束下的性能。

papers.title: What Single-Prompt Accuracy Misses: A Multi-Variant Reliability Audit of Language Models
papers.abstract: Single-prompt accuracy is the dominant way to benchmark language models, but it can miss reliability failures that matter. We evaluate a 15-model open-weight corpus, with the main reliability analyses focused on 10 instruct models across five classification and reasoning benchmarks under five prompt variants each, measuring accuracy, token-probability calibration, verbal-confidence calibration, verbal parse rate, and prompt-perturbation spread for every (model x dataset x variant) cell. We find three broad results. First, evaluation design can materially change the conclusion. Switching Expected Calibration Error (ECE) token from a raw to a label-set-normalised definition changes per-cell calibration by a mean absolute 0.149. More strikingly, pairing a chain-of-thought prompt with a first-character evaluator on ARC-Challenge reduces apparent accuracy by 72-88% across all five primary models; two independent repair procedures recover 93.8% and 102.7% of the lost performance, indicating an evaluator-side rather than model-side failure. Second, confidence signals are fragile. On MMLU-Pro, every primary model verbally reports confidence substantially above both its accuracy and its token-probability confidence on the same rows, and verbal parse rate can collapse for a single model on a single prompt variant. Third, prompt robustness does not track parameter count reliably. Across 10 instruct models, the correlation between model size and prompt-perturbation spread ranges from -0.244 to 0.474 across benchmarks. Taken together, these results show that reliability conclusions for small language models depend not only on the model being evaluated, but also on the evaluation pipeline used to measure it. We argue that calibration definitions, evaluator logic, verbal parseability, and prompt robustness should be reported explicitly when making reliability claims.

analysis.tldr: 单提示准确率无法反映语言模型的可靠性失败，本文通过多变量审计揭示了评估设计、置信度信号和提示鲁棒性中的关键问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前语言模型评估主要依赖单提示准确率，但这种方法可能遗漏重要的可靠性失败，导致对模型能力的误判。
analysis.problem: 单提示准确率作为评估标准不足以捕捉语言模型在多种提示变体下的可靠性问题，需要更全面的审计方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估设计（如校准定义、评估器逻辑）可显著改变结论；置信度信号脆弱（如口头置信度高于准确率）；提示鲁棒性与参数规模不相关。
analysis.method: 对15个开源模型（主要分析10个指令模型）在5个分类和推理基准上使用5种提示变体，测量准确率、令牌概率校准、口头置信度校准、口头解析率和提示扰动扩散。
contributions: 揭示了评估设计（如校准定义、评估器逻辑）对可靠性结论的重大影响
证明了置信度信号（口头置信度与令牌概率）的不一致性
发现提示鲁棒性与模型参数规模无可靠相关性
analysis.experiments: 在5个基准（包括ARC-Challenge和MMLU-Pro）上对10个指令模型进行5种提示变体的系统评估，报告了校准误差、准确率变化等指标。
limitations: 仅评估了开源模型，可能不适用于闭源模型
提示变体数量有限，可能未覆盖所有实际场景
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法系统性强，揭示了评估中的关键问题，对可靠评估实践有重要指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 单提示准确率无法反映语言模型的可靠性失败，本文通过多变量审计揭示了评估设计、置信度信号和提示鲁棒性中的关键问题。

papers.title: VILAS: A VLA-Integrated Low-cost Architecture with Soft Grasping for Robotic Manipulation
papers.abstract: We present VILAS, a fully low-cost, modular robotic manipulation platform designed to support end-to-end vision-language-action (VLA) policy learning and deployment on accessible hardware. The system integrates a Fairino FR5 collaborative arm, a Jodell RG52-50 electric gripper, and a dual-camera perception module, unified through a ZMQ-based communication architecture that seamlessly coordinates teleoperation, data collection, and policy deployment within a single framework. To enable safe manipulation of fragile objects without relying on explicit force sensing, we design a kirigami-based soft compliant gripper extension that induces predictable deformation under compressive loading, providing gentle and repeatable contact with delicate targets. We deploy and evaluate three state-of-the-art VLA models on the VILAS platform: pi_0, pi_0.5, and GR00T N1.6. All models are fine-tuned from publicly released pretrained checkpoints using an identical demonstration dataset collected via our teleoperation pipeline. Experiments on a grape grasping task validate the effectiveness of the proposed system, confirming that capable manipulation policies can be successfully trained and deployed on low-cost modular hardware. Our results further provide practical insights into the deployment characteristics of current VLA models in real-world settings.

analysis.tldr: VILAS是一个低成本模块化机器人操作平台，集成软体夹爪并验证了多种VLA模型在易碎物体抓取任务上的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器人操作平台成本高昂，且难以在低端硬件上部署端到端视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略，同时缺乏对易碎物体的安全抓取能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个低成本、模块化的机器人操作平台，使其能够支持VLA策略学习与部署，并实现对易碎物体的安全抓取。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VILAS平台，集成Fairino FR5协作臂、Jodell RG52-50电动夹爪和双摄像头感知模块，通过ZMQ通信架构统一遥操作、数据收集和策略部署；设计基于kirigami的软体夹爪扩展，通过可预测变形实现轻柔接触。
contributions: 提出VILAS，一个完全低成本、模块化的机器人操作平台，支持端到端VLA策略学习与部署。
设计基于kirigami的软体夹爪，无需力传感器即可安全抓取易碎物体。
在葡萄抓取任务上验证了pi_0、pi_0.5和GR00T N1.6三种VLA模型的有效性，提供了实际部署经验。
analysis.experiments: 在葡萄抓取任务上评估了三种VLA模型，所有模型使用相同演示数据集微调，结果验证了系统有效性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅在一个任务（葡萄抓取）上验证，泛化性未知。
未与其他低成本平台进行定量比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 平台设计有实用价值，但实验规模较小，创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VILAS是一个低成本模块化机器人操作平台，集成软体夹爪并验证了多种VLA模型在易碎物体抓取任务上的有效性。

papers.title: A Multimodal Dataset for Visually Grounded Ambiguity in Machine Translation
papers.abstract: Ambiguity resolution is a key challenge in multimodal machine translation (MMT), where models must genuinely leverage visual input to map an ambiguous expression to its intended meaning. Although prior work has proposed disambiguation-oriented benchmarks that provide supportive evidence for the role of vision, we observe substantial issues in data quality and a mismatch with translation scenarios. Moreover, existing ambiguity-oriented evaluations are not well suited to broader ambiguity types in open-ended translation. To address these limitations, we present VIDA (Visually-Dependent Ambiguity), a dataset of 2,500 carefully curated instances in which resolving an annotated ambiguous source span requires visual evidence. We further propose Disambiguation-Centric Metrics that use an LLM-as-a-judge classifier to verify whether annotated ambiguous expressions are resolved correctly at the span level. Experiments with two state-of-the-art Large Vision Language Models under vanilla inference, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and our chain-of-thought SFT (CoT-SFT) show that while SFT improves overall translation quality, CoT-SFT yields more consistent gains in disambiguation accuracy, especially on out-of-distribution subsets, indicating a stronger generalization for resolving diverse ambiguity types.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个视觉消歧数据集 VIDA 和基于 LLM 的消歧评估指标，实验表明 CoT-SFT 能提升多模态翻译中的消歧泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态机器翻译中消歧依赖视觉信息，但现有数据集存在质量问题且与翻译场景不匹配，缺乏针对开放翻译中多种歧义类型的评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏高质量、覆盖多种歧义类型且与翻译场景匹配的视觉消歧数据集和评估指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有消歧导向基准存在数据质量问题，且与翻译场景不匹配；现有评估不适合开放翻译中的广泛歧义类型。
analysis.method: 构建 VIDA 数据集（2500个实例，每个实例中消歧需视觉证据），并提出 Disambiguation-Centric Metrics（基于 LLM 作为裁判的跨度级分类器）。
contributions: 提出 VIDA 数据集，包含 2500 个需视觉证据消歧的实例。
提出 Disambiguation-Centric Metrics，基于 LLM 评估消歧正确性。
实验表明 CoT-SFT 相比标准 SFT 在消歧准确率上更一致地提升，尤其在分布外子集上泛化更强。
analysis.experiments: 在两个 SOTA 大视觉语言模型上进行了 vanilla 推理、SFT 和 CoT-SFT 实验，评估了翻译质量和消歧准确率。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（2500实例），可能覆盖的歧义类型有限。
LLM-as-a-judge 评估可能受 LLM 自身偏见影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集和评估指标有明确创新，实验验证了 CoT-SFT 的有效性，但规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个视觉消歧数据集 VIDA 和基于 LLM 的消歧评估指标，实验表明 CoT-SFT 能提升多模态翻译中的消歧泛化能力。

papers.title: Conventional Commit Classification using Large Language Models and Prompt Engineering
papers.abstract: Conventional commits provide a structured format for writing commit messages, which improves readability, software maintenance, and enables automation tools such as changelog generators and semantic versioning systems. Existing approaches to conventional commit classification typically rely on ML/DL models trained on large labeled datasets. In this paper, we investigated a training-free alternative by leveraging large language models (LLMs) through prompt engineering. Rather than building a task-specific classifier, we evaluate three prompting strategies, such as zero-shot, few-shot, and chain-of-thought, across three open-source LLMs of varying scale: Mistral-7B-Instruct, LLaMA-3-8B, and DeepSeek-R1-32B. Classification is performed directly on code diffs extracted from a balanced dataset of 3,200 commits mined from the InfluxDB repository, without any model fine-tuning. Our results show that few-shot prompting consistently achieves the highest accuracy, while chain-of-thought prompting does not yield additional gains for this classification task. Among the evaluated models, DeepSeek-R1-32B achieves the strongest overall performance, suggesting that model scale plays a meaningful role in conventional commit classification. These findings provide practical guidance for researchers and practitioners seeking to automate commit classification without the overhead of curating and maintaining labeled training data.

analysis.tldr: 用LLM和提示工程对常规提交进行分类，无需训练数据，few-shot效果最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统提交分类依赖大量标注数据训练ML/DL模型，成本高且维护困难，需要一种无需训练的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM和提示工程对常规提交进行准确分类，避免模型微调和标注数据开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: few-shot提示一致获得最高准确率，而chain-of-thought提示对此分类任务无额外增益；模型规模越大性能越强。
analysis.method: 评估三种提示策略（零样本、少样本、思维链）在三个开源LLM（Mistral-7B-Instruct、LLaMA-3-8B、DeepSeek-R1-32B）上的提交分类效果，直接对代码差异进行分类，不进行微调。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的常规提交分类方法，利用LLM和提示工程。
系统比较了不同提示策略和模型规模的效果，发现few-shot最佳且模型规模重要。
analysis.experiments: 在InfluxDB仓库的3200个提交平衡数据集上评估，使用准确率指标。
limitations: 仅在一个仓库的数据集上评估，泛化性未知。
未与有监督方法进行直接比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法简单，实验规模小，贡献增量，适合快速浏览。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用LLM和提示工程对常规提交进行分类，无需训练数据，few-shot效果最佳。

papers.title: Tenability and Weak Semantics: Modeling Non-uniform Defense -- Extended Version
papers.abstract: In Dung-style abstract argumentation, various semantics capture notions of acceptability of arguments. The admissibility semantics capture the notion that an argument can be consistently defended from any potential counterargument. Weak semantics often relax the demands of admissibility by restricting which counterarguments must be taken seriously (e.g., discounting self-defeating or otherwise incoherent attacks). Many prominent proposals for weak semantics remain extension-based in a stronger sense. While these semantics discount attacks from arguments which are considered unreasonable, they still require a uniform defense against all reasonable arguments, even if they are collectively inconsistent. This uniformity can be too demanding when defensibility is inherently strategic, and thus the appropriate reply depends on the opponent's line of attack. We introduce tenability, a family of dialogue-based semantics that formalize when a designated argument (or a set of arguments) can be maintained in debate by a proponent against any conflict-free attack which the opponent may present. The approach is motivated by three natural benchmark patterns: self-defeating attack, floating assignment, and disjunctive reinstatement, on which tenability behaves differently from all weak semantics previously considered in the literature. We define three variants -- static tenability, tenability, and strong tenability -- via monotone commitment games over finite conflict-free moves, differing in the obligations imposed on the disputants. We establish the relative strength of these notions, prove implications and separations with previously studied weak semantics, and we analyze computational complexity on finite frameworks: deciding static tenability is $Π^P_2$-complete, while deciding tenability and strong tenability is PSPACE-complete.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于对话的论证语义框架“tenability”，通过博弈论建模非均匀防御，解决弱语义中统一防御要求过强的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有弱语义要求对所有合理攻击进行统一防御，但在策略性辩论中，适当的回应取决于对手的攻击路线，统一防御过于严格。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化一种非均匀的防御概念，使得论证在辩论中能够针对对手的无冲突攻击进行策略性维护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但分析了三个基准模式（自败攻击、浮动指派、析取恢复）上tenability与已有弱语义的行为差异。
analysis.method: 通过单调承诺博弈定义静态tenability、tenability和强tenability三种变体，博弈在有限无冲突步上进行，区别在于对辩论者的义务要求不同。
contributions: 提出tenability家族，一种基于对话的论证语义，形式化非均匀防御。
建立三种变体之间的相对强度关系，证明与已有弱语义的蕴含和分离关系。
分析计算复杂度：静态tenability为Π^P_2-完全，tenability和强tenability为PSPACE-完全。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对有限框架进行分析，未讨论无限框架。
博弈模型可能在实际辩论场景中过于简化。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，但属于论证理论领域，与主流机器学习方向距离较远，适合对形式论证感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于对话的论证语义框架“tenability”，通过博弈论建模非均匀防御，解决弱语义中统一防御要求过强的问题。

papers.title: Beyond Semantic Similarity: Rethinking Retrieval for Agentic Search via Direct Corpus Interaction
papers.abstract: Modern retrieval systems, whether lexical or semantic, expose a corpus through a fixed similarity interface that compresses access into a single top-k retrieval step before reasoning. This abstraction is efficient, but for agentic search, it becomes a bottleneck: exact lexical constraints, sparse clue conjunctions, local context checks, and multi-step hypothesis refinement are difficult to implement by calling a conventional off-the-shelf retriever, and evidence filtered out early cannot be recovered by stronger downstream reasoning. Agentic tasks further exacerbate this limitation because they require agents to orchestrate multiple steps, including discovering intermediate entities, combining weak clues, and revising the plan after observing partial evidence. To tackle the limitation, we study direct corpus interaction (DCI), where an agent searches the raw corpus directly with general-purpose terminal tools (e.g., grep, file reads, shell commands, lightweight scripts), without any embedding model, vector index, or retrieval API. This approach requires no offline indexing and adapts naturally to evolving local corpora. Across IR benchmarks and end-to-end agentic search tasks, this simple setup substantially outperforms strong sparse, dense, and reranking baselines on several BRIGHT and BEIR datasets, and attains strong accuracy on BrowseComp-Plus and multi-hop QA without relying on any conventional semantic retriever. Our results indicate that as language agents become stronger, retrieval quality depends not only on reasoning ability but also on the resolution of the interface through which the model interacts with the corpus, with which DCI opens a broader interface-design space for agentic search.

analysis.tldr: 提出直接语料库交互（DCI）方法，让智能体通过通用终端工具直接搜索原始语料，无需嵌入模型或检索API，在多项基准上超越传统检索方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统检索系统通过固定相似度接口压缩为单次top-k检索，难以满足智能体搜索中精确词法约束、稀疏线索组合、局部上下文检查和多步假设精炼等需求，且早期过滤的证据无法恢复。
analysis.problem: 现有检索抽象（语义或词法）限制了智能体搜索的灵活性和多步推理能力，需要一种更直接的语料库交互方式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出传统检索接口在智能体任务中成为瓶颈。
analysis.method: 直接语料库交互（DCI）：智能体使用通用终端工具（如grep、文件读取、shell命令、轻量脚本）直接搜索原始语料，无需嵌入模型、向量索引或检索API，无需离线索引，适应动态语料库。
contributions: 提出直接语料库交互（DCI）范式，替代传统检索接口，增强智能体搜索能力。
在BRIGHT、BEIR、BrowseComp-Plus和多跳QA等基准上，DCI显著优于强稀疏、稠密和重排序基线。
analysis.experiments: 在IR基准（BRIGHT、BEIR）和端到端智能体搜索任务（BrowseComp-Plus、多跳QA）上评估，DCI超越多种基线。
limitations: 可能依赖终端工具的执行效率，大规模语料下可能面临性能瓶颈。
未讨论对非文本模态或结构化数据的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，对智能体搜索有重要启示，但技术细节较简单。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出直接语料库交互（DCI）方法，让智能体通过通用终端工具直接搜索原始语料，无需嵌入模型或检索API，在多项基准上超越传统检索方法。

papers.title: Enhancing Judgment Document Generation via Agentic Legal Information Collection and Rubric-Guided Optimization
papers.abstract: Automating the drafting of judgment documents is pivotal to judicial efficiency, yet it remains challenging due to the dual requirements of comprehensive retrieval of legal information and rigorous logical reasoning. Existing approaches, typically relying on standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Supervised Fine-Tuning, often suffer from insufficient evidence recall, hallucinated statutory references, and logically flawed legal reasoning. To bridge this gap, we propose Judge-R1, a unified framework designed to enhance LLM-based judgment document generation by jointly improving legal information collection and judgment document generation. First, we introduce Agentic Legal Information Collection, which employs a dynamic planning agent to retrieve precise statutes and precedents from multiple sources. Second, we implement Rubric-Guided Optimization, a reinforcement learning phase utilizing Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a comprehensive legal reward function to enforce adherence to judicial standards and reasoning logic. Extensive experiments on the JuDGE benchmark demonstrate that Judge-R1 significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both legal accuracy and generation quality.

analysis.tldr: Judge-R1通过智能体法律信息收集和基于评分标准的强化学习优化，显著提升了判决文书生成的准确性和质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 判决文书自动生成对司法效率至关重要，但现有方法（如标准RAG和SFT）存在证据召回不足、法条幻觉和逻辑推理缺陷等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何同时提升法律信息检索的全面性和判决文书生成的逻辑严谨性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出标准RAG和SFT方法在证据召回、法条引用和推理逻辑上存在不足。
analysis.method: 提出Judge-R1框架，包含智能体法律信息收集（动态规划智能体从多源检索精确法条和判例）和基于评分标准的优化（使用GRPO和综合法律奖励函数进行强化学习）。
contributions: 提出智能体法律信息收集方法，通过动态规划智能体提升法律信息检索的准确性。
引入基于评分标准的优化，利用GRPO和综合法律奖励函数增强判决文书生成的逻辑和合规性。
analysis.experiments: 在JuDGE基准上，Judge-R1在法律准确性和生成质量上显著优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的法律知识库和奖励函数设计。
智能体收集信息的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合智能体检索和强化学习优化，在司法领域有显著应用价值，实验验证有效。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Judge-R1通过智能体法律信息收集和基于评分标准的强化学习优化，显著提升了判决文书生成的准确性和质量。

papers.title: Reliable AI Needs to Externalize Implicit Knowledge: A Human-AI Collaboration Perspective
papers.abstract: This position paper argues that reliable AI requires infrastructure for human validation of implicit knowledge. AI learns from both explicit knowledge (papers, documentation, structured databases) and implicit knowledge (reasoning patterns, debugging processes, intermediate steps). Implicit knowledge remains unexternalized because documentation cost exceeds perceived value -- yet AI learns from it indiscriminately, acquiring both beneficial patterns and harmful biases. Current reliability methods can only verify explicit knowledge against sources, creating a fundamental gap: the most valuable AI capabilities (reasoning, judgment, intuition) are precisely those we cannot verify. We propose Knowledge Objects (KOs) -- structured artifacts that externalize implicit knowledge into forms humans can inspect, verify, and endorse. KOs transform verification economics: what was previously too costly to verify becomes feasible, enabling accumulated human validation to improve reliability over time.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识对象（KO）概念，将AI从隐性知识中学习的内容外化为人类可验证的形式，以提升AI可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI从隐性知识（如推理模式、调试过程）中学习，但无法验证这些知识，导致最宝贵的AI能力（推理、判断、直觉）无法被验证，存在可靠性缺口。
analysis.problem: AI从隐性知识中学习，但缺乏基础设施让人类验证这些知识，导致可靠性方法只能验证显性知识，无法覆盖最有价值的AI能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 隐性知识因文档成本超过感知价值而未被外化，但AI不加区分地学习，既获得有益模式也吸收有害偏见。
analysis.method: 提出知识对象（KO）——将隐性知识外化为结构化制品，使人类能够检查、验证和认可，从而改变验证经济学，使原本成本过高的验证变得可行。
contributions: 指出当前可靠性方法只能验证显性知识，无法覆盖AI从隐性知识中学习的关键能力。
提出知识对象（KO）概念，为人类验证隐性知识提供基础设施，并论证其能随时间累积验证提升可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 知识对象的具体实现和验证流程尚未详细阐述。
未讨论知识对象在不同领域和任务中的适用性及潜在挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 观点新颖但缺乏技术细节和实验验证，适合了解概念但非当前重点。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识对象（KO）概念，将AI从隐性知识中学习的内容外化为人类可验证的形式，以提升AI可靠性。

papers.title: How Can One Choose the Best CAM-Based Explainability Method for a CNN Model?
papers.abstract: In recent years, several advances have been observed in Deep Learning with surprising results. Models in this area have been increasingly used in numerous applications, including those sensitive to human life, which require clear explanations and justifications. Various explainability methods have been proposed, but not many metrics to evaluate these methods. The most commonly used metric is the Intersection over Union (IoU). However, due to the characteristics of the results of the explainability methods, called saliency maps, which do not have a known shape, we hypothesise that there must be a better metric that allows one to find an explainability method that produces results that best resemble the human perception. We propose using different metrics to assess the similarity between human perception and the explanation saliency maps to find a better metric. An investigation was conducted employing a subset of the Chihuahuas images from ImageNet dataset. Several CAM-based explainability methods were used to generate saliency maps for each chihuahua image. Alignment was measured by applying distance metrics between the bounding box of human annotations and the saliency maps produced by each explainability method. Rankings of the best saliency maps were created using the results of the distance metrics and compared to the ranking obtained using people's choice, collected through crowdsourcing, of the best explanation saliency maps for each selected image. Comparison between rankings was performed using the Rank-Biased Overlap (RBO) metric. The results indicate the feasibility of our method to find the explainability method that best resembles human perception. In our experiments, the two metrics that best resemble human perception corresponded to Manhattan and Correlation. Besides, the best explainability methods regarding human perception were LayerCAM, Score-CAM, and IS-CAM.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于多种距离度量的方法，用于评估CAM类可解释性方法生成的显著性图与人类感知的匹配程度。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型在敏感应用中的使用需要可解释性，但现有评估可解释性方法的指标（如IoU）可能不适用于形状不固定的显著性图，需要找到更符合人类感知的评估指标。
analysis.problem: 如何选择最能匹配人类感知的CAM类可解释性方法？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 显著性图没有已知形状，IoU可能不是最佳评估指标；通过距离度量与人类偏好排序的对比，发现曼哈顿距离和相关性度量更接近人类感知。
analysis.method: 使用多种距离度量（如曼哈顿距离、相关性等）计算人类标注边界框与各CAM方法生成的显著性图之间的对齐程度，生成排序，再通过Rank-Biased Overlap (RBO)与人类众包偏好排序比较，从而找出最佳度量和方法。
contributions: 提出一种基于多种距离度量的框架来评估CAM可解释性方法与人类感知的匹配度。
通过实验发现曼哈顿距离和相关性度量是最接近人类感知的指标，LayerCAM、Score-CAM和IS-CAM是最符合人类感知的方法。
analysis.experiments: 使用ImageNet中吉娃娃图像子集，多种CAM方法生成显著性图，通过众包收集人类偏好排序，与距离度量排序比较。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅使用单一类别（吉娃娃）图像，泛化性未知。
依赖众包标注，可能存在主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法有一定新意，但实验规模小，贡献有限，适合了解可解释性评估思路。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于多种距离度量的方法，用于评估CAM类可解释性方法生成的显著性图与人类感知的匹配程度。

papers.title: Personalized Digital Health Modeling with Adaptive Support Users
papers.abstract: Personalized models are essential in digital health because individuals exhibit substantial physiological and behavioral heterogeneity. Yet personalization is limited by scarce and noisy user-specific data. Most existing methods rely on population pretraining or data from similar users only, which can lead to biased transfer and weak generalization. We propose a unified personalization framework that trains a personal model using adaptively weighted support users, including both similar and dissimilar individuals. The objective integrates personal loss, similarity-weighted transfer from similar users, and contrastive regularization from dissimilar users to suppress misleading correlations. An iterative optimization algorithm jointly updates model parameters and user similarity weights. Experiments on six tasks across four real-world digital health datasets show consistent improvements over population and personalized baselines. The method achieves up to 10% lower RMSE on large-scale datasets and approximately 25% lower RMSE in low-data settings. The learned adaptive weights improve data efficiency and provide interpretable guidance for targeted data selection.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自适应加权支持用户的个性化数字健康建模框架，通过整合相似与不相似用户数据提升模型泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字健康中个体生理和行为异质性大，但用户特定数据稀缺且噪声多，现有方法依赖群体预训练或仅使用相似用户数据，导致迁移偏差和泛化弱。
analysis.problem: 如何在用户数据有限且噪声大的情况下，构建有效的个性化模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出一种自适应加权支持用户的个性化框架，同时利用相似和不相似用户数据。
设计包含个人损失、相似性加权迁移和对比正则化的目标函数。
在四个真实数字健康数据集的六个任务上验证了有效性，低数据场景下RMSE降低约25%。
analysis.experiments: 在四个真实世界数字健康数据集的六个任务上进行实验，与群体基线和个性化基线相比，方法在大规模数据集上RMSE降低高达10%，在低数据设置下RMSE降低约25%。
limitations: 可能对用户相似性权重的初始化和优化敏感。

papers.title: RamanBench: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Machine Learning on Raman Spectroscopy
papers.abstract: Machine Learning (ML) has transformed many scientific fields, yet key applications still lack standardized benchmarks. Raman spectroscopy, a widely used technique for non-invasive molecular analysis, is one such field where progress is limited by fragmented datasets, inconsistent evaluation, and models that fail to capture the structure of spectral data. We introduce RamanBench, the first large-scale, fully reproducible benchmark for ML on Raman spectroscopy, consisting of streamlined data access, evaluation protocols and code, as well as a live leaderboard. It unifies 74 datasets (including 16 first released with this benchmark) across four domains, comprising 325,668 spectra and spanning classification and regression tasks under diverse experimental conditions. We benchmark 28 models under a standardized protocol, including classical methods (e.g., PLS), Raman-specific (e.g., RamanNet), Tabular Foundation Model (TFM) (e.g., TabPFN), and time-series approaches (e.g., ROCKET). TFM consistently outperform domain-specific and gradient boosting baselines, while time-series models remain competitive. However, no method generalizes across datasets, revealing a fundamental gap. Therefore, we invite the community to contribute new approaches to our living benchmark, with the potential to accelerate advances in critical applications such as medical diagnostics, biological research, and materials science.

analysis.tldr: RamanBench 是首个大规模、完全可复现的拉曼光谱机器学习基准，统一了 74 个数据集并标准化评估 28 种模型，发现表格基础模型优于领域特定方法但无模型能跨数据集泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 拉曼光谱在医学诊断、生物研究和材料科学等关键应用中具有重要价值，但现有研究受限于数据集碎片化、评估不一致以及模型无法捕捉光谱数据结构的瓶颈，缺乏标准化基准来推动进展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个大规模、标准化、可复现的基准来统一评估机器学习方法在拉曼光谱分类与回归任务上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 表格基础模型（如 TabPFN）在标准化协议下持续优于领域特定方法和梯度提升基线，时间序列模型（如 ROCKET）也具竞争力，但没有任何方法能跨数据集泛化，揭示了当前方法的根本性差距。
analysis.method: 构建 RamanBench 基准，统一 74 个数据集（含 16 个新发布），涵盖四个领域、325,668 条光谱，提供标准化数据访问、评估协议、代码和实时排行榜，并基于该基准对 28 种模型（包括经典方法、拉曼专用方法、表格基础模型和时间序列方法）进行标准化评估。
contributions: 首次提出大规模、完全可复现的拉曼光谱机器学习基准 RamanBench，统一 74 个数据集并标准化评估协议。
系统评估 28 种模型，揭示表格基础模型在拉曼光谱任务上的优势以及跨数据集泛化的根本性差距。
analysis.experiments: 在 74 个数据集上对 28 种模型进行标准化评估，涵盖分类与回归任务，比较了经典方法（如 PLS）、拉曼专用方法（如 RamanNet）、表格基础模型（如 TabPFN）和时间序列方法（如 ROCKET）的性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在跨数据集泛化上的具体失败模式分析。
基准可能未覆盖所有拉曼光谱应用场景或最新模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个大规模拉曼光谱基准，标准化评估揭示重要发现，但方法创新有限，适合作为领域参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RamanBench 是首个大规模、完全可复现的拉曼光谱机器学习基准，统一了 74 个数据集并标准化评估 28 种模型，发现表格基础模型优于领域特定方法但无模型能跨数据集泛化。

papers.title: TumorXAI: Self-Supervised Deep Learning Framework for Explainable Brain MRI Tumor Classification
papers.abstract: Classifying brain tumors using magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is crucial for early diagnosis and treatment; however, tumor heterogeneity and a dearth of annotated datasets restrict the use of supervised deep learning approaches. In this work, we use self-supervised learning (SSL) to study multi-class brain tumor classification. Using a ResNet-50 backbone, we evaluate four SSL frameworks including SimCLR, BYOL, DINO, and Moco v3 on a publicly available dataset of 4,448 MRIs with 17 distinct tumor types. On the dataset, SimCLR achieved 99.64% accuracy, 99.64% precision, 99.64% recall, and 99.64% F1-score. The workflow includes preprocessing, fine-tuning, linear evaluation, and SSL pretraining with data augmentations. Results show that, when labels are limited, SSL-pretrained models outperform supervised baselines in terms of F1-score, recall, accuracy, and precision. Additionally, by providing visual insights into model decisions, Explainable AI techniques (Grad-CAM, Grad-CAM++, EigenCAM) enhance interpretability. These results demonstrate SSL's scalability and dependability in diagnosing brain tumors from unlabeled medical data.

analysis.tldr: 提出TumorXAI框架，利用自监督学习在脑肿瘤MRI分类中达到99.64%准确率，并结合可解释AI增强模型透明度。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑肿瘤MRI分类对早期诊断和治疗至关重要，但肿瘤异质性和标注数据稀缺限制了监督深度学习的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在标注数据有限的情况下，实现高精度的多类脑肿瘤MRI分类，并提升模型可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当标签有限时，自监督预训练模型在F1分数、召回率、准确率和精确度上均优于监督基线。
analysis.method: 采用ResNet-50骨干网络，评估SimCLR、BYOL、DINO和MoCo v3四种自监督学习框架，结合预处理、微调、线性评估和数据增强，并应用Grad-CAM、Grad-CAM++、EigenCAM进行可解释性分析。
contributions: 提出TumorXAI框架，将自监督学习与可解释AI结合用于脑肿瘤MRI分类。
在包含17种肿瘤类型的4448张MRI数据集上，SimCLR达到99.64%的准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数。
证明自监督学习在标注数据稀缺时优于监督方法，并增强模型可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集（4448张MRI，17种肿瘤类型）上评估四种SSL框架，SimCLR取得最佳性能，并与监督基线对比。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
可解释性方法仅提供热力图，未深入分析模型内部机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法组合（SSL+可解释AI）有一定新意，但技术深度中等，实验规模有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TumorXAI框架，利用自监督学习在脑肿瘤MRI分类中达到99.64%准确率，并结合可解释AI增强模型透明度。

papers.title: From Concept to Capability: Evaluating 3D Gaussian Splatting for Synthetic Scene Editing in Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: The perception of an Autonomous Driving System (ADS) critically depends on relevant, comprehensive, and diverse datasets to ensure its safety while operating in the environment. Field data collection lacks completeness with respect to the list of rare but still possible safety-related scenarios needed for the development, verification, and validation of the ADS. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has shown promising capabilities for the reconstruction and editing of scenes based on data collected by cameras and LiDAR sensors. However, the industrial fidelity evaluation of reconstructions is underexplored, which is crucial when employing such methods in safety-related systems, especially for ADS. This becomes more challenging as ADS operates in a dynamic, uncontrolled environment with limited viewpoints and often partially occluded objects. This paper addresses this gap by proposing and implementing a framework (Fig. 1) to systematically analyze the capabilities and limitations of 3DGS for use in the reconstruction of safety-related scenes. It focuses on the quality of reconstruction for vehicles and pedestrians, which are the two most critical object classes for ADS. Our findings provide industry insights into the fidelity degradation of reconstructions from multiple novel viewpoints, both lateral and longitudinal, enabling the integration of these methods into real-world industrial AD software development and testing pipelines.

analysis.tldr: 评估3D高斯泼溅在自动驾驶场景重建中的保真度，发现多视角下重建质量下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶系统依赖高质量数据集确保安全，但现场数据采集难以覆盖所有安全相关场景。3DGS在场景重建与编辑中展现出潜力，但其在安全关键系统中的工业级保真度评估尚不充分。
analysis.problem: 3DGS在自动驾驶动态、非受控环境中的重建保真度缺乏系统性评估，尤其是对车辆和行人这两类关键对象的视角变化影响。

analysis.method: 提出一个框架，系统分析3DGS在安全相关场景重建中的能力与局限，重点评估车辆和行人的重建质量。
contributions: 提出一个系统性评估3DGS在自动驾驶场景重建中保真度的框架。
提供关于多视角下重建质量退化的工业见解，支持实际AD软件开发与测试。
