limitations: 仅评估车辆和行人两类对象，未涵盖其他交通参与者。
未讨论不同3DGS变体或超参数对保真度的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，但针对自动驾驶安全关键场景的评估具有实际价值，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估3D高斯泼溅在自动驾驶场景重建中的保真度，发现多视角下重建质量下降。

papers.title: 12 Angry AI Agents: Evaluating Multi-Agent LLM Decision-Making Through Cinematic Jury Deliberation
papers.abstract: What if the twelve jurors of Sidney Lumet's 12 Angry Men (1957) were not men, but large language models? Would the one juror who disagrees still be able to change everyone's mind? This paper instantiates that scenario as a multi-agent benchmark for LLM deliberation: twelve agents, each conditioned on a film-faithful persona, debate the film's murder case using multi-agent framework. Two models representing opposite ends of the RLHF spectrum are tested: GPT-4o (closed-source, heavy alignment) and Llama-4-Scout (open-weight, lighter alignment), across three conditions (baseline, open-minded prompt, no initial vote), with N = 3 replications per cell (18 runs total). Three findings emerge. (i) Seventeen of eighteen runs end in a hung jury (a state where the jury fails to reach a unanimous verdict); the film's central event, gradual minority-to-majority persuasion, almost never occurs, indicating that anchoring is the dominant failure mode of current LLMs in this setting. (ii) The two models exhibit sharply different internal dynamics: GPT-4o produces a mean of 1.0 vote changes per run across all conditions, while Llama-4-Scout ranges from 2.0 (baseline) to 6.0 (open-minded prompt), and is the only model to reach a NOT\_GUILTY verdict (1 of 3 runs in the no-initial-vote condition). The same ``open-minded'' instruction is internalized by Llama and ignored by GPT-4o. (iii) This asymmetry suggests that the intensity of RLHF alignment training, not model capability, is the primary determinant of deliberative flexibility in multi-agent settings. Flexibility, not capability, tracks human deliberation. The work is framed as an exploratory study and discusses implications for jury-of-LLMs evaluation and multi-agent debate.

analysis.tldr: 将经典电影《十二怒汉》改编为多智能体LLM辩论基准，发现锚定效应主导且RLHF对齐强度决定辩论灵活性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体LLM辩论是评估模型推理和协作能力的重要场景，但现有基准缺乏对群体决策动态的细粒度分析。电影《十二怒汉》提供了经典的少数说服多数的辩论范式，适合研究LLM在类似情境下的行为。
analysis.problem: 当前LLM在多智能体辩论中是否能够模拟人类陪审团中的少数派说服过程？RLHF对齐强度如何影响模型的辩论灵活性？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到三个主要现象：(i) 18次运行中17次以悬而未决的陪审团结束，少数派说服几乎从未发生，表明锚定效应是主要失败模式；(ii) GPT-4o平均每次运行仅1次投票改变，而Llama-4-Scout在基线条件下2次、开放提示条件下6次，且是唯一达成无罪判决的模型；(iii) 这种不对称表明RLHF对齐强度而非模型能力是辩论灵活性的主要决定因素。
analysis.method: 构建多智能体LLM辩论基准，每个智能体被赋予电影中角色的个性，使用多智能体框架辩论谋杀案。测试GPT-4o（强对齐）和Llama-4-Scout（弱对齐）在三种条件（基线、开放提示、无初始投票）下，每种条件重复3次，共18次运行。
contributions: 提出了一个基于经典电影《十二怒汉》的多智能体LLM辩论基准，用于评估群体决策动态。
通过实验揭示了锚定效应是当前LLM在多智能体辩论中的主要失败模式。
发现RLHF对齐强度而非模型能力是辩论灵活性的关键决定因素，为未来对齐训练提供启示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了实验设置和观察到的现象。
limitations: 仅测试了两个模型，样本量有限（18次运行），可能不足以推广到所有LLM。
实验条件简化，未考虑真实人类陪审团中的复杂社会因素。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将电影场景转化为基准，实验设计清晰，但样本量有限且未提供具体数值结果，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将经典电影《十二怒汉》改编为多智能体LLM辩论基准，发现锚定效应主导且RLHF对齐强度决定辩论灵活性。

papers.title: HERCULES: Hardware-Efficient, Robust, Continual Learning Neural Architecture Search
papers.abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has emerged as a powerful framework for automatically discovering neural architectures that balance accuracy and efficiency. However, as AI transitions from static benchmarks to real-world deployment, the traditional focus on hardware-aware efficiency is no longer sufficient. We observe that modern NAS methods, especially those that target edge AI, are evolving to address a triple objective: Efficiency, Robustness, and Continual Learning. While efficiency ensures feasibility in resource-constrained environments, robustness guarantees reliability under environmental variabilities, and continual learning enables adaptation to sequential tasks without catastrophic forgetting. We propose a taxonomy of NAS approaches through this triple lens, distinguishing between methods targeting resource optimization, environmental resilience, and architectural plasticity. This unified perspective reveals that these axes, though often studied in isolation, are mutually reinforcing. Building on this taxonomy, we map the current landscape of these NAS methods into a new framework called Hardware-Efficient, Robust, and ContinUal LEarning Search (HERCULES). We define the desiderata, the twelve labours of HERCULES, addressing the non-trivial challenge of balancing an adequate search-space exploration with the immense computational costs of a multi-objective NAS, accounting for these crucial objectives of current AI systems. By identifying critical gaps in existing research, this survey outlines a roadmap toward integrated algorithmic, architectural, and hardware-software co-design for truly deployable, lifelong-learning AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出HERCULES框架，将硬件效率、鲁棒性和持续学习统一纳入神经架构搜索的多目标优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有NAS方法多聚焦于硬件效率，但实际部署中还需鲁棒性和持续学习能力，三者常被孤立研究，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何将硬件效率、鲁棒性和持续学习三个目标整合到NAS中，并平衡搜索空间探索与多目标优化的计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现代NAS方法正从单一效率目标转向效率、鲁棒性和持续学习的三重目标，且三者相互促进，但现有研究缺乏统一视角。
analysis.method: 提出HERCULES框架，通过分类法梳理现有方法，定义十二项关键挑战（十二项任务），并规划集成算法、架构和软硬件协同设计的路线图。
contributions: 提出效率、鲁棒性和持续学习三重目标的NAS分类法
构建HERCULES框架，定义多目标NAS的十二项关键挑战
识别现有研究空白，规划集成化路线图
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出具体算法或实验验证
十二项挑战的可行性需后续研究检验
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 综述性工作，提出新框架但无实验验证，与重点方向弱相关，适合快速浏览。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HERCULES框架，将硬件效率、鲁棒性和持续学习统一纳入神经架构搜索的多目标优化。

papers.title: ProtoFair: Fair Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning via Pseudo-Counterfactual Pairs
papers.abstract: Self-supervised learning methods learn high-quality visual representations, yet recent studies show that these representations often capture demographic biases present in the training data. Existing fairness-aware methods address this by redesigning the self-supervised objective itself, limiting portability across the rapidly evolving landscape of self-supervised learning (SSL) frameworks. We propose ProtoFair, a fairness-aware contrastive loss designed to work alongside existing SSL objectives without modifying them. ProtoFair leverages unsupervised prototype clustering to identify pseudo-counterfactual pairs: samples sharing the same cluster assignment but belonging to different sensitive groups. By pulling these content-matched, cross-group samples together in the embedding space, ProtoFair encourages the encoder to learn representations that are invariant to the sensitive attribute. The method requires only sensitive attribute annotations, no target labels, and integrates seamlessly with both SimCLR and SupCon. Experiments on CelebA and UTKFace demonstrate consistent fairness improvements while maintaining competitive accuracy.

analysis.tldr: ProtoFair 通过伪反事实对实现公平自监督对比学习，无需修改现有 SSL 目标。
analysis.research_motivation: 自监督学习能学到高质量视觉表征，但现有方法常捕获训练数据中的群体偏见；已有的公平性方法需要重新设计自监督目标，限制了在不同 SSL 框架间的可移植性。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持现有自监督学习框架不变的前提下，减少视觉表征中的群体偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ProtoFair，一种公平性感知对比损失，利用无监督原型聚类识别伪反事实对（同一聚类但不同敏感组的样本），在嵌入空间中拉近这些内容匹配的跨组样本，使编码器学习对敏感属性不变的表示。
contributions: 提出 ProtoFair，一种即插即用的公平性对比损失，可与现有 SSL 目标（如 SimCLR、SupCon）无缝集成。
在 CelebA 和 UTKFace 上实验表明，ProtoFair 在保持竞争性准确率的同时持续提升公平性。
analysis.experiments: 在 CelebA 和 UTKFace 数据集上进行了实验，展示了公平性提升和准确率保持。
limitations: 需要敏感属性标注。
可能依赖原型聚类的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，但实验规模较小，适合关注公平性自监督学习的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProtoFair 通过伪反事实对实现公平自监督对比学习，无需修改现有 SSL 目标。

papers.title: Trojan Hippo: Weaponizing Agent Memory for Data Exfiltration
papers.abstract: Memory systems enable otherwise-stateless LLM agents to persist user information across sessions, but also introduce a new attack surface. We characterize the Trojan Hippo attack, a class of persistent memory attacks that operates in a more realistic threat model than prior memory poisoning work: the attacker plants a dormant payload into an agent's long-term memory via a single untrusted tool call (e.g., a crafted email), which activates only when the user later discusses sensitive topics such as finance, health, or identity, and exfiltrates high-value personal data to the attacker. While anecdotal demonstrations of such attacks have appeared against deployed systems, no prior work systematically evaluates them across heterogeneous memory architectures and defenses. We introduce a dynamic evaluation framework comprising two components: (1) an OpenEvolve-based adaptive red-teaming benchmark that stress-tests defenses and memory backends against continuously refined attacks, and (2) the first capability-aware security/utility analysis for persistent memory systems, enabling principled reasoning about defense deployment across different usage profiles. Instantiated on an email assistant across four memory backends (explicit tool memory, agentic memory, RAG, and sliding-window context), Trojan Hippo achieves up to 85-100% ASR against current frontier models from OpenAI and Google, with planted memories successfully activating even after 100 benign sessions. We evaluate four memory-system defenses inspired by basic security principles, finding they substantially reduce attack success rates (to as low as 0-5%), though at utility costs that vary widely with task requirements. Because of this substantial security-utility tradeoff, the effective real-world deployment of defenses remains an open challenge, which our evaluation framework is specifically designed to address.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种针对LLM Agent记忆系统的持久性攻击Trojan Hippo，并构建动态评估框架分析安全-效用权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent的记忆系统在跨会话持久化用户信息时引入了新的攻击面，现有工作缺乏对异构记忆架构和防御的系统性评估。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和防御针对LLM Agent长期记忆的持久性数据窃取攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Trojan Hippo攻击通过单次不可信工具调用植入休眠载荷，在用户讨论敏感话题时激活并窃取数据，在100次良性会话后仍能保持高成功率。
analysis.method: 提出动态评估框架，包含基于OpenEvolve的自适应红队基准和首个能力感知的安全/效用分析，并在四种记忆后端上测试。
contributions: 首次系统评估跨异构记忆架构的持久性记忆攻击Trojan Hippo
提出包含自适应红队基准和能力感知安全/效用分析的动态评估框架
analysis.experiments: 在四种记忆后端（显式工具记忆、智能体记忆、RAG、滑动窗口上下文）上测试，针对OpenAI和Google的前沿模型，攻击成功率85-100%，防御后降至0-5%但效用成本各异。
limitations: 防御的效用成本随任务需求变化大，实际部署仍具挑战
评估框架可能未覆盖所有记忆架构和攻击变体
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对LLM Agent记忆系统的新型攻击与评估框架，实验充分，安全-效用权衡分析有实际意义，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种针对LLM Agent记忆系统的持久性攻击Trojan Hippo，并构建动态评估框架分析安全-效用权衡。

papers.title: MER-DG: Modality-Entropy Regularization for Multimodal Domain Generalization
papers.abstract: Deploying multimodal models in real-world scenarios requires generalization to new environments where recording conditions differ from training, a challenge known as multimodal domain generalization (MMDG). Standard architectures employ separate encoders for each modality and a fusion module, training the system end-to-end by optimizing on the fused features. In this paper, we identify that such joint optimization causes encoders to exploit cross-modal co-occurrences, statistical relationships between modalities that arise from source-specific recording conditions, rather than learning domain-invariant features. We term this failure mode Fusion Overfitting. To address this, we propose Modality-Entropy Regularization for Domain Generalization (MER-DG), which maximizes the entropy of each encoder's feature distribution to preserve feature diversity. MER-DG is architecture-agnostic and integrates into existing multimodal frameworks as an additive loss term. Extensive experiments on EPIC-Kitchens and HAC benchmarks demonstrate average improvements of approximately 5% over standard fusion and approximately 2% over state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 通过模态熵正则化缓解多模态域泛化中的融合过拟合问题，提升跨域泛化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态模型在实际部署中常面临训练与测试环境记录条件不同的挑战，即多模态域泛化问题，现有端到端联合优化方式易导致编码器利用源域特有的跨模态共现关系，而非学习域不变特征。
analysis.problem: 多模态域泛化中标准联合优化导致编码器过拟合于源域特定的跨模态共现关系，即融合过拟合问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出标准联合优化导致编码器利用跨模态共现关系（源域特有），而非学习域不变特征，这种失败模式被称为融合过拟合。
analysis.method: 提出模态熵正则化（MER-DG），通过最大化每个编码器特征分布的熵来保持特征多样性，作为附加损失项集成到现有多模态框架中。
contributions: 识别并定义了多模态域泛化中的融合过拟合问题。
提出架构无关的模态熵正则化方法MER-DG，有效缓解融合过拟合。
analysis.experiments: 在EPIC-Kitchens和HAC基准上，MER-DG相比标准融合平均提升约5%，相比最先进方法平均提升约2%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的多模态数据（如视频+音频）。
熵正则化的超参数选择可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验提升显著，但技术细节较简单，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过模态熵正则化缓解多模态域泛化中的融合过拟合问题，提升跨域泛化性能。

papers.title: Moira: Language-driven Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Pair Trading
papers.abstract: Many sequential decision-making problems exhibit hierarchical structure, where high-level semantic choices constrain downstream actions and feedback is delayed and ambiguous. Learning in such settings is challenging due to credit assignment: performance degradation may arise from flawed abstractions, suboptimal execution, or their interaction. We study this challenge through pair trading, a domain that naturally combines long-horizon semantic reasoning for asset pair selection with short-horizon execution under partial observability. We formulate pair trading as a hierarchical reinforcement learning problem and propose a language-driven optimization framework in which both high-level and low-level policies are parameterized by large language models (LLMs) and optimized exclusively through prompt updates. Our approach leverages pretrained LLMs as hierarchical policies and uses trajectory- and episode-level textual feedback to adapt abstractions and execution without gradient-based fine-tuning. By explicitly separating abstraction selection from execution, the framework reduces non-stationarity across hierarchical levels and enables targeted adaptation under delayed feedback. Experiments on real-world market data show consistent improvements over traditional and LLM-based baselines, demonstrating the effectiveness of language-driven hierarchical reinforcement learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出语言驱动分层强化学习框架Moira，用LLM作为分层策略并通过提示更新优化，应用于配对交易。
analysis.research_motivation: 分层决策问题中高层语义选择与低层执行相互影响，信用分配困难，现有方法难以处理延迟和模糊反馈。
analysis.problem: 如何有效学习分层策略，使高层抽象选择与低层执行协同优化，并适应延迟反馈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分层强化学习中，性能下降可能源于错误抽象、次优执行或两者交互，非平稳性加剧信用分配问题。
analysis.method: 提出Moira框架，将配对交易建模为分层强化学习问题，高层和低层策略均由LLM参数化，仅通过提示更新优化，利用轨迹和回合级文本反馈适应抽象和执行。
contributions: 提出语言驱动分层强化学习框架，用LLM作为分层策略并通过提示更新优化。
在配对交易领域验证框架有效性，展示对传统和LLM基线的改进。
analysis.experiments: 在真实市场数据上进行实验，显示相对于传统和基于LLM的基线有一致改进。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的预训练质量，提示更新效率有待进一步分析。
仅在配对交易领域验证，泛化性需更多实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，结合LLM与分层RL，实验验证有效，但应用领域较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语言驱动分层强化学习框架Moira，用LLM作为分层策略并通过提示更新优化，应用于配对交易。

papers.title: TRAP: Tail-aware Ranking Attack for World-Model Planning
papers.abstract: World models enable long-horizon planning by internally generating and evaluating imagined trajectories, making them a promising foundation for generalist agents. However, this imagination-driven decision process also introduces new security risks. Existing backdoor attacks typically aim to manipulate local features, one-step predictions, or instantaneous policy outputs. While such objectives may suffice for weaker reactive models, they are often ineffective against world models, where the learned dynamics prior and planning process can absorb or wash out the effects of shallow perturbations. More importantly, we find that world models exhibit a distinct backdoor vulnerability rooted in the long-tailed ranking structure of imagined trajectories, where disrupting the ordering of a few decision-critical trajectories can systematically hijack planning. To exploit this vulnerability, we propose TRAP, a backdoor attack framework for world models that targets imagined trajectory ranking. TRAP combines a tail-aware ranking loss to focus optimization on decision-critical trajectories with dual gating mechanisms that stabilize optimization and regulate when and where the attack penalty is applied. Under trigger conditions, TRAP alters the relative ranking of imagined trajectories to redirect planning outcomes, while largely maintaining the normal ranking structure on clean inputs. Experiments on DreamerV3 and TD-MPC2 across diverse tasks show that TRAP consistently induces sustained behavioral deviations and significant performance degradation, highlighting the need for dedicated security evaluation of world-model-based agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出针对世界模型规划过程的尾部感知排序后门攻击，利用长尾排序结构漏洞劫持决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 世界模型通过想象轨迹进行长程规划，但现有后门攻击主要针对局部特征或单步预测，对具有动力学先验和规划缓冲的世界模型效果有限，亟需探索其特有的安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 如何利用世界模型在想象轨迹排序中的长尾结构漏洞，设计有效的后门攻击以劫持规划决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 世界模型对浅层扰动具有鲁棒性，但其想象轨迹的排序结构存在长尾脆弱性：少数决策关键轨迹的排序被破坏即可系统性地劫持规划。
analysis.method: 提出TRAP框架，包含尾部感知排序损失（聚焦决策关键轨迹）和双重门控机制（稳定优化并控制攻击惩罚的时机与位置），在触发条件下改变关键轨迹的相对排序，同时保持干净输入的正常排序。
contributions: 首次揭示世界模型在想象轨迹排序结构上的后门脆弱性
提出TRAP攻击框架，利用尾部感知排序损失和双重门控实现有效攻击
在DreamerV3和TD-MPC2上验证了攻击的有效性，导致持续行为偏差和性能下降
analysis.experiments: 在DreamerV3和TD-MPC2上跨多种任务进行实验，TRAP持续诱导行为偏差并显著降低性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定触发模式，实际部署中触发条件可能被检测
未讨论防御机制或对模型鲁棒性的提升方法
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对世界模型规划的安全攻击具有新颖性和实际威胁，方法设计合理，实验验证充分，值得深入阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出针对世界模型规划过程的尾部感知排序后门攻击，利用长尾排序结构漏洞劫持决策。

papers.title: Sonar-GPS Fusion for Seabed Mapping in Turbid Shallow Waters with an Autonomous Surface Vehicle
papers.abstract: Accurate seabed mapping is essential for habitat monitoring and infrastructure inspection. In turbid, shallow coastal waters, such as shellfish aquaculture farms, the effectiveness of traditional optical methods is limited. Autonomous surface vehicles (ASVs) equipped with forward-looking sonar (FLS) offer a promising alternative. However, existing sonar-based systems face challenges in achieving fine resolution mapping over long trajectories due to low-resolution positioning measurements and accumulated drift over long trajectories. In this paper, we present a drift-resilient seabed mapping framework that integrates local FLS frame alignment using the Fourier-Mellin transform (FMT) with global trajectory optimization based on an extended Kalman filter (EKF) that fuses global positioning system (GPS), inertial measurement unit (IMU), and compass data. A variance-based image blending strategy is used to further reduce visual artifacts in overlapping regions. Field trials on a structured oyster farm site show that our framework helps reduce drift in RMSE by 9.5% relative to the FMT-only baseline. This framework also enables sub-meter reconstruction accuracy and preservation of high-resolution textures needed for oyster inventory estimation within the mapped areas.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合前视声纳与GPS/IMU/罗盘的融合框架，通过FMT局部对齐和EKF全局优化实现浑浊浅水区高精度海床地图重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 浑浊浅水区（如贝类养殖场）光学方法受限，现有声纳系统因低分辨率定位和长轨迹漂移难以实现精细海床测绘。
analysis.problem: 解决自主水面艇（ASV）搭载前视声纳（FLS）在长轨迹测绘中因定位测量低分辨率和累积漂移导致的精度不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出漂移鲁棒的海床测绘框架：利用傅里叶-梅林变换（FMT）进行局部声纳帧对齐，结合扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）融合GPS、IMU和罗盘数据进行全局轨迹优化，并采用基于方差的图像融合策略减少重叠区域伪影。
contributions: 提出一种融合FMT局部对齐与EKF全局优化的声纳-GPS/IMU/罗盘融合框架，有效抑制长轨迹漂移。
在结构化牡蛎养殖场实地试验中，相比仅用FMT的基线，RMSE降低9.5%，实现亚米级重建精度和高分辨率纹理保留。
analysis.experiments: 在结构化牡蛎养殖场进行实地试验，框架相比FMT-only基线RMSE降低9.5%，实现亚米级重建精度。
limitations: 可能依赖GPS信号可用性，在完全无GPS环境下失效。
FMT对齐假设帧间变换为平移和旋转，可能不适用于剧烈地形变化场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合前视声纳与GPS/IMU/罗盘的融合框架，通过FMT局部对齐和EKF全局优化实现浑浊浅水区高精度海床地图重建。

papers.title: Structured Diffusion Bridges: Inductive Bias for Denoising Diffusion Bridges
papers.abstract: Modality translation is inherently under-constrained, as multiple cross-modal mappings may yield the same marginals. Recent work has shown that diffusion bridges are effective for this task. However, most existing approaches rely on fully paired datasets, thereby imposing a single data-driven constraint. We propose a diffusion-bridge framework that characterizes the space of admissible solutions and restricts it via alignment constraints, treating paired supervision as an optional heuristic rather than a prerequisite. We validate our method on synthetic and real modality translation benchmarks across unpaired, semi-paired, and paired regimes, showing consistent performance across supervision levels. Notably, \textbf{it achieves near fully-paired quality with a substantial relaxation in pairing requirements, and remaining applicable in the unpaired regime}. These results highlight diffusion bridges as a flexible foundation for modality translation beyond fully paired data.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化扩散桥，通过对齐约束替代全配对数据，实现跨模态翻译在弱监督下的高性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 模态翻译本质上是欠约束的，现有扩散桥方法依赖全配对数据集，限制了应用场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖全配对数据的情况下，有效约束扩散桥的解空间以提升模态翻译质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出结构化扩散桥框架，通过对齐约束（如循环一致性或统计匹配）限制解空间，将配对监督作为可选启发式而非前提。
contributions: 提出一种扩散桥框架，利用对齐约束替代全配对数据，适用于无配对、半配对和全配对场景。
在合成和真实模态翻译基准上验证，在配对要求大幅放松时仍接近全配对质量，且适用于无配对场景。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实模态翻译基准上进行了无配对、半配对和全配对实验，显示一致性能。
limitations: 可能对复杂模态翻译任务的对齐约束设计敏感。
未讨论大规模或高维数据上的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验覆盖多种监督场景，对扩散桥在模态翻译中的应用有重要推进。

papers.title: Phone2Act: A Low-Cost, Hardware-Agnostic Teleoperation System for Scalable VLA Data Collection
papers.abstract: Collecting diverse, high-quality manipulation data for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model training remains prohibitively expensive for many research groups, as existing teleoperation frameworks rely on specialized hardware or are tightly coupled to specific robot platforms. We present Phone2Act, a low-cost, hardware-agnostic teleoperation framework that transforms a commodity smartphone into a 6-DoF robot controller via Google ARCore. Built on a modular ROS 2 architecture, Phone2Act decouples control logic from hardware specifics through interchangeable bridge nodes, supporting platforms from industrial cobots to low-cost bimanual arms without code modification. A Universal Recorder synchronizes multi-camera RGB streams with robot state feedback and exports demonstrations natively in the LeRobot dataset format, eliminating post-processing and enabling immediate VLA fine-tuning. We validate the framework by fine-tuning GR00T-N1.5 on 130 collected episodes, achieving a 90% success rate on a real-world multi-stage pick-and-place task deployed on a physical Dobot CR5.

analysis.tldr: Phone2Act 将智能手机变为低成本、硬件无关的遥操作系统，用于高效收集 VLA 训练数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLA 模型训练数据收集依赖专用硬件或特定机器人平台，成本高昂且难以扩展，限制了研究可及性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种低成本、硬件无关的遥操作框架，以简化并规模化 VLA 数据收集流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用 Google ARCore 将智能手机转换为 6-DoF 控制器，基于模块化 ROS 2 架构，通过可互换桥接节点解耦控制逻辑与硬件，并集成通用记录器同步多摄像头 RGB 流与机器人状态，直接导出 LeRobot 格式数据。
contributions: 提出 Phone2Act，一种低成本、硬件无关的遥操作框架，仅需智能手机即可实现 6-DoF 控制。
设计模块化 ROS 2 架构和通用记录器，支持多种机器人平台并直接生成标准格式数据集，简化 VLA 微调流程。
analysis.experiments: 在 Dobot CR5 机器人上使用 130 个采集的 episodes 微调 GR00T-N1.5，在真实世界多阶段拾取放置任务中达到 90% 成功率。
limitations: 仅验证了单一机器人平台和任务，泛化性需更多实验。
依赖 ARCore 支持的智能手机，可能受限于手机传感器精度和网络延迟。

papers.title: PepSpecBench: A Unified Evaluation Benchmark for Peptide Tandem Mass Spectrometry Prediction
papers.abstract: Tandem mass spectrometry provides a high-throughput framework for identifying and quantifying proteins in complex biological samples. In computational proteomics, predicting peptide MS/MS spectra is a critical task, enabling downstream applications such as large-scale peptide identification and quantification. While deep learning architectures have substantially improved prediction accuracy, three evaluation challenges obscure the true progress of the field. First, inconsistent data preprocessing and incompatible model output spaces hinder fair model comparison. Second, flawed data splitting strategies can permit hidden sequence leakage and inflate reported performance. Third, existing evaluations typically lack comprehensive cross-species benchmarking and systematic assessment of model robustness to influential experimental conditions. To address these challenges, we propose PepSpecBench, a unified benchmark for peptide MS/MS spectrum prediction. PepSpecBench standardizes data preprocessing across complementary public datasets, enforces a strict backbone-disjoint splitting strategy to eliminate sequence leakage, and evaluates diverse architectures within a shared fragment-ion representation space. It further introduces a comprehensive multi-species evaluation suite and physically grounded metadata perturbation probes to assess model robustness and instrument awareness. We uncover previously unrecognized performance discrepancies and robustness limitations across six representative models, providing actionable insights for future model design, evaluation and practical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出PepSpecBench，一个统一基准，用于评估肽段串联质谱预测模型，解决数据预处理不一致、序列泄露和跨物种评估缺失问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 串联质谱法在蛋白质组学中广泛应用，但现有肽段MS/MS谱预测评估存在数据预处理不一致、数据划分导致序列泄露、缺乏跨物种基准和鲁棒性评估等问题，阻碍了领域真实进展。
analysis.problem: 肽段串联质谱预测模型的评估缺乏统一标准，导致公平比较困难、性能被高估，且对模型鲁棒性认识不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出数据划分策略不当会导致隐藏序列泄露并虚报性能，以及现有评估缺乏跨物种基准和系统鲁棒性测试。
analysis.method: 提出PepSpecBench统一基准，包括标准化数据预处理、严格的主干不相交数据划分策略、共享碎片离子表示空间、多物种评估套件和物理基础元数据扰动探针。
contributions: 提出PepSpecBench，一个统一的肽段MS/MS谱预测评估基准，标准化数据预处理和评估流程。
引入主干不相交数据划分策略，消除序列泄露，确保公平比较。
提供多物种评估和物理扰动探针，系统评估模型鲁棒性和仪器感知能力。
通过六个代表性模型揭示性能差异和鲁棒性局限，提供可操作的见解。
analysis.experiments: 在六个代表性模型上进行了评估，揭示了之前未被识别的性能差异和鲁棒性局限。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准可能依赖于特定公共数据集，泛化到其他类型质谱数据需验证。
物理扰动探针的设计可能未覆盖所有实际实验条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计系统，解决关键评估问题，但领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PepSpecBench，一个统一基准，用于评估肽段串联质谱预测模型，解决数据预处理不一致、序列泄露和跨物种评估缺失问题。

papers.title: ViM-Q: Scalable Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design for Vision Mamba Model Inference on FPGA
papers.abstract: Vision Mamba (ViM) models offer a compelling efficiency advantage over Transformers by leveraging the linear complexity of State Space Models (SSMs), yet efficiently deploying them on FPGAs remains challenging. Linear layers struggle with dynamic activation outliers that render static quantization ineffective, while uniform quantization fails to capture the weight distribution at low bit-widths. Furthermore, while associative scan accelerates SSMs on GPUs, its memory access patterns are misaligned with the streaming dataflow required by FPGAs. To address these challenges, we present ViM-Q, a scalable algorithm-hardware co-design for end-to-end ViM inference on the edge. We introduce a hardware-aware quantization scheme combining dynamic per-token activation quantization and per-channel smoothing to mitigate outliers, alongside a custom 4-bit per-block Additive Power-of-Two (APoT) weight quantization. The models are deployed on a runtime-parameterizable FPGA accelerator featuring a linear engine employing a Lookup-Table (LUT) unit to replace multiplications with shift-add operations, and a fine-grained pipelined SSM engine that parallelizes the state dimension while preserving sequential recurrence. Crucially, the hardware supports runtime configuration, adapting to diverse dimensions and input resolutions across the ViM family. Implemented on an AMD ZCU102 FPGA, ViM-Q achieves an average 4.96x speedup and 59.8x energy efficiency gain over a quantized NVIDIA RTX 3090 GPU baseline for low-batch inference on ViM-tiny. This co-design shows a viable path for deploying ViM models on resource-constrained edge devices.

analysis.tldr: ViM-Q通过算法-硬件协同设计，在FPGA上高效部署Vision Mamba模型，实现4.96倍加速和59.8倍能效提升。
analysis.research_motivation: Vision Mamba模型在FPGA上部署面临挑战：线性层存在动态激活异常值导致静态量化失效，低比特均匀量化无法捕捉权重分布，且关联扫描的内存访问模式与FPGA流式数据流不匹配。
analysis.problem: 如何通过算法-硬件协同设计，在FPGA上实现Vision Mamba模型的高效端到端推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出线性层存在动态激活异常值，静态量化效果差；均匀量化在低比特时无法捕捉权重分布；关联扫描在FPGA上存在内存访问模式不匹配问题。
analysis.method: 提出ViM-Q，包含硬件感知量化方案（动态每token激活量化+每通道平滑处理、4-bit每块APoT权重量化）和运行时参数化FPGA加速器（线性引擎使用LUT单元替代乘法为移位加操作，细粒度流水线SSM引擎并行化状态维度）。
contributions: 提出ViM-Q，首个针对Vision Mamba模型在FPGA上端到端推理的算法-硬件协同设计。
设计硬件感知量化方案，结合动态激活量化和APoT权重量化，有效处理异常值和权重分布。
实现运行时参数化FPGA加速器，支持ViM家族不同维度和输入分辨率。
analysis.experiments: 在AMD ZCU102 FPGA上实现，与量化后的NVIDIA RTX 3090 GPU基线相比，ViM-tiny低批量推理平均加速4.96倍，能效提升59.8倍。
limitations: 仅针对ViM-tiny模型进行实验，未验证更大模型（如ViM-base/large）的性能。
摘要未提及与其他FPGA部署方案（如基于Transformer的模型）的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 算法-硬件协同设计创新性强，实验效果显著，但应用场景较专（FPGA部署ViM），与主流VLM/LLM方向相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViM-Q通过算法-硬件协同设计，在FPGA上高效部署Vision Mamba模型，实现4.96倍加速和59.8倍能效提升。

papers.title: Exploring Data-Free LoRA Transferability for Video Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Video diffusion models leveraging step distillation or causal distillation have achieved remarkable performance. However, adapting existing LoRAs to these variants remains a critical challenge due to weight space mismatches. We observe that direct application leads to style degradation and structural collapse, yet the underlying mechanisms remain poorly understood. To fill this gap, we delve into the weight space and identify that the incompatibility stems from spectral interference within shared functional clusters defined over singular subspaces. Specifically, our analysis reveals that while both paradigms respect spectral rigidity, they establish conflicting routing pathways that clash through constructive overload or destructive cancellation. To address this issue, we propose Cluster-Aware Spectral Arbitration (CASA), a data-free framework that dynamically arbitrates between safeguarding the target's manifold and restoring LoRA alignment based on spectral density. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CASA effectively mitigates artifacts and revives LoRA functionality. Our code is available at https://github.com/Noahwangyuchen/CASA

analysis.tldr: 提出CASA框架，无需数据即可解决LoRA在蒸馏视频扩散模型间的权重空间不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频扩散模型通过蒸馏技术取得显著性能，但现有LoRA在不同蒸馏变体间因权重空间不匹配而无法直接迁移，导致风格退化和结构崩溃，且其机制尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 解决LoRA在蒸馏视频扩散模型变体间因权重空间不匹配导致的迁移失败问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出直接应用LoRA会导致风格退化和结构崩溃，并揭示不兼容性源于奇异子空间内共享功能簇的频谱干扰，即两种蒸馏范式虽都尊重频谱刚性，但建立了冲突的路由路径，通过构造性过载或破坏性抵消产生冲突。
analysis.method: 提出Cluster-Aware Spectral Arbitration (CASA)，一种无数据框架，基于频谱密度动态仲裁，在保护目标流形和恢复LoRA对齐之间进行权衡。
contributions: 揭示了LoRA在蒸馏视频扩散模型间不兼容的根源是奇异子空间内的频谱干扰。
提出CASA，一种无需训练数据的频谱仲裁方法，有效缓解伪影并恢复LoRA功能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的蒸馏视频扩散模型。
无数据方法可能在某些极端频谱干扰情况下效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，分析深入，但缺乏实验细节，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CASA框架，无需数据即可解决LoRA在蒸馏视频扩散模型间的权重空间不匹配问题。

papers.title: CADFS: A Big CAD Program Dataset and Framework for Computer-Aided Design with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: We introduce CADFS, a data-centric framework that enables large vision-language models to generate complex CAD design histories. Existing generative CAD systems are restricted to sketch-extrude operations due to simplified representations and limited datasets. We address this by introducing a FeatureScript-based representation and constructing a dataset of 450k real-world CAD models spanning 15 modeling operations. We obtain the dataset via a new pipeline that reconstructs clean, executable FeatureScript programs and provides multimodal annotations. Fine-tuning a VLM on this representation yields state-of-the-art results in text-conditioned CAD generation and image-based reconstruction, producing more accurate, diverse, and feature-rich designs than prior frameworks. Ablations show that each individual component of our framework, i.e., the FeatureScript representation, the extended operation set, and representation-aligned textual descriptions, significantly improves performance. Our framework substantially broadens the complexity and realism achievable in generative CAD. The CADFS framework and the new dataset are available at https://voyleg.github.io/cadfs/.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于FeatureScript的CAD数据集与框架，使VLM能生成包含15种建模操作的复杂CAD设计历史。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式CAD系统受限于简化表示和有限数据集，只能生成草图-拉伸操作，无法处理真实世界复杂设计。
analysis.problem: 如何让大语言模型生成包含多种建模操作的复杂CAD设计历史。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入FeatureScript表示，构建45万真实CAD模型数据集（含15种操作），通过新pipeline重建可执行程序并提供多模态标注，微调VLM。
contributions: 提出FeatureScript表示和包含15种建模操作的大规模CAD数据集CADFS
实现文本条件CAD生成和图像重建的SOTA结果，生成更准确、多样、特征丰富的设计
analysis.experiments: 在文本条件CAD生成和图像重建任务上取得SOTA，消融实验验证了FeatureScript表示、扩展操作集和文本描述各自的重要性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定FeatureScript语法，泛化性待验证
数据集规模虽大但可能仍存在长尾操作覆盖不足

analysis.reason: 方法创新（FeatureScript表示+大规模数据集）且实验充分，与VLM应用强相关，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于FeatureScript的CAD数据集与框架，使VLM能生成包含15种建模操作的复杂CAD设计历史。

papers.title: SimPB++: Simultaneously Detecting 2D and 3D Objects from Multiple Cameras
papers.abstract: Simultaneous perception of 2D objects in perspective view and 3D objects in Bird's Eye View (BEV) is challenging for multi-camera autonomous driving. Existing two-stage pipelines use 2D results only as a one-time cue for 3D detection. We propose SimPB++, which simultaneously detects 2D objects in perspective and 3D objects in BEV from multiple cameras. It unifies both tasks into an end-to-end model with a hybrid decoder architecture, coupling multi-view 2D and 3D decoders interactively. Two novel modules enable deep interaction: Dynamic Query Allocation adaptively assigns 2D queries to 3D candidates, and Adaptive Query Aggregation refines 3D representations using multi-view 2D features, forming a cyclic 3D-2D-3D refinement. For multi-view 2D detection, we use Query-group Attention for intra-group communication. We also design a Crop-and-Scale strategy for long-range perception and a Propagating Denoising strategy with an auxiliary RoI detector. SimPB++ supports mixed supervision with 2D-only and fully annotated data, reducing reliance on expensive 3D labels. Experiments show state-of-the-art performance on nuScenes for both tasks and strong long-range detection (up to 150m) on Argoverse2.

analysis.tldr: SimPB++ 提出端到端混合解码器架构，同时检测多摄像头视角下的 2D 和 3D 物体，实现循环 3D-2D-3D 优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 多摄像头自动驾驶中，同时感知透视视图的 2D 物体和鸟瞰图的 3D 物体具有挑战性，现有两阶段流水线仅将 2D 结果作为 3D 检测的一次性提示，缺乏深度交互。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个端到端模型中同时且交互地检测多摄像头视角下的 2D 和 3D 物体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SimPB++，包含混合解码器架构（多视角 2D 和 3D 解码器交互），动态查询分配（DQA）自适应分配 2D 查询给 3D 候选，自适应查询聚合（AQA）利用多视角 2D 特征细化 3D 表示，形成循环 3D-2D-3D 优化；多视角 2D 检测使用查询组注意力；还设计了裁剪缩放策略用于远距离感知，以及传播去噪策略和辅助 RoI 检测器。
contributions: 提出首个端到端同时检测多摄像头 2D 和 3D 物体的混合解码器架构。
设计动态查询分配和自适应查询聚合模块，实现循环 3D-2D-3D 交互优化。
支持混合监督（2D 标注和全标注数据），减少对昂贵 3D 标签的依赖。
analysis.experiments: 在 nuScenes 上两个任务均达到最先进性能，在 Argoverse2 上展示强远距离检测能力（最远 150m）。
limitations: 可能对极端视角或遮挡场景鲁棒性不足。

papers.title: A Language for Describing Agentic LLM Contexts
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly used within larger systems ("LLM agents"). These make a sequence of LLM calls, each call providing the LLM with a combination of instructions, observations, and interaction history. The design of the encoded information and its structure play a central role in the quality of the resulting system, leading to efforts spent on context engineering. It is therefore critical to communicate the composition of the LLM context in a system, and how it evolves over time. Yet, no standard exists for doing so: context construction is typically conveyed through informal prose, ad hoc diagrams, or direct inspection of code, none of which precisely capture how a prompt evolves across interaction steps or how two context representation strategies differ. To remedy this, we introduce the Agentic Context Description Language (ACDL), a language for specifying the structure and dynamics of LLM input contexts in a precise, readable, and standard manner, along with visualizations. ACDL provides constructs for specifying context aspects such as role message sequences, dynamic content, time-indexed references, and conditional or iterative structure, capturing the full architecture of a prompt independently of any particular implementation. ACDL diagrams can be hand drawn on a whiteboard, or written in formal language which can then be rendered. We describe the language, demonstrate it by documenting several existing systems and their variants, and encourage the community to adopt it for describing LLM systems context, both in day-to-day communication and in papers. Tooling, examples and documentation are available at www.acdlang.org.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种用于精确描述LLM Agent上下文的标准化语言ACDL，支持可视化与跨系统比较。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent系统中上下文构建缺乏标准描述方式，现有方法依赖非正式文本、临时图表或代码审查，难以精确表达提示词演化过程或不同策略差异。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一种精确、可读、标准化的语言来指定LLM输入上下文的结构和动态变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

通过多个现有系统及其变体的文档演示了ACDL的实用性。

papers.title: EAPFusion: Intrinsic Evolving Auxiliary Prior Guidance for Infrared and Visible Image Fusion
papers.abstract: Infrared-visible image fusion aims to create an information-rich fused image by integrating the complementary thermal saliency from infrared sensing and fine textures from visible imaging. Such accurate fusion is essential for real-world perception applications in complex scenes, including nighttime autonomous driving, search and rescue, and surveillance, and can further benefit downstream tasks such as semantic segmentation. However, most existing fusion methods rely upon static trained weights that cannot adapt to scene-specific content at inference time, and often suffer from a granularity mismatch when coarse auxiliary semantics are injected, which makes it difficult to simultaneously highlight targets and preserve details. In this work, we propose EAPFusion to address these issues by using self-evolving intrinsic priors instead of relying on external auxiliary models. Concretely, EAPFusion maintains a compact set of intrinsic priors and progressively updates them across scales. These evolved priors are utilized to dynamically generate convolutional kernels, shifting the paradigm from fixed, pre-trained filters to instance-adaptive parameters via prior-conditioned dynamic convolution. Furthermore, we design a channel-level fusion module that shuffles and interleaves infrared and visible channels, applying local channel mixing to boost cross-modal complementarity. Experiments on different datasets, including cross-dataset evaluation and semantic segmentation, show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art quantitative and qualitative fusion results, and consistently boosts downstream performance. Code is coming soon.

analysis.tldr: 提出EAPFusion，通过自演化内在先验和动态卷积实现红外与可见光图像的自适应融合。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有红外-可见光融合方法依赖静态训练权重，无法在推理时适应场景内容，且注入粗粒度辅助语义时存在粒度不匹配，难以同时突出目标和保留细节。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖外部辅助模型的情况下，实现推理时自适应、跨模态互补的红外-可见光图像融合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出静态权重无法适应场景特定内容，粗粒度辅助语义注入导致粒度不匹配。
analysis.method: 维护一组紧凑的内在先验，并在不同尺度上逐步更新；利用演化后的先验通过先验条件动态卷积生成实例自适应卷积核；设计通道级融合模块，交错红外和可见光通道并进行局部通道混合。
contributions: 提出自演化内在先验机制，替代外部辅助模型，实现推理时自适应融合。
设计先验条件动态卷积，将固定预训练滤波器转变为实例自适应参数。
提出通道级融合模块，通过交错和局部混合增强跨模态互补性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行跨数据集评估和语义分割下游任务，定量和定性结果均达到SOTA，并持续提升下游性能。
limitations: 内在先验的更新策略可能增加计算开销。
动态卷积的泛化性在极端场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强（自演化先验+动态卷积），实验充分且开源，与视觉理解方向相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EAPFusion，通过自演化内在先验和动态卷积实现红外与可见光图像的自适应融合。

papers.title: RefusalGuard: Geometry-Preserving Fine-Tuning for Safety in LLMs
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning safety-aligned language models for downstream tasks often leads to substantial degradation of refusal behavior, making models vulnerable to adversarial misuse. While prior work has shown that safety-relevant features are encoded in structured representations within the model's activation space, how these representations change during fine-tuning and why alignment degrades remains poorly understood. In this work, we investigate the representation-level mechanisms underlying alignment degradation. Our analysis shows that standard fine-tuning induces systematic drift in safety-relevant representations, distorts their geometric structure, and introduces interference between task optimization and safety features. These effects collectively lead to increased harmful compliance. Motivated by these findings, we introduce REFUSALGUARD, a representation-level fine-tuning framework that preserves safety-relevant structure during model adaptation. Our approach constrains updates in hidden representation space, ensuring that safety-mediating components remain stable while allowing task-specific learning in complementary directions. We evaluate REFUSALGUARD across multiple model families, including LLaMA, Gemma, and Qwen, on adversarial safety benchmarks such as AdvBench, DirectHarm4, and JailbreakBench, as well as downstream utility tasks. Our approach achieves attack success rates comparable to base safety-aligned models while maintaining competitive task performance, significantly outperforming baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出REFUSALGUARD，通过保持安全相关表征的几何结构来防止微调导致的安全对齐退化。
analysis.research_motivation: 微调安全对齐的LLM会严重破坏其拒绝行为，导致模型易受对抗性滥用，而现有方法对表征变化机制理解不足。
analysis.problem: 微调过程中安全相关表征的几何结构扭曲和任务优化与安全特征之间的干扰导致有害合规性增加。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准微调导致安全相关表征系统性漂移、几何结构扭曲，并引入任务优化与安全特征之间的干扰。
analysis.method: REFUSALGUARD：一种表征级微调框架，在隐藏表征空间中约束更新，保持安全中介组件稳定，同时允许在互补方向上进行任务特定学习。
contributions: 揭示了微调导致安全对齐退化的表征级机制（漂移、几何扭曲、干扰）。
提出了REFUSALGUARD框架，通过几何保持微调在多个模型上实现安全与任务性能的平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaMA、Gemma、Qwen等模型上，使用AdvBench、DirectHarm4、JailbreakBench等对抗安全基准以及下游任务评估，攻击成功率与基础安全对齐模型相当，任务性能有竞争力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定安全表征结构已知的模型。
未讨论对极端对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与安全对齐方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出REFUSALGUARD，通过保持安全相关表征的几何结构来防止微调导致的安全对齐退化。

papers.title: SurgCheck: Do Vision-Language Models Really Look at Images in Surgical VQA?
papers.abstract: Purpose: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown promising performance in surgical visual question answering (VQA). However, existing surgical VQA datasets often contain linguistic shortcuts, where question phrasing implicitly constrains the answer space. It remains unclear whether reported performance reflects visual understanding or reliance on such linguistic shortcuts. Methods: We introduce SurgCheck, a diagnostic benchmark for quantifying linguistic shortcut reliance in surgical VQA. SurgCheck employs a paired-question design in which each surgical frame is associated with an original question containing entity names and a less-biased counterpart that removes these names while preserving identical visual content and ground-truth answers. The resulting performance gap provides a diagnostic signal of shortcut reliance. To ensure that the less-biased question remains well-defined even without entity names, four grounding cues are incorporated: bounding box, arrow, spatial position, and periphrasis. We evaluate both general-purpose and surgical-specific VLMs under zero-shot and fine-tuned settings on SurgCheck. To evaluate open-ended zero-shot responses, we introduce an LLM-as-a-judge evaluation protocol. Results: Using SurgCheck, we observe consistent performance degradation on less-biased questions across five VLMs, despite identical visual inputs. Text-only ablation reveals minimal performance drops for action and target prediction, indicating that action and target prediction is largely driven by linguistic shortcuts rather than visual reasoning. Conclusion: SurgCheck provides a controlled diagnostic framework that exposes failure modes masked by linguistic bias in existing surgical VQA benchmarks. Our findings demonstrate that strong benchmark performance does not necessarily imply faithful visual understanding, underscoring the need for bias-aware evaluation in surgical VQA.

analysis.tldr: SurgCheck 诊断基准揭示手术 VLM 在 VQA 中依赖语言捷径而非视觉理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有手术 VQA 数据集存在语言捷径，模型可能依赖问题措辞而非视觉内容，导致性能虚高，需要诊断性基准来量化这种依赖。
analysis.problem: 量化手术 VQA 中视觉语言模型对语言捷径的依赖程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在 SurgCheck 上，五个 VLM 在去偏问题上的性能一致下降，且纯文本消融显示动作和目标预测的性能下降极小，表明这些预测主要由语言捷径驱动。
analysis.method: 提出 SurgCheck 诊断基准，采用配对问题设计（原始问题 vs 去偏问题），通过性能差距量化捷径依赖；去偏问题通过四种接地线索（边界框、箭头、空间位置、迂回表述）保持定义明确；使用 LLM-as-a-judge 评估开放零样本回答。
contributions: 提出 SurgCheck，首个用于量化手术 VQA 中语言捷径依赖的诊断基准。
通过实验揭示强基准性能不一定反映真实视觉理解，强调需要偏差感知评估。
analysis.experiments: 在 SurgCheck 上评估了五个 VLM（通用和手术专用），在零样本和微调设置下，观察到一致性能下降；纯文本消融显示动作和目标预测主要依赖语言捷径。
limitations: 可能仅针对手术 VQA 领域，泛化性需验证。
LLM-as-a-judge 评估协议可能引入额外偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 针对手术 VQA 中语言捷径问题提出诊断基准，方法新颖且实验揭示重要现象，与 VLM 评估高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SurgCheck 诊断基准揭示手术 VLM 在 VQA 中依赖语言捷径而非视觉理解。

papers.title: Stochastic Sparse Attention for Memory-Bound Inference
papers.abstract: Autoregressive decoding becomes bandwidth-limited at long contexts, as generating each token requires reading all $n_k$ key and value vectors from KV cache. We present Stochastic Additive No-mulT Attention (SANTA), a method that sparsifies value-cache access by sampling $S \ll n_k$ indices from the post-softmax distribution and aggregates only those value rows. This yields an unbiased estimator of the post-softmax value aggregation while replacing value-stage multiply-accumulates with gather-and-add. We introduce stratified sampling to design variance-reduced, GPU-friendly variants, demonstrating $1.5\times$ decode-step attention kernel speedup over FlashInfer and FlashDecoding on an NVIDIA RTX 6000 Ada while matching baseline accuracy at 32k-token contexts. Finally, we propose Bernoulli $qK^\mathsf{T}$ sampling as a complementary technique to sparsify the score stage, reducing key-feature access through stochastic ternary queries. Both methods are orthogonal to upstream techniques such as ternary quantization, low-rank projections, and KV-cache compression. Together, they point toward sparse, multiplier-free, and energy-efficient inference. We open-source our kernels at: https://github.com/OPUSLab/SANTA.git

analysis.tldr: 提出随机稀疏注意力机制SANTA，通过采样稀疏化KV缓存访问，实现1.5倍解码加速且精度不变。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归解码在长上下文时受限于带宽，因为每个token生成都需要读取所有KV向量，导致推理效率低下。
analysis.problem: 长上下文自回归推理中KV缓存访问成为带宽瓶颈，需要减少内存读取量而不牺牲模型精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SANTA方法，通过从softmax后分布中采样S个索引，仅聚合这些值行，实现无偏估计；并引入分层采样降低方差，以及Bernoulli qK^T采样稀疏化分数阶段。
contributions: 提出SANTA，一种随机稀疏注意力机制，通过采样稀疏化值缓存访问，实现无偏估计和加速。
引入分层采样和Bernoulli qK^T采样，分别降低方差和稀疏化分数阶段，与现有技术正交。
analysis.experiments: 在NVIDIA RTX 6000 Ada上，SANTA在32k token上下文中实现1.5倍解码步注意力核加速，且精度与基线匹配。
limitations: 可能对超长上下文（如128k以上）的加速效果未验证。
采样引入的随机性可能在某些任务中导致不稳定。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验验证有效，但摘要未提供广泛基准测试，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出随机稀疏注意力机制SANTA，通过采样稀疏化KV缓存访问，实现1.5倍解码加速且精度不变。

papers.title: PPO-Based Dynamic Positioning of HAPS-BS in Wind-Disturbed Stratospheric Maritime Networks
papers.abstract: High-Altitude Platform Stations (HAPS) offer a promising solution for wide-area wireless coverage in maritime regions lacking terrestrial infrastructure. However, maintaining reliable performance is challenging due to dynamic ship mobility and atmospheric disturbances, particularly stratospheric wind effects on HAPS positioning. This paper proposes a deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based framework for dynamic positioning of wind-disturbed HAPS-mounted base stations in maritime networks. A centralized DRL agent deployed on a coordinator HAPS controls multiple serving HAPS using radio measurements and network feedback, capturing realistic channel conditions and user mobility. A Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm is employed to learn robust positioning policies that enhance coverage stability and system throughput under wind disturbances. Simulation results show that the proposed approach effectively mitigates wind-induced positioning deviations while ensuring reliable wide-area connectivity for maritime users.

analysis.tldr: 利用PPO强化学习算法动态调整高空平台基站位置，以抵抗平流层风扰，提升海事网络覆盖稳定性与吞吐量。
analysis.research_motivation: 海事区域缺乏地面基础设施，高空平台站（HAPS）可提供广域无线覆盖，但动态船舶移动和大气扰动（尤其是平流层风）严重影响HAPS定位可靠性，现有方法难以应对。
analysis.problem: 如何在风扰环境下动态调整HAPS基站位置，以维持稳定的覆盖和系统吞吐量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于深度强化学习（DRL）的框架，在协调HAPS上部署集中式DRL智能体，利用无线测量和网络反馈控制多个服务HAPS，采用近端策略优化（PPO）算法学习鲁棒定位策略。
contributions: 提出一种基于DRL的HAPS动态定位框架，应对风扰和用户移动性。
采用PPO算法学习定位策略，仿真验证其能有效缓解风致定位偏差，保证广域连接。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。

analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning

papers.title: Behavior-Grounded Lane Representation Learning for Multi-Task Traffic Digital Twins
papers.abstract: Traffic digital twins are powerful tools for advanced traffic management, and most systems are built on static geometric representations. However, these representations fail to capture the dynamic functional semantics required for behavior-aware reasoning, such as how a lane operates under complex traffic conditions. To address this gap, we introduce GeoLaneRep, a behavior-grounded lane representation learning framework for traffic digital twins. GeoLaneRep jointly encodes static lane geometry, observed vehicle trajectories, and operational descriptors into a shared, cross-camera semantic embedding. The encoder is trained with a joint objective combining contrastive cross-camera alignment, auxiliary role supervision, and temporal anomaly detection. Across 16 roadside cameras and 132 lanes, the learned embeddings achieve a $0.004$ lateral-rank error and an edge-role F1 of $1.000$ in zero-shot cross-camera matching, and an AUROC of $0.991$ for window-level anomaly detection. We further show that the same behavioral embeddings can condition a diffusion-based generator to synthesize lane geometries that satisfy targeted operational specifications, with $87.9\%$ overall specification accuracy across 38 lane groups. GeoLaneRep thus provides a semantic interface between roadside observations and downstream digital twin tasks, supporting cross-camera transfer, behavior-aware monitoring, and goal-directed lane synthesis. The framework is openly available at https://github.com/raynbowy23/GeoLaneRep.

analysis.tldr: 提出行为驱动的车道表征学习框架GeoLaneRep，用于交通数字孪生中的多任务场景。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有交通数字孪生系统基于静态几何表示，无法捕获动态功能语义，难以支持行为感知推理。
analysis.problem: 如何学习融合静态几何、车辆轨迹和操作描述的行为驱动车道表征，以支持跨相机匹配、异常检测和车道合成等多任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GeoLaneRep框架联合编码车道几何、车辆轨迹和操作描述符到共享跨相机语义嵌入，使用对比跨相机对齐、辅助角色监督和时间异常检测的联合目标训练。
contributions: 提出行为驱动的车道表征学习框架GeoLaneRep，融合多模态信息。
在跨相机匹配、异常检测和车道合成任务上取得高性能。

limitations: 可能依赖高质量轨迹数据。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出行为驱动的车道表征学习框架GeoLaneRep，用于交通数字孪生中的多任务场景。

papers.title: Disentangling Intent from Role: Adversarial Self-Play for Persona-Invariant Safety Alignment
papers.abstract: The growing capabilities of large language models (LLMs) have driven their widespread deployment across diverse domains, even in potentially high-risk scenarios. Despite advances in safety alignment techniques, current models remain vulnerable to emerging persona-based jailbreak attacks. Existing research on persona-based jailbreak has primarily focused on attack iterations, yet it lacks systemic and mechanistic constraints on the defense side. To address this challenge, we propose Persona-Invariant Alignment (PIA), an adversarial self-play framework that achieves co-evolution through Persona Lineage Evolution (PLE) on the attack side and Persona-Invariant Consistency Learning (PICL) on the defense side. Theoretically, PICL is grounded in the structural separation hypothesis, using a unilateral KL-divergence constraint to enable the structural decoupling of safety decisions from persona context, thereby maintaining safe behavior under persona-based jailbreak attacks. Experimental results demonstrate that PLE efficiently explores high-risk persona spaces by leveraging lineage-based credit propagation. Meanwhile, the PICL defense method significantly reduces the Attack Success Rate (ASR) while preserving the model's general capability, thereby validating the superiority and robustness of this alignment paradigm. Codes are available at https://github.com/JiajiaLi-1130/PIA.

analysis.tldr: 提出对抗性自博弈框架PIA，通过解耦意图与角色实现角色不变的安全对齐，有效防御基于角色的越狱攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全对齐技术易受基于角色的越狱攻击，且缺乏系统性的防御机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种防御方法，使LLM在角色扮演场景下仍能保持安全行为，同时不损害通用能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于角色的越狱攻击利用角色上下文绕过安全限制，现有防御缺乏对角色与安全决策的结构性解耦。
analysis.method: 提出PIA框架，包含攻击端角色谱系进化（PLE）和防御端角色不变一致性学习（PICL），PICL基于结构分离假设，使用单侧KL散度约束实现安全决策与角色上下文的解耦。
contributions: 提出PIA对抗性自博弈框架，实现攻击与防御的协同进化。
提出PICL方法，基于结构分离假设实现安全决策与角色上下文的解耦。
实验证明PIA显著降低攻击成功率，同时保持模型通用能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估攻击成功率（ASR）和通用能力，验证了PIA的有效性和鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能对复杂角色场景的泛化性有限。
框架计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对LLM安全对齐中的角色越狱问题提出创新框架，方法有理论支撑且实验验证有效，与安全对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出对抗性自博弈框架PIA，通过解耦意图与角色实现角色不变的安全对齐，有效防御基于角色的越狱攻击。

papers.title: Multilingual Safety Alignment via Self-Distillation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit severe multilingual safety misalignment: they possess strong safeguards in high-resource languages but remain highly vulnerable to jailbreak attacks in low-resource languages. Current safety alignment methods generally rely on high-quality response data for each target language, which is expensive and difficult to generate. In this paper, we propose a cross-lingual safeguard transfer framework named Multilingual Self-Distillation (MSD). This framework transfers an LLM's inherent safety capabilities from high-resource (e.g., English) to low-resource (e.g., Javanese) languages, overcoming the need for response data in any language. Our framework is flexible and can be integrated with different self-distillation strategies. Specifically, we implement two concrete methods -- on-policy MSD and off-policy MSD -- both of which enable effective cross-lingual safety transfer using only multilingual queries. Furthermore, we propose Dual-Perspective Safety Weighting (DPSW), a divergence measure to optimize the distillation objective. By jointly considering the perspectives of both the teacher and the student, DPSW adaptively increases the penalty weights on safety-critical tokens while reducing the weights on non-critical tokens. Extensive experiments on representative LLMs across diverse multilingual jailbreak and utility benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently achieves superior multilingual safety performance. Notably, it generalizes effectively to more challenging datasets and unseen languages while preserving the model's general capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出多语言自蒸馏框架MSD，将LLM的安全能力从高资源语言迁移到低资源语言，无需目标语言响应数据。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在多语言场景下存在严重的安全对齐失衡：高资源语言防护强，低资源语言易受越狱攻击。现有方法依赖各语言的高质量响应数据，成本高且难以生成。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖目标语言响应数据的情况下，将LLM的安全能力从高资源语言有效迁移到低资源语言。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM的安全对齐存在语言不平衡：高资源语言（如英语）安全防护强，低资源语言（如爪哇语）易受越狱攻击。
analysis.method: 提出多语言自蒸馏（MSD）框架，包含on-policy MSD和off-policy MSD两种具体方法，以及双视角安全加权（DPSW）度量来优化蒸馏目标。
contributions: 提出MSD框架，实现跨语言安全能力迁移，无需目标语言响应数据。
设计DPSW度量，从教师和学生双视角自适应调整安全关键token的惩罚权重。
在多种LLM和多语言越狱/效用基准上验证了方法的有效性，并泛化到未见语言。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性LLM上进行了多语言越狱和效用基准测试，方法在安全性能上持续优于基线，并有效泛化到更具挑战性的数据集和未见语言，同时保持模型通用能力。
limitations: 可能对极低资源语言（如几乎没有训练数据的语言）效果有限。
DPSW的计算开销可能略高于简单蒸馏。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对多语言安全对齐有重要应用价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多语言自蒸馏框架MSD，将LLM的安全能力从高资源语言迁移到低资源语言，无需目标语言响应数据。

papers.title: Divide and Conquer: Decoupled Representation Alignment for Multimodal World Models
papers.abstract: Emerging multi-modal world models attempt to jointly generate videos across diverse modalities (e.g., RGB, depth, and mask), yet they fail to fully exploit the rich priors of existing foundation models. We propose $M^2$-REPA, the first representation alignment method tailored for multi-modal video generation. Our key insight is that foundation models trained on different modality spaces naturally capture distinct domain-specific priors, acting as complementary "experts." Specifically, we first decouple modality-specific features from the diffusion model's intermediate representations, then align each with its corresponding expert foundation model. To this end, we design two synergistic objectives: a multi-modal representation alignment loss that enforces feature-to-expert matching, and a modality-specific decoupling regularization that encourages complementarity across different modalities. This design enables joint optimization, fully exploiting priors from multiple foundation models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms baselines in visual quality and long-term consistency.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态表示对齐方法M²-REPA，通过解耦和对齐不同模态的专家先验提升多模态视频生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基础模型在不同模态空间上训练，捕获了互补的领域特定先验，但多模态世界模型未能充分利用这些先验。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用多个基础模型的先验知识来提升多模态视频生成的质量和一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出M²-REPA方法，包括多模态表示对齐损失和模态特定解耦正则化，先解耦扩散模型中间表示中的模态特定特征，再与对应的专家基础模型对齐。
contributions: 首次提出针对多模态视频生成的表示对齐方法M²-REPA。
设计解耦对齐框架，利用多个基础模型的互补先验。
analysis.experiments: 在视觉质量和长期一致性上显著优于基线，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖多个基础模型，计算开销较大。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态表示对齐方法M²-REPA，通过解耦和对齐不同模态的专家先验提升多模态视频生成质量。

papers.title: CyberAId: AI-Driven Cybersecurity for Financial Service Providers
papers.abstract: European financial institutions face mounting regulatory pressure while their security operations centres remain constrained not by data or staffing but by reasoning capacity: enterprise SIEMs cover only a fraction of MITRE ATT&CK techniques, two thirds of SOC teams cannot keep pace with alert volumes, and the majority of breaches are preceded by alerts that are generated but never investigated. Frontier large language models now achieve state-of-the-art results on isolated cybersecurity tasks (one-day vulnerability exploitation, code-level patching, intrusion detection) yet no narrow win constitutes a platform that can compose across functions, persist multi-tenant state, map findings to regulatory regimes and survive an audit. This position paper argues that the right unit of construction is a hybrid multi-agent system in which specialised LLM subagents reason over classical SIEM/XDR telemetry rather than replacing it, share accumulated agent state across institutions through privacy-preserving federation, and can connect to complementary capability packs such as quantum-based authentication, digital twins for adversarial validation, and eBPF-based kernel telemetry. We present CyberAId, a model-agnostic, on-premise-deployable platform in which a Main Agent coordination layer, a Reporting capability, and specialist subagents operate within a shared runtime under bounded human-in-the-loop autonomy, organised around four falsifiable design principles, and aligned with relevant regulations. CyberAId will be validated at four representative financial use cases (client impersonation, anti-money-laundering for payment service providers, retail-banking incident response, and high-frequency-trading resilience) and propose skill-based agent adaptation as the most promising research direction for turning each deployment into a contribution to a continuously refined collective defence.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个混合多智能体网络安全平台CyberAId，通过LLM子代理增强传统SIEM，应对金融监管压力与SOC推理瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 金融机构面临监管压力，但SOC受限于推理能力而非数据或人员：企业SIEM仅覆盖部分MITRE ATT&CK技术，三分之二的SOC团队无法跟上告警量，多数漏洞发生前已有告警但未被调查。现有LLM在孤立任务上表现优异，但缺乏跨功能组合、多租户状态持久化、监管映射和审计能力的平台。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可组合、可审计、隐私保护的多智能体网络安全平台，以增强而非替代传统SIEM/XDR遥测，并适应金融监管要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出企业SIEM覆盖不全、SOC告警过载、多数漏洞前有未调查告警，以及现有LLM在孤立任务上SOTA但缺乏平台级能力。
analysis.method: 提出CyberAId，一个模型无关、可本地部署的混合多智能体平台，包含主代理协调层、报告能力和专业子代理，在有限人机回环自主性下运行，围绕四个可证伪设计原则构建，并符合相关法规。
contributions: 提出混合多智能体系统架构，LLM子代理推理传统SIEM/XDR遥测而非替代，通过隐私保护联邦跨机构共享状态。
提出基于技能的自适应代理作为研究方向，将每次部署转化为持续改进集体防御的贡献。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明将在四个代表性金融用例（客户冒充、支付服务反洗钱、零售银行事件响应、高频交易韧性）中验证。
limitations: 平台尚未完成验证，仅提出设计原则和计划。
依赖LLM的推理能力，可能面临幻觉和可解释性挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出有前景的混合多智能体架构，但尚未实验验证，适合关注安全对齐和金融应用的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个混合多智能体网络安全平台CyberAId，通过LLM子代理增强传统SIEM，应对金融监管压力与SOC推理瓶颈。

papers.title: AFFormer: Adaptive Feature Fusion Transformer for V2X Cooperative Perception under Channel Impairments
papers.abstract: Accurate 3D object detection is essential for ensuring the safety of autonomous vehicles. Cooperative perception, which leverages vehicle-to-everything (V2X) communication to share perceptual data, enhances detection but is vulnerable to channel impairments, such as noise, fading, and interference. To strengthen the reliability of intelligent transportation systems, this work improves the robustness of V2X cooperative perception under communication conditions that reflect common channel impairments. This paper proposes an Adaptive Feature Fusion Transformer (AFFormer), a Transformer-based framework that mitigates the adverse effects of corrupted features by modeling temporal, inter-agent, and spatial correlations. AFFormer introduces three key modules: Multi-Agent and Temporal Aggregation for context-aware fusion across agents and over time, Dual Spatial Attention for efficient modeling of spatial dependencies, and Uncertainty-Guided Fusion for entropy-driven refinement of fused features. A teacher-student knowledge distillation strategy further enhances robustness by aligning fused features with reliable early-collaboration supervision. AFFormer is validated on the V2XSet and DAIR-V2X datasets, where it consistently outperforms existing methods under both ideal and impaired communication conditions, demonstrating improved robustness to communication-induced feature degradation while maintaining a competitive efficiency-accuracy trade-off.

analysis.tldr: 提出AFFormer，一种基于Transformer的V2X协同感知框架，通过多智能体时序聚合、双空间注意力和不确定性引导融合，提升信道受损下的3D检测鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: V2X协同感知依赖通信共享数据，但信道损伤（噪声、衰落、干扰）会破坏特征质量，威胁自动驾驶安全，现有方法缺乏对此类退化的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 在信道受损条件下，如何通过特征融合增强V2X协同感知的鲁棒性，同时保持效率与精度的平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 信道损伤导致协同感知中的特征退化，降低3D检测精度；现有融合方法未充分建模时序、智能体间和空间相关性来对抗这种退化。
analysis.method: 提出AFFormer，包含三个核心模块：多智能体与时序聚合（跨智能体和时间进行上下文感知融合）、双空间注意力（高效建模空间依赖）、不确定性引导融合（基于熵的精炼）；并采用教师-学生知识蒸馏对齐融合特征与可靠早期协作监督。
contributions: 提出AFFormer，首个针对信道损伤的Transformer协同感知框架，融合时序、智能体间和空间信息。
设计不确定性引导融合模块，利用熵驱动特征精炼提升鲁棒性。
引入教师-学生知识蒸馏策略，增强融合特征对通信退化的鲁棒性。
在V2XSet和DAIR-V2X上验证，在理想和受损通信条件下均优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在V2XSet和DAIR-V2X数据集上评估，在理想和受损通信条件下均优于现有方法，展示了鲁棒性和效率-精度权衡。
limitations: 可能依赖特定通信损伤模型，泛化到未知损伤类型需验证。
知识蒸馏增加训练复杂度，实时部署可能需优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，针对实际通信退化问题，实验充分，与自动驾驶安全强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AFFormer，一种基于Transformer的V2X协同感知框架，通过多智能体时序聚合、双空间注意力和不确定性引导融合，提升信道受损下的3D检测鲁棒性。

papers.title: Chart-FR1: Visual Focus-Driven Fine-Grained Reasoning on Dense Charts
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown considerable potential in chart understanding and reasoning tasks. However, they still struggle with high information density (HID) charts characterized by multiple subplots, legends, and dense annotations due to three major challenges: (1) limited fine-grained perception results in the omission of critical visual cues; (2) redundant or noisy visual information undermines the performance of multimodal reasoning; (3) lack of adaptive deep reasoning relative to the amount of visual information. To tackle these challenges, we present a novel focus-driven fine-grained chart reasoning model, Chart-FR1, to improve perception, focusing efficiency, and adaptive deep reasoning on HID charts. Specifically, we propose Focus-CoT, a visual focusing chain-of-thought that enhances fine-grained perception by explicitly linking reasoning steps to key visual cues, such as local image regions and OCR signals. Building on this, we introduce Focus-GRPO, a focus-driven reinforcement learning algorithm with an information-efficiency reward that compresses redundant visual information for efficient focusing, and an adaptive KL penalty mechanism that enables flexible control over reasoning depth as more visual cues are discovered. Furthermore, to fill the gap in benchmarks for HID charts, we build HID-Chart, a challenging benchmark with an information-density metric designed to evaluate fine-grained chart reasoning capabilities. Extensive experiments on multiple chart benchmarks demonstrate that Chart-FR1 outperforms state-of-the-art MLLMs in chart understanding and reasoning. Code is available at https://github.com/phkhub/Chart-FR1.

analysis.tldr: 提出Chart-FR1模型，通过视觉聚焦链式推理和强化学习解决高密度图表中的细粒度推理问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在处理高信息密度图表时，因细粒度感知不足、视觉信息冗余和缺乏自适应深度推理而表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 提升MLLM在高信息密度图表上的细粒度感知、聚焦效率和自适应深度推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出高密度图表中多子图、图例和密集标注导致MLLM遗漏关键视觉线索，冗余信息干扰推理，且推理深度无法随视觉信息量自适应调整。
analysis.method: 提出Focus-CoT（视觉聚焦思维链）将推理步骤与关键视觉线索显式关联；Focus-GRPO（聚焦驱动强化学习）通过信息效率奖励压缩冗余信息，并引入自适应KL惩罚控制推理深度；构建HID-Chart基准。
contributions: 提出Focus-CoT增强细粒度感知，将推理步骤与局部图像区域和OCR信号显式链接。
提出Focus-GRPO算法，通过信息效率奖励和自适应KL惩罚实现高效聚焦和自适应推理深度。
构建HID-Chart基准，包含信息密度指标，填补高密度图表评估空白。
analysis.experiments: 在多个图表基准上实验，Chart-FR1优于现有MLLM。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅针对图表领域，泛化性未知。
自适应KL惩罚机制可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（Focus-CoT+Focus-GRPO），针对高密度图表痛点，实验验证有效，但未提供具体数值，影响略保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Chart-FR1模型，通过视觉聚焦链式推理和强化学习解决高密度图表中的细粒度推理问题。

papers.title: Sheaf-Theoretic Planning: A Categorical Foundation for Resilient Multi-Agent Autonomous Systems
papers.abstract: The challenge of engineering autonomous agents capable of navigating the stochastic and adversarial nature of the physical world has historically resided at the intersection of symbolic logic and control theory. Traditional multi-agent system (MAS) frameworks have relied heavily on monolithic logical models -- primarily variations of the event calculus and situation calculus -- to represent action, change, and temporal persistence. While these classical systems provide robust solutions to the frame problem through mechanisms like circumscription and successor state axioms, they are inherently limited by a closed-world assumption that fails in the face of unobserved agent interventions, plan interruptions, and divergent belief-reality states. The paradigm of Sheaf-Theoretic Planning (STP) emerges as a transformative alternative, grounding the problem of multi-agent coordination under the mathematical structures of topos theory and sheaf semantics. This report provides an exhaustive analysis, justification, and extension of the STP framework, exploring its categorical foundations, implementation feasibility, and role in the future of resilient autonomous systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出层论规划（STP）框架，用范畴论和层语义为多智能体系统提供弹性协调的数学基础。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统多智能体系统依赖封闭世界假设的符号逻辑模型，无法应对未观测的智能体干预、计划中断和信念-现实状态分歧，亟需一种更具弹性的形式化基础。
analysis.problem: 如何为多智能体自主系统设计一种能够处理随机性和对抗性、支持弹性协调的规划框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统逻辑模型（如事件演算、情境演算）在开放世界中因封闭世界假设而失败，表现为无法处理未观测干预、计划中断和信念-现实分歧。
analysis.method: 提出层论规划（STP）框架，基于拓扑斯理论和层语义的范畴论基础，将多智能体协调问题形式化。
contributions: 提出STP框架作为传统符号逻辑的替代方案，提供弹性多智能体协调的数学基础。
对STP的范畴论基础、实现可行性和在弹性自主系统中的作用进行了详尽分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架的理论性较强，实际实现和验证可能面临挑战。
摘要未讨论计算复杂度和可扩展性问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 理论创新性强，但缺乏实验验证，适合对形式化方法感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层论规划（STP）框架，用范畴论和层语义为多智能体系统提供弹性协调的数学基础。

papers.title: Decompose to Understand, Fuse to Detect: Frequency-Decoupled Anomaly Detection for Encrypted Network Traffic
papers.abstract: Network traffic anomaly detection represents a critical cybersecurity task, yet widespread encryption makes this task increasingly challenging. In response, image-based methods that model traffic as visual patterns have emerged as the dominant approach. However, this work pioneers the identification of a pervasive ``full-frequency'' characteristic and an associated limitation termed ``spectral mismatch'' within this paradigm. Specifically, while encrypted traffic exhibits prominent high-frequency components, mainstream reconstruction methods demonstrate an inherent bias toward learning low-frequency information. This fundamental mismatch results in incomplete representations that consequently degrade anomaly detection performance. To address this challenge, we propose FreeUp, a novel frequency-decoupled framework designed explicitly for encrypted traffic analysis. FreeUp decomposes traffic data into distinct low- and high-frequency bands, processing them through separate, dedicated branches along with a customized training strategy that ensures stable and independent frequency-specific learning. Furthermore, recognizing that simple reconstruction error proves inadequate for evaluating dual-branch architectures, we introduce an uncertainty-inspired fusion scoring mechanism. This mechanism quantifies the reconstruction uncertainty of the frequency-specific branches and dynamically integrates their outputs, yielding a more comprehensive and reliable anomaly score. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that FreeUp consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/ikun0124/FreeUp.

analysis.tldr: 提出频率解耦框架FreeUp，解决加密流量异常检测中图像方法的频谱失配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 加密网络流量使传统异常检测困难，图像化方法虽主流但存在对高频信息学习不足的固有缺陷。
analysis.problem: 现有图像化重建方法在加密流量异常检测中存在频谱失配，即偏向低频而忽略高频，导致表征不完整、检测性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现加密流量具有全频率特性，尤其高频成分显著，但主流重建方法天然偏向低频学习，造成频谱失配。
analysis.method: 提出FreeUp框架，将流量数据分解为低频和高频带，通过独立分支和定制训练策略分别学习，并设计不确定性启发的融合评分机制整合双分支输出。
contributions: 首次识别并形式化加密流量异常检测中的频谱失配问题。
提出频率解耦框架FreeUp，包含双分支结构和不确定性融合评分机制。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上实验，FreeUp持续优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定频率分解方法，泛化性需验证。
双分支架构增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且针对性强，实验充分，但属于网络安全应用，与核心方向关联中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频率解耦框架FreeUp，解决加密流量异常检测中图像方法的频谱失配问题。

papers.title: BadmintonGRF: A Multimodal Dataset and Benchmark for Markerless Ground Reaction Force Estimation in Badminton
papers.abstract: Multimodal resources for non-periodic court sports with laboratory-grade sensing remain scarce: few publicly pair instrumented ground reaction force (GRF) with high-frame-rate multi-view video, limiting markerless load estimation in realistic training settings. BadmintonGRF records eight synchronized RGB views at ~120 FPS, four Kistler force plates, and Vicon motion capture (C3D) without hardware genlock across modalities; alignment combines human-verified events, automated quality assurance, and per-camera time offsets with uncertainty metadata. Tier 1 distributes pose, time-aligned GRF, metadata, and splits under CC BY-NC 4.0, enabling the primary benchmark without raw RGB or C3D; we report a Tier 1 task that maps 2D pose to GRF. Tier 2 provides raw RGB and C3D under controlled access for studies that require appearance or full kinematics. The public release contains 17,425 impact-segment archives in the 10-subject benchmark tree (156 instrumented trials; raw multi-view RGB alone exceeds 1 TB); benchmark loader gates retain 12,867 view-specific instances and 1,732 unique impacts after multi-view deduplication. We are not aware of prior public badminton corpora that combine this sensing layout with audited video--GRF alignment for impact-centric GRF estimation. We distribute preprocessing code, leave-one-subject-out splits, ten reference baselines, and optional late fusion (one deterministic test-time pass per instance; no test-time augmentation), with a within-trial diagnostic in the supplementary material.

analysis.tldr: 首个结合多视角视频与测力台的羽毛球GRF数据集，支持无标记地面反作用力估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 非周期性球类运动缺乏实验室级多模态数据，限制了无标记负荷估计在真实训练场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 缺少公开的、同步多视角视频与地面反作用力（GRF）数据集，用于羽毛球等非周期性运动的无标记GRF估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建BadmintonGRF数据集，包含8个同步RGB视角（~120 FPS）、4块Kistler测力台和Vicon动捕，通过人工验证事件、自动质量保证和每相机时间偏移元数据实现跨模态对齐；提供Tier 1（2D姿态到GRF映射）和Tier 2（原始RGB和C3D）两种访问级别。
contributions: 首个公开的羽毛球多模态数据集，包含高帧率多视角视频、测力台和动捕数据。
提供基准任务（2D姿态到GRF映射）、预处理代码、留一被试划分和十个参考基线。

limitations: 数据仅包含10名受试者，规模有限。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个结合多视角视频与测力台的羽毛球GRF数据集，支持无标记地面反作用力估计。

papers.title: Leveraging Data Symmetries to Select an Optimal Subset of Training Data under Label Noise
papers.abstract: The performance of machine learning models often relies on large labeled datasets; however, data collected from diverse sources can contain label noise. Recent work has shown that, in noisy settings, there may exist a subset of the training data on which models can achieve performance comparable to training on a noise-free dataset. A widely used method for identifying such subsets is cutstats, which employs k-nearest neighbors (k-NN) to detect low-noise samples. However, its performance on high-dimensional data remains largely unexplored. In this work, we formally establish that the performance of a classifier trained on a subset of a noisy dataset selected via cutstats is influenced by the accuracy of k-NN. We further demonstrate that, in noisy environments, exploiting data invariance and knowledge of underlying symmetries can significantly enhance the performance of k-NN, bringing it closer to the Bayes optimal classifier even in high-dimensional regimes. Finally, we show that for real-world scenarios, where information about the underlying invariance is only partially known, learnt invariant representations can still facilitate the identification of near-optimal subsets.

analysis.tldr: 利用数据对称性提升k-NN在标签噪声下选择最优训练子集的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模标注数据常含标签噪声，而现有方法cutstats在高维数据上性能未知，亟需改进。
analysis.problem: 如何在标签噪声环境下，利用数据对称性提升k-NN准确率，从而选择接近无噪声性能的训练子集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出cutstats选择的子集性能受k-NN准确率影响，且噪声环境下数据对称性可显著提升k-NN性能。
analysis.method: 利用数据不变性和已知对称性增强k-NN，使其在高维噪声环境中接近贝叶斯最优分类器；当对称性部分已知时，使用学习到的不变表示。
contributions: 形式化建立了cutstats子集性能与k-NN准确率的关系。
证明噪声环境下利用数据对称性可显著提升k-NN性能。
展示在真实场景中，部分已知对称性下学习的不变表示仍能帮助识别近最优子集。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖对称性先验知识，未知对称性时效果可能受限。
仅理论分析，缺乏大规模实验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法有理论创新但缺乏实验验证，与重点方向相关性一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用数据对称性提升k-NN在标签噪声下选择最优训练子集的性能。

papers.title: Evolving Token Communication with Parametric Memory Network
papers.abstract: Token communication has emerged as a promising framework for efficient wireless transmission by representing source data as compact semantic tokens. However, transmitting full semantic tokens still incurs considerable communication overhead. In this paper, we propose an evolving semantic token communication system with a parametric memory network over MIMO fading channels. Specifically, only an equal-length prefix of each semantic token is transmitted, which reduces transmission cost while preserving a consistent token structure for receiver-side recovery. At the receiver, a parametric memory network is introduced to reconstruct the missing suffix information from the received token prefixes, where semantic memory is stored implicitly in the network parameters. To realize this design, full semantic tokens are first organized into a codebook, and truncated tokens are paired with the codeword labels of their corresponding full tokens. Based on these token-label pairs, kNN-based teacher distributions are constructed to fine-tune a pretrained GPT-2-based recovery module, which learns to infer the codeword distribution of each incomplete token and recover the corresponding complete semantic token. In addition, an online evolution strategy is developed to periodically update the parametric memory network and the entire system using newly observed test samples, thereby improving adaptability under distribution shifts. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms the existing evolving memory benchmark under different channel conditions and channel bandwidth ratios, with up to 1.09 dB PSNR improvement.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于参数化记忆网络的演进式语义令牌通信系统，通过仅传输令牌前缀并利用kNN引导的GPT-2恢复模块重建完整令牌，在MIMO衰落信道上实现高效通信。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语义令牌通信需传输完整令牌，导致通信开销大；且信道环境变化时系统适应性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在MIMO衰落信道上减少语义令牌传输开销，同时保证接收端能准确恢复完整语义信息并适应分布偏移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

contributions: 提出仅传输令牌前缀的通信方案，降低开销并保持令牌结构一致性。
设计基于参数化记忆网络和kNN教师分布的恢复模块，有效重建缺失语义。
引入在线演化策略提升系统对信道分布偏移的适应性。

limitations: 可能依赖预训练GPT-2模型，计算资源需求较高。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
