papers.title: ShiftLIF: Efficient Multi-Level Spiking Neurons with Power-of-Two Quantization
papers.abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are promising for edge sensing due to their event-driven computation and temporal filtering capability. However, standard leaky integrate-and-fire (LIF) neurons communicate only through binary spikes, which severely limit representational capacity. Existing multi-level spiking neurons improve information transmission, but often rely on uniform quantization that mismatches membrane-potential distributions or introduces costly synaptic multiplications. In this paper, we propose ShiftLIF, a multi-level spiking neuron that maps membrane potentials to a logarithmically spaced power-of-two spike set. This design provides finer representation in the small-amplitude regime, where membrane potentials are densely concentrated, while enabling multiplier-free synaptic computation through bit-shift and accumulation operations. As a result, ShiftLIF improves spike-level expressiveness without sacrificing the hardware-friendly nature of standard SNN computation. We evaluate ShiftLIF on 10 datasets spanning wireless, acoustic, motion, and visual sensing tasks. Results show that ShiftLIF consistently matches or exceeds the accuracy of existing multi-level spiking neurons while maintaining synaptic energy consumption close to standard binary LIF. These results indicate that ShiftLIF provides a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off for cross-modal edge sensing.

analysis.tldr: ShiftLIF 通过幂次量化实现多级脉冲神经元，在保持硬件友好性的同时提升表征能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准 LIF 神经元仅输出二进制脉冲，限制了表征能力；现有多级脉冲神经元存在量化与膜电位分布不匹配或引入昂贵乘法运算的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种多级脉冲神经元，既能提升信息传输效率，又保持脉冲神经网络（SNN）的硬件友好计算特性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 膜电位在小幅度区域密集分布，对数间隔的幂次量化能提供更精细的表征。
analysis.method: 提出 ShiftLIF 神经元，将膜电位映射到对数间隔的幂次脉冲集，通过移位和累加操作实现无乘法器的突触计算。
contributions: 提出 ShiftLIF 多级脉冲神经元，利用幂次量化提升小幅度区域的表征精度。
实现无乘法器的突触计算，保持与标准二进制 LIF 相近的能耗。
analysis.experiments: 在无线、声学、运动和视觉感知等 10 个数据集上评估，ShiftLIF 在精度上匹配或超越现有方法，且能耗接近二进制 LIF。
limitations: 可能仅适用于膜电位分布偏斜的场景。
未在更大规模网络或任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验规模有限，适合关注 SNN 效率优化的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ShiftLIF 通过幂次量化实现多级脉冲神经元，在保持硬件友好性的同时提升表征能力。

papers.title: Quality-Aware Exploration Budget Allocation for Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) requires agents to discover joint strategies in a combinatorially large state-action space, yet effective coordination configurations are exceedingly rare. Intrinsic motivation, which augments task rewards with novelty bonuses, is a popular approach for driving exploration, but its effectiveness hinges on the exploration intensity $β$, where too large a value overwhelms the task signal and causes coordination collapse, while too small a value prevents discovery of rare strategies. We address two complementary challenges: adapting $β$ globally over training, and allocating the exploration budget across agents whose intrinsic reward signals vary in reliability. Our framework combines a return-conditioned sigmoid schedule (RCB) for global intensity control with a per-agent Reward Signal Quality (RSQ) metric that concentrates the exploration budget on agents with reliable signals. The core insight is that agents receiving noisy intrinsic rewards should explore less aggressively, and this allocation can be determined automatically from signal-to-noise statistics. Successor Distance (SD), a quasimetric intrinsic reward, naturally produces distinguishable per-agent signal quality, completing the framework with convergence and ordering preservation guarantees. On seven cooperative benchmarks (MPE, SMAX, MABrax), our method achieves top-tier returns across all environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种质量感知的探索预算分配方法，通过全局强度调度和个体信号质量度量提升多智能体协作探索效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 合作多智能体强化学习需要智能体在组合巨大的状态-动作空间中探索，但有效协调配置极为稀少。内在动机通过新奇奖励驱动探索，但探索强度β的全局设置难以平衡任务信号与探索信号，过大导致协调崩溃，过小则无法发现稀有策略。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应调整全局探索强度β，并在各智能体间分配探索预算，使得内在奖励信号不可靠的智能体减少探索，而信号可靠的智能体获得更多探索资源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 探索强度β过大时任务信号被淹没导致协调崩溃，过小时无法发现稀有策略；不同智能体的内在奖励信号质量存在差异，需要差异化分配探索预算。
analysis.method: 提出返回条件化Sigmoid调度（RCB）用于全局强度控制，以及每智能体奖励信号质量（RSQ）度量用于集中探索预算于信号可靠的智能体。利用后继距离（SD）作为内在奖励，自然产生可区分的个体信号质量，并提供收敛性和顺序保持保证。
contributions: 提出返回条件化Sigmoid调度（RCB）实现全局探索强度的自适应调整
提出奖励信号质量（RSQ）度量，自动根据信噪比分配探索预算
将后继距离（SD）作为内在奖励，提供可区分的信号质量及理论保证
在MPE、SMAX、MABrax等七个合作基准上达到顶级性能
analysis.experiments: 在MPE、SMAX、MABrax七个合作基准上评估，方法在所有环境中均达到顶级回报。
limitations: 可能依赖后继距离（SD）作为内在奖励，其计算开销或适用性需进一步验证
未讨论在非平稳或大规模环境中的扩展性
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论保证完整，实验充分，与多智能体探索方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种质量感知的探索预算分配方法，通过全局强度调度和个体信号质量度量提升多智能体协作探索效率。

papers.title: Decouple and Cache: KV Cache Construction for Streaming Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Streaming video understanding requires processing unbounded video streams with limited memory and computation, posing two key challenges. First, continuously constructing new and evicting old key-value(KV) caches is required for unbounded streams. Secondly, due to the high cost of collecting and training on unbounded streams, models must learn from short sequences while generalizing to long streams. Existing streaming VideoVLLMs fail to scale to unbounded video streams or focus on cache reuse strategies, leaving the impact of cache construction underexplored. In this paper, we propose Decoupled Streaming Cache(DSCache), a training-free cache construction mechanism that adapts pretrained offline models to streaming settings. DSCache maintains a cumulative past KV cache while constructing a separate instant cache on-demand, decoupled from past caches to preserve the informativeness of recent inputs. To enable position extrapolation beyond the training length, DSCache further incorporates a position-agnostic encoding strategy, ensuring KV caches to support unseen positions and preventing position overflow. Experiments on Streaming Video QA benchmarks demonstrate DSCache's state-of-the-art performance, with an average 2.5% accuracy gains over prior methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的DSCache机制，通过解耦累积缓存与即时缓存并引入位置无关编码，实现流式视频理解中KV缓存的高效构建与长序列泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式视频理解需处理无限视频流，但现有方法难以扩展至无限流或仅关注缓存复用策略，忽略了缓存构建对性能的影响；同时模型需从短序列学习并泛化至长流，训练成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，为流式视频理解模型构建高效的KV缓存，使其能处理无限视频流并支持超出训练长度的位置外推。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Decoupled Streaming Cache (DSCache)，包含两个核心：1) 解耦缓存：维护累积的过去KV缓存，同时按需构建独立的即时缓存，与过去缓存解耦以保留近期输入信息；2) 位置无关编码：采用位置无关策略使KV缓存支持未见位置，防止位置溢出。
contributions: 提出DSCache，一种无需训练的缓存构建机制，使预训练离线模型适应流式设置。
引入位置无关编码策略，支持超出训练长度的位置外推。
在流式视频QA基准上取得SOTA，平均准确率提升2.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在Streaming Video QA基准上评估，与先前方法相比平均准确率提升2.5%。
limitations: 仅针对流式视频理解场景，可能不直接适用于其他模态的流式任务。
未讨论缓存大小对性能的影响或内存开销的详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（解耦缓存+位置无关编码），实验显示有效，但摘要未提供详细实验设置和消融，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的DSCache机制，通过解耦累积缓存与即时缓存并引入位置无关编码，实现流式视频理解中KV缓存的高效构建与长序列泛化。

papers.title: High-Fidelity Mobile Avatars with Pruned Local Blendshapes
papers.abstract: We propose a method to reconstruct high-fidelity human avatars from multi-view video that can run on mobile devices. Many works can model high-quality Gaussian-based full-body avatars from multi-view video. However, these methods require heavy computation to obtain pose-dependent appearance, making deployment on mobile devices very difficult. Recent methods distill from pretrained models and model pose-dependent nonlinear Gaussian attributes by linearly combining global pose features with blendshapes. Although they can run on mobile devices, they suffer some loss of detail. We observe that nearby Gaussians are often highly correlated within a local region of the body, and can be linearly modeled with less error. Therefore, we use local linear blendshapes in small body parts to capture global nonlinear changes of Gaussian attributes. To further reduce computation and model size, we propose to remove blendshapes for Gaussians whose attributes change little, yielding a minimal blendshape representation. Our method is an end-to-end training method without a pretrained model. To make it run on multiple devices, we implement our method using WebGPU. Experiments show that our method can render high-quality human avatars with better details, and can reach 120 FPS at 2K resolution on mobile devices.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于局部线性混合形状的高保真移动端人体化身重建方法，通过剪枝冗余混合形状实现移动设备上120FPS的2K渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有高斯全身化身方法计算量大，难以部署到移动设备；而蒸馏方法虽可运行但细节丢失严重。
analysis.problem: 如何在移动设备上实现高保真、实时的人体化身渲染，同时保持细节和低计算量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到身体局部区域内的高斯属性高度相关，可用线性模型低误差拟合；部分高斯属性变化小，可移除其混合形状。
analysis.method: 使用局部线性混合形状（local linear blendshapes）建模高斯属性的全局非线性变化，并剪枝变化小的混合形状以减小模型大小和计算量，采用WebGPU实现跨设备运行。
contributions: 提出局部线性混合形状以高效建模姿态相关的高斯属性
提出混合形状剪枝策略，减少冗余计算和模型大小
实现端到端训练，无需预训练模型，并在移动设备上达到120FPS@2K
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在移动设备上达到120FPS@2K分辨率。
limitations: 可能依赖多视角视频输入，单视角泛化能力未知
局部线性假设在极端姿态或复杂纹理下可能失效
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（局部线性混合形状+剪枝）且具有实际移动端部署价值，实验显示高帧率，但摘要未提供定量对比细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于局部线性混合形状的高保真移动端人体化身重建方法，通过剪枝冗余混合形状实现移动设备上120FPS的2K渲染。

papers.title: Spatiotemporal Hidden-State Dynamics as a Signature of Internal Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) generate extended solutions, yet it remains unclear whether these traces reflect substantive internal computation or merely verbosity and overthinking. Although recent hidden-state analyses suggest that internal representations carry correctness-related signals, their coarse aggregations may obscure the token and layer structure underlying reasoning computation. We investigate hidden-state transitions across decoding steps and layers, and identify a distinct spatiotemporal pattern in LRMs: successful trajectories exhibit broad temporal dynamics with localized layer-wise concentration, while this structure is weaker in non-reasoning models and knowledge-heavy domains. We formalize this characteristic as Spatiotemporal Amplitude of Latent Transition (StALT), a training-free trajectory statistic that summarizes temporal changes between adjacent tokens weighted by within-token layer saliency. Across diverse models and benchmarks, StALT reliably separates correct from incorrect trajectories in reasoning-intensive regimes, providing a competitive label-free correctness signal alongside strong output-space and length-based baselines. Intervention analyses further show that this spatiotemporal amplitude responds systematically to manipulations that increase or reduce the demand for internal reasoning, supporting its association with latent reasoning dynamics in LRMs. These findings provide empirical evidence that LRMs exhibit measurable hidden-state dynamics and offer a practical probe for understanding internal computation beyond output-based evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的内部推理信号StALT，通过分析隐藏状态时空动态区分大型推理模型的正确与错误轨迹。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型推理模型生成扩展解决方案，但尚不清楚这些轨迹是否反映实质性内部计算，还是仅仅是冗长和过度思考。现有隐藏状态分析虽表明内部表征携带正确性相关信号，但其粗粒度聚合可能掩盖推理计算背后的token和层结构。
analysis.problem: 如何从隐藏状态的时空动态中提取可区分正确与错误推理轨迹的、无需训练的信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 成功轨迹表现出广泛的时序动态和局部化的层集中性，而非推理模型和知识密集型领域这种结构较弱。
analysis.method: 提出StALT（时空潜在转移幅度），一种无需训练的轨迹统计量，通过加权相邻token间的时序变化与token内层显著性来总结隐藏状态转移。
contributions: 识别出大型推理模型中隐藏状态时空动态的独特模式，并形式化为StALT指标。
在多种模型和基准上，StALT可靠区分正确与错误推理轨迹，提供有竞争力的无标签正确性信号。
干预分析表明StALT对内部推理需求的变化敏感，支持其与潜在推理动态的关联。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型和基准上评估StALT区分正确与错误轨迹的能力，并与输出空间和基于长度的基线比较；进行干预分析验证信号对推理需求变化的敏感性。
limitations: StALT可能对特定模型架构或推理任务敏感，泛化性需进一步验证。
干预分析仅初步表明关联，因果关系仍需更严格验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，无需训练即可分析内部推理动态，对理解LLM推理机制有价值，但实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的内部推理信号StALT，通过分析隐藏状态时空动态区分大型推理模型的正确与错误轨迹。

papers.title: DP-SfM: Dual-Pixel Structure-from-Motion without Scale Ambiguity
papers.abstract: Multi-view 3D reconstruction, namely, structure-from-motion followed by multi-view stereo, is a fundamental component of 3D computer vision. In general, multi-view 3D reconstruction suffers from an unknown scale ambiguity unless a reference object of known size is present in the scene. In this article, we show that multi-view images captured using a dual-pixel (DP) sensor can automatically resolve the scale ambiguity, without requiring a reference object or prior calibration. Specifically, the defocus blur observed in DP images provides sufficient information to determine the absolute scale when paired with depth maps (up to scale) recovered from multi-view 3D reconstruction. Based on this observation, we develop a simple yet effective linear method to estimate the absolute scale, followed by the intensity-based optimization stage that aligns the left and right DP images by shifting them back toward each other using cross-view blur kernels. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach across diverse scenes captured with different cameras and lenses. Code and data are available at https://github.com/lilika-makabe/dp-sfm-tpami.git

analysis.tldr: 利用双像素传感器中的散焦模糊信息，无需参考物体即可自动消除多视图三维重建的尺度模糊。
analysis.research_motivation: 多视图三维重建普遍存在未知尺度模糊问题，传统方法需要场景中存在已知尺寸的参考物体或预先标定，限制了应用场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖参考物体或先验标定的情况下，自动确定多视图三维重建的绝对尺度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 双像素图像中的散焦模糊与深度（尺度模糊）之间存在关联，可用于恢复绝对尺度。
analysis.method: 提出一种线性方法估计绝对尺度，再通过基于强度的优化，利用跨视图模糊核将左右DP图像对齐。
contributions: 首次证明双像素传感器可自动消除多视图三维重建的尺度模糊。
提出简单有效的线性尺度估计方法及后续优化对齐流程。
analysis.experiments: 在不同相机和镜头拍摄的多种场景上验证了方法的有效性，代码和数据已开源。
limitations: 依赖双像素传感器，不适用于普通传感器。
可能对极端散焦或纹理缺失场景敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用双像素传感器中的散焦模糊信息，无需参考物体即可自动消除多视图三维重建的尺度模糊。

papers.title: Disentangled Anatomy-Disease Diffusion (DADD) for Controllable Ulcerative Colitis Progression Synthesis
papers.abstract: Synthesizing longitudinal medical images at controllable disease stages while preserving patient-specific anatomy is hindered by the entanglement of pathological textures and structural features. We address this challenge for ulcerative colitis (UC) endoscopy, where severity follows a continuous ordinal progression along the Mayo Endoscopic Score (MES). Our framework, Disentangled Anatomy-Disease Diffusion (DADD), conditions a latent diffusion model on two complementary embeddings: a pretrained image encoder for patient anatomy and a separately trained ordinal embedder for cumulative disease severity. Since image embeddings inevitably capture disease information, we introduce a Feature Purifier, a cross-attention-based erasure mechanism that identifies and suppresses disease-correlated channels, yielding purified anatomical representations. These cleaned anatomy tokens and target disease tokens are injected into the denoising network via a Triple-Pathway Cross-Attention mechanism with resolution-dependent routing gates. This architecture leverages the U-Net hierarchy, in which different network depths encode global structure versus fine-grained pathological texture. Furthermore, we introduce Delta Steering, a training-free directional signal derived from the ordinal embeddings that enables explicit, single-pass control over disease transitions at inference without requiring additional forward passes. Validated on the LIMUC dataset, our approach produces high-fidelity images across all severity levels and effectively rebalances skewed class distributions, enhancing performance for downstream classification tasks. The dataset is available at zenodo.org/records/5827695 and the code base at github.com/umutdundar99/progressive-stable-diffusion

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦解剖-疾病扩散模型，实现可控的溃疡性结肠炎内镜图像进展合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 纵向医学图像合成中病理纹理与解剖结构特征纠缠，难以在保持患者特异性解剖的同时控制疾病阶段。
analysis.problem: 解决溃疡性结肠炎内镜图像中疾病进展的可控合成问题，要求解耦解剖与疾病特征并支持连续严重度控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 图像编码器不可避免地捕获疾病信息，导致解剖表示不纯净；U-Net不同深度编码全局结构与细粒度病理纹理。
analysis.method: 提出DADD框架，包含特征净化器（基于交叉注意力的擦除机制）、三重路径交叉注意力（带分辨率依赖路由门）和Delta Steering（训练自由的方向信号）。
contributions: 提出特征净化器，通过交叉注意力擦除疾病相关通道，获得纯净解剖表示。
设计三重路径交叉注意力机制，利用U-Net层次结构分别处理解剖与疾病嵌入。
引入Delta Steering，实现推理时单次前向传播的疾病过渡控制。
analysis.experiments: 在LIMUC数据集上验证，生成高保真图像并有效重平衡偏斜类别分布，提升下游分类性能。
limitations: 仅针对溃疡性结肠炎内镜图像，泛化性待验证。
特征净化器可能过度抑制有用疾病信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（特征净化器、Delta Steering），医学图像生成方向有价值，但实验仅针对单一数据集。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦解剖-疾病扩散模型，实现可控的溃疡性结肠炎内镜图像进展合成。

papers.title: NeuroState-Bench: A Human-Calibrated Benchmark for Commitment Integrity in LLM Agent Profiles
papers.abstract: Outcome-only evaluation under-specifies whether an evaluated agent profile preserves the commitments required to solve a multi-turn task coherently. NeuroState-Bench is a human-calibrated benchmark that operationalizes commitment integrity through benchmark-defined side-query probes rather than inferred hidden activations. The released inventory contains 144 deterministic tasks and 306 benchmark-defined side-query probes spanning eight cognitively motivated failure families, paired clean and distractor variants, and three difficulty bands. The main 32-profile evaluation contains a fixed 16-profile local subset and a matched 16-profile hosted large-model subset evaluated through the same benchmark pipeline. Human calibration uses the final merged reporting scope: 104 sampled task units, 216 raw annotations, and 108 adjudicated task rows, with weighted kappa = 0.977 and ICC(2,1) = 0.977. Empirically, task success and commitment integrity diverge across this expanded grid: the success leader is not the integrity leader, 31 of 32 profiles change rank when integrity replaces task success, and integrity rankings are more stable under distractor perturbation. The primary confidence-free score HCCIS-CORE reaches 0.8469 AUC and 0.6992 PR-AUC for post-probe diagnostic discrimination of terminal task failure; the legacy full heuristic variant HCCIS-FULL reaches 0.7997 AUC and 0.6410 PR-AUC. Probe accuracy and state drift achieve slightly higher ROC-AUC, 0.8587, and better Brier/ECE, while HCCIS-CORE has substantially higher point-estimate PR-AUC and remains more closely tied to the benchmark's intended construct. The exploratory neural-augmented variant HCCIS+N is weaker overall, and a randomized subspace control approaches chance. NeuroState-Bench therefore contributes a calibrated evaluation axis for exposing commitment failures over a broader model grid than the original local-only subset.

analysis.tldr: 提出NeuroState-Bench基准，通过侧查询探针评估LLM Agent在任务中的承诺完整性，发现任务成功与承诺完整性存在分歧。
analysis.research_motivation: 仅基于结果的评估无法判断Agent是否保持了解决多轮任务所需的承诺，现有方法缺乏对承诺完整性的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个人类校准的基准来量化LLM Agent在任务执行中的承诺完整性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 任务成功与承诺完整性在扩展评估网格上出现分歧：成功领先者并非完整性领先者，32个配置中有31个在替换评估指标后排名改变，且完整性排名在干扰扰动下更稳定。
analysis.method: 通过基准定义的侧查询探针（而非推断的隐藏激活）来操作化承诺完整性，包含144个确定性任务和306个探针，覆盖8个认知动机失败族，并引入人类校准。
contributions: 提出了NeuroState-Bench，一个人类校准的承诺完整性基准，包含144个任务和306个探针。
揭示了任务成功与承诺完整性之间的系统性分歧，并提供了稳定的完整性排名。
提出了HCCIS-CORE评分，在诊断终端任务失败方面达到0.8469 AUC和0.6992 PR-AUC。
analysis.experiments: 在32个Agent配置上评估，包含本地子集和托管大模型子集；人类校准使用104个采样任务单元，加权kappa=0.977，ICC(2,1)=0.977。
limitations: 基准任务规模有限（144个任务），可能无法覆盖所有承诺失败模式。
神经增强变体HCCIS+N表现较弱，提示当前神经方法不适用于此任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，人类校准严谨，揭示了重要现象，对Agent评估有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NeuroState-Bench基准，通过侧查询探针评估LLM Agent在任务中的承诺完整性，发现任务成功与承诺完整性存在分歧。

papers.title: Finite-Size Gradient Transport in Large Language Model Pretraining: From Cascade Size to Intensive Transport Efficiency
papers.abstract: We introduce a finite-size gradient-transport framework for real language-model training, based on five observables $(D,z,β,δ,v_{\mathrm{rel}})$ that separate cascade size, duration, absolute transport, and intensive transport efficiency. We analyze direct raw-gradient measurements from Pico-LM across four scales and 125 aligned steps, together with a five-scale Pythia companion dataset built from 153 aligned checkpoint-difference update fields. The same algebraic closure holds in both families, and both share a near-unity cascade-size backbone, but they occupy distinct transport regimes: Pico-LM shows positive duration scaling and negative intensive-efficiency scaling, whereas Pythia remains near the $D=1$ baseline with only weak positive efficiency scale dependence. Randomized-field controls give nearly matched null floors in the intensive and duration channels, indicating that the contrast reflects different real departures from a shared null skeleton rather than different null calibrations. The families also differ in stepwise power-law compressibility: Pico-LM retains clean duration and efficiency power laws, whereas Pythia preserves the size backbone but shows weaker one-slope compressibility in those channels. External performance associations are correspondingly channel-level, carried mainly by $v_{\mathrm{rel}}$ and normalized cascade duration, while $D(t)$ acts as a shared size backbone without a significant exponent-level performance association. These results support a reusable transport measurement framework without claiming a universal fixed point or a first-principles derivation of neural scaling laws.

analysis.tldr: 提出有限尺寸梯度传输框架，分析LLM预训练中梯度级联大小与传输效率的尺度行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解大型语言模型预训练中梯度传输的有限尺寸效应，揭示不同规模模型在级联大小、持续时间和传输效率上的差异，为优化训练提供理论依据。
analysis.problem: 如何量化并比较不同规模LLM预训练中梯度传输的级联大小、持续时间和传输效率？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Pico-LM和Pythia两个模型家族共享近统一的级联大小骨架，但处于不同的传输机制：Pico-LM显示正持续时间缩放和负效率缩放，而Pythia接近D=1基线且效率缩放弱正。随机场控制实验表明对比源于真实偏离而非校准差异。
analysis.method: 基于五个可观测量(D,z,β,δ,v_rel)的有限尺寸梯度传输框架，分离级联大小、持续时间、绝对传输和密集传输效率。
contributions: 提出一个可复用的梯度传输测量框架，包含五个关键可观测量。
通过两个模型家族（Pico-LM和Pythia）的实证分析，揭示不同规模下梯度传输的尺度行为差异。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架未声称通用固定点或神经缩放定律的第一性原理推导。
仅基于两个模型家族，可能缺乏更广泛模型架构的验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的梯度传输分析框架，理论深度较高，但实验细节有限且未提供具体性能提升，适合精读以评估其实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出有限尺寸梯度传输框架，分析LLM预训练中梯度级联大小与传输效率的尺度行为。

papers.title: AutoRAGTuner: A Declarative Framework for Automatic Optimization of RAG Pipelines
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances LLMs, but performance is highly sensitive to complex architecture designs and hyper-parameter configurations, which currently rely on inefficient manual tuning. We present AutoRAGTuner, a declarative, configuration-driven framework that automates the RAG life cycle: construction, execution,evaluation, and optimization. AutoRAGTuner employs a modular architecture to decouple pipeline stages through a component registration mechanism. To unify heterogeneous data, we introduce the Domain-Element Model (DEM), representing objects as atomic elements with bidirectional pointers to support nodes, edges, and hyperedges. Furthermore, AutoRAGTuner integrates an adaptive Bayesian optimization engine for end-to-end hyper-parameter tuning. Experimental results demonstrate AutoRAGTuner's architectural generality: across diverse RAG pipelines, ranging from vanilla to graph-based, the framework consistently outperforms default baselines. Notably, AutoRAGTuner significantly mitigates engineering overhead, where its declarative configuration language enables a up to 95\% reduction in code churn for architectural adjustments. Overall, AutoRAGTuner provides a systematically optimizable foundation for building evolvable and reusable RAG systems.

analysis.tldr: AutoRAGTuner 是一个声明式框架，自动优化 RAG 管道的构建、执行、评估和超参数调优，显著减少工程开销。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG 系统性能对复杂架构设计和超参数配置高度敏感，当前依赖低效的手动调优，缺乏自动化优化工具。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化 RAG 管道的全生命周期（构建、执行、评估、优化），并降低架构调整的工程开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出声明式配置驱动框架 AutoRAGTuner，包含模块化架构（组件注册机制解耦管道阶段）、域元素模型（DEM）统一异构数据，以及自适应贝叶斯优化引擎进行端到端超参数调优。
contributions: 提出声明式配置语言，实现架构调整中代码变更量减少高达 95%。
集成自适应贝叶斯优化引擎，在多种 RAG 管道（从普通到基于图）上持续优于默认基线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的组件库，对新组件的扩展性有待验证。
贝叶斯优化的效率在极高维超参数空间下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 框架创新性高，工程价值显著，但摘要实验细节不足，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AutoRAGTuner 是一个声明式框架，自动优化 RAG 管道的构建、执行、评估和超参数调优，显著减少工程开销。

papers.title: Repurposing and Evaluating the (In)Feasibility of Dataset Poisoning enabled Watermarking for Contrastive Learning
papers.abstract: Contrastive learning (CL) reduces annotation cost via auto-derived supervisory signals. Since large-scale in-house CL datasets are infeasible, reliance on third-party or internet data is common. Recent studies show CL models are vulnerable to data-poisoning backdoor attacks, but their generalization and robustness are underexplored. We systematically evaluate existing data-poisoning backdoor attacks on CL, revealing limitations: poor dataset adaptability, low success rates, limited portability, and restrictive assumptions (e.g., downstream task knowledge). Interestingly, trigger samples exhibit distinguishable statistical divergence from clean samples, which inspires repurposing it as a watermark for dataset IP protection. Direct repurposing is challenging due to low success rates; we overcome this by statistical verification using a unified density metric. We further propose a multi-level watermarking scheme adapting to feature-level, soft-label, or hard-label outputs in CL. Experiments show some backdoor attacks can be repurposed as effective watermarks with trade-offs among fidelity, verifiability, and robustness. This work demonstrates weak backdoor effects become reliable signals for dataset IP protection in challenging CL settings.

analysis.tldr: 将对比学习中的弱后门攻击重新利用为数据集水印，通过统计验证实现版权保护。
analysis.research_motivation: 对比学习依赖第三方数据，易受数据投毒后门攻击，但现有攻击的泛化性和鲁棒性研究不足；同时，数据集知识产权保护缺乏有效手段。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估对比学习中的数据投毒后门攻击的局限性，并将其重新利用为可靠的数据集水印。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 触发样本与干净样本存在可区分的统计差异，弱后门攻击可转化为可靠信号。
analysis.method: 提出基于统一密度度量的统计验证方法，并设计多级水印方案适配特征级、软标签或硬标签输出。
contributions: 系统评估了对比学习中数据投毒后门攻击的局限性（数据集适应性差、成功率低、可移植性有限等）。
首次将弱后门攻击重新利用为数据集水印，通过统计验证克服低成功率问题。
提出多级水印方案，在保真度、可验证性和鲁棒性之间取得权衡。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明某些后门攻击可被重新利用为有效水印，但摘要未提供具体实验细节。
limitations: 水印方案可能依赖特定攻击类型，泛化性需进一步验证。

analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但实验细节不足，影响评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将对比学习中的弱后门攻击重新利用为数据集水印，通过统计验证实现版权保护。

papers.title: Remote Action Generation: Remote Control with Minimal Communication
papers.abstract: We address the challenge of remote control where one or more actors, lacking direct reward access, are steered by a controller over a communication-constrained channel. The controller learns an optimal policy from observed rewards and communicates action guidance to the actors, which becomes demanding for large or continuous action spaces. To achieve rate-efficient communication throughout this interactive learning and control process, we introduce a novel framework leveraging remote generation. Instead of transmitting full action specifications, the controller sends minimal information, enabling the actors to locally generate actions by sampling from the controller's evolving target policy. This guided sampling is facilitated by an importance sampling approach. Concurrently, the actors use the received guidance as supervised learning data to learn the controller's policy. This actor-side learning improves their local sampling capabilities, progressively reducing future communication needs. Our solution, Guided Remote Action Sampling Policy (GRASP), demonstrates significant communication reduction, achieving an average 12-fold data reduction across all experiments (50-fold for continuous action spaces) compared to direct action transmission, and a 41-fold reduction compared to reward transmission.

analysis.tldr: 提出GRASP框架，通过远程生成和重要性采样实现通信受限下的高效远程控制，平均减少12倍通信量。
analysis.research_motivation: 远程控制中，控制器需通过通信受限信道向无直接奖励的actor传输动作指导，在大或连续动作空间中通信成本高，现有方法效率不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在通信受限的远程控制场景中，实现控制器与actor之间高效的动作指导传输，同时保证学习性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GRASP框架，控制器发送最小信息（如采样提示），actor通过重要性采样从控制器策略中本地生成动作，并利用接收的指导作为监督数据学习控制器策略，逐步减少通信需求。
contributions: 提出远程生成框架，通过重要性采样实现通信高效的动作指导。
引入actor侧学习机制，利用指导数据学习控制器策略，降低未来通信需求。
实验证明GRASP在连续动作空间实现50倍数据减少，整体平均12倍减少。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验设置，但报告了通信减少倍数：平均12倍，连续动作空间50倍，相比奖励传输减少41倍。
limitations: 可能依赖重要性采样的有效性，在高维动作空间中采样效率可能下降。
未讨论多actor场景下的协调或异步通信问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，通信效率提升显著，但应用场景较窄，实验细节不足。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GRASP框架，通过远程生成和重要性采样实现通信受限下的高效远程控制，平均减少12倍通信量。

papers.title: RMGAP: Benchmarking the Generalization of Reward Models across Diverse Preferences
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback has become the standard paradigm for language model alignment, where reward models directly determine alignment effectiveness. In this work, we focus on how to evaluate the generalizability of reward models. By "generalizability", we mean the ability of RMs to correctly rank responses to align with diverse user preferences. However, existing reward model benchmarks are typically designed around a universal preference, failing to assess this generalization. To address this critical gap, we introduce RMGAP, a benchmark comprising 1,097 instances across Chat, Writing, Reasoning, and Safety domains. Since different users exhibit diverse preferences for the same task, we first generate four distinct responses with different linguistic profiles for each collected prompt. However, the original prompt set lacks the specificity to convey different preferences. We therefore construct tailored prompts by contrasting these candidates and designing scenarios in which one response becomes the uniquely appropriate choice. Moreover, we observe that users often express the same preference using different phrasings, and thus extend each prompt with two paraphrased variants. Our evaluation of 24 state-of-the-art RMs reveals their substantial limitations: even the best RM achieves only 49.27% Best-of-N accuracy, highlighting considerable room for improvement in reward model generalization. Related data and code are available at https://github.com/nanzhi84/RMGAP.

analysis.tldr: 提出RMGAP基准，评估奖励模型在不同用户偏好下的泛化能力，发现现有模型准确率不足50%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有奖励模型基准仅评估通用偏好，无法衡量模型对不同用户偏好的泛化能力，而这对RLHF对齐至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能评估奖励模型在多样化用户偏好下泛化能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出用户对同一任务有不同偏好，且相同偏好可用不同措辞表达。
analysis.method: 构建包含Chat、Writing、Reasoning、Safety四个领域的1,097个实例的基准，每个提示生成四种不同语言风格的响应，并通过对比和场景设计构建偏好明确的提示，同时为每个提示生成两个释义变体。
contributions: 提出RMGAP基准，用于评估奖励模型在多样化用户偏好下的泛化能力。
通过24个SOTA奖励模型评估，揭示其泛化能力不足，最佳模型准确率仅49.27%。
analysis.experiments: 在24个SOTA奖励模型上评估，使用Best-of-N准确率指标，最佳模型仅49.27%。
limitations: 基准规模有限（1,097实例），可能无法覆盖所有偏好场景。
仅评估了英文场景，未涉及多语言偏好。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 针对奖励模型泛化评估的空白，构建了有明确方法创新的基准，实验揭示重要局限，对RLHF领域有较高价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RMGAP基准，评估奖励模型在不同用户偏好下的泛化能力，发现现有模型准确率不足50%。

papers.title: GeoSAE: Geometric Prior-Guided Layer-Wise Sparse Autoencoder Annotation of Brain MRI Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Brain MRI foundation models learn rich representations of anatomy, but interpreting what clinical information they encode remains an open problem. Standard sparse autoencoders (SAEs) suffer from severe feature collapse in deep transformer layers, and in Alzheimer's disease (AD) research, aging confounds nearly every clinical variable, making naive annotation unreliable. We propose GeoSAE, a geometry-guided SAE framework that uses the foundation model's learned manifold structure to prevent feature collapse and annotates each surviving feature via age-deconfounded partial correlations. Applied to ~14k T1-weighted MRI scans from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) and the Australian Imaging biomarkers and Lifestyle (AIBL) datasets, GeoSAE identifies a compact, fully interpretable feature set that predicts mild cognitive impairment (MCI)-to-AD conversion (AUC 0.746) using only 2% of the embedding dimensions, while comorbidity-annotated features achieve only chance-level performance. The identified features replicate across cohorts without retraining (r=0.97) and localize to neuroanatomically distinct regions consistent with Braak staging. This shows that geometry-guided SAEs can extract interpretable, biomarkers from frozen brain MRI foundation models.

analysis.tldr: GeoSAE利用几何先验防止稀疏自编码器特征坍缩，并通过去混杂偏相关从脑MRI基础模型中提取可解释的生物标志物。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑MRI基础模型编码了丰富的解剖表征，但解释其临床信息仍是开放问题；标准稀疏自编码器在深层Transformer层存在严重特征坍缩，且阿尔茨海默病研究中年龄混杂因素使朴素标注不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何从冻结的脑MRI基础模型中提取紧凑、可解释且无年龄混杂的生物标志物特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准SAE在深层Transformer层出现特征坍缩；年龄混杂使临床变量标注不可靠；共病标注特征仅达到随机水平。
analysis.method: GeoSAE框架：利用基础模型学习的流形结构（几何先验）防止特征坍缩，并通过年龄去混杂偏相关对每个存活特征进行标注。
contributions: 提出GeoSAE，利用几何先验防止SAE特征坍缩，实现层间可解释特征提取。
引入年龄去混杂偏相关标注方法，消除年龄混杂影响。
在ADNI和AIBL数据集上验证，仅用2%嵌入维度即可预测MCI-to-AD转化（AUC 0.746），特征跨队列可复制（r=0.97），且定位到与Braak分期一致的神经解剖区域。
analysis.experiments: 在约14k T1加权MRI扫描（ADNI和AIBL数据集）上评估，预测MCI-to-AD转化AUC 0.746，特征跨队列复制相关性r=0.97。
limitations: 仅针对T1加权MRI，可能不适用于其他模态。
依赖基础模型预训练的流形结构，若流形质量差可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（几何引导SAE+去混杂标注），实验充分且结果显著，对医学图像可解释性有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoSAE利用几何先验防止稀疏自编码器特征坍缩，并通过去混杂偏相关从脑MRI基础模型中提取可解释的生物标志物。

papers.title: Referring Multiple Regions with Large Multimodal Models via Contextual Latent Steering
papers.abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have recently demonstrated their proficiency in holistic visual comprehension. However, most of them struggle to tackle region-level perception guided by visual prompts, especially for cases where multiple regions are referred simultaneously, or scenarios where global contexts are necessary for precise visual referring. We introduce Contextual Latent Steering (CSteer), a training-free approach for guiding general LMMs to refer multiple regions contextually, without expensive fine-tuning or architectural modifications. CSteer starts with pre-computing contextual vectors that implicitly represent visual referring behaviors, such as differentiation among regions and attention to global contexts, followed by representation editing during inference time. Experimental results on multiple datasets indicate that general LMMs with CSteer outperform tailored referring LMMs in most cases, suggesting a promising solution in training-free, and setting new state-of-the-art for this field. Code is available at https://github.com/xing0047/csteer.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的上下文潜在引导方法，使通用多模态大模型能同时指代多个区域，性能超越专用模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大型多模态模型在视觉提示引导的区域级感知上表现不佳，尤其是需要同时指代多个区域或依赖全局上下文时，而现有方法通常需要昂贵的微调或架构修改。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行微调或架构修改的情况下，使通用LMM能够上下文感知地同时指代多个视觉区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Contextual Latent Steering (CSteer)，预计算隐式表示视觉指代行为的上下文向量（如区域区分和全局注意力），在推理时通过表示编辑引导模型。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的方法CSteer，使通用LMM能上下文感知地指代多个区域。
在多个数据集上达到新SOTA，性能超越专用指代模型。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，CSteer增强的通用LMM在大多数情况下优于专用指代LMM。
limitations: 可能依赖预计算上下文向量的质量。
未在更复杂的多模态任务上验证。

analysis.reason: 方法新颖且无需训练，实验效果好，与VLM方向高度相关。

papers.title: Hybrid Visual Telemetry for Bandwidth-Constrained Robotic Vision: A Pilot Study with HEVC Base Video and JPEG ROI Stills
papers.abstract: Bandwidth-constrained robotic and surveillance systems often rely on a single compressed video stream to support both continuous scene awareness and downstream machine perception. In practice, this creates a mismatch: low-bitrate video can preserve motion and coarse context, but often loses the fine local detail needed for reliable object recognition and decision-making. Motivated by a hybrid architecture in which low-resolution video supports dynamic scene understanding while eventdriven high-detail regions of interest (ROIs) support close-up identification and analytics, this paper formalizes a two-channel visual telemetry scheme in which a continuous low-bitrate video stream is augmented by selectively transmitted high-detail still ROIs. This first paper does not attempt to prove the superiority of a new still-image codec. Instead, it establishes the hybrid transmission paradigm itself using a practical and reproducible codec stack: x265/HEVC for the base video stream and JPEG stills for ROI refinement. We formulate the problem as bitrate-constrained information selection for robotic vision and define an experimental protocol in which video-only and hybrid schemes are compared under matched total communication budgets. The study is designed around UAV-oriented datasets, two practical bitrate regimes, several ROI triggering policies, and object-level classification refinement on selectively transmitted ROI stills. The resulting paper lays the methodological foundation for a second-stage investigation of JPEG AI as the semantic still-image channel within the same hybrid architecture.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种混合视觉遥测方案，用低码率视频流加JPEG ROI静态图解决带宽受限机器人视觉中细节丢失问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 带宽受限的机器人/监控系统通常依赖单一压缩视频流，但低码率视频虽能保留运动和粗粒度上下文，却丢失了目标识别所需的局部细节，导致感知性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定通信预算下，通过混合传输低码率视频和选择性高细节ROI静态图，提升机器人视觉的感知质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低码率视频在保持运动感知和粗粒度场景理解方面有效，但无法提供可靠目标识别所需的精细局部细节。
analysis.method: 提出双通道视觉遥测方案：连续低码率HEVC视频流 + 事件驱动的高细节JPEG ROI静态图。在固定总比特率下，比较纯视频与混合方案的性能。
contributions: 形式化了带宽约束下机器人视觉的混合传输范式，并定义了实验协议。
基于UAV数据集、两种比特率、多种ROI触发策略和分类细化任务，建立了可复现的基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了实验设计：基于UAV数据集、两种比特率、多种ROI触发策略和对象级分类细化。
limitations: 仅使用JPEG作为ROI编码器，未探索更先进的静态图像编码（如JPEG AI）。
实验仅限于UAV数据集，泛化性待验证。

papers.title: Selector-Guided Autonomous Curriculum for One-Shot Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards
papers.abstract: Recently, Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has been established as a highly effective technique for augmenting the math reasoning skills of Large Language Models (LLMs) based on a single instance. Current state-of-the-art 1-shot RLVR models adopt heuristics for selecting instances, mostly based on historical variance in rewards, which we find to be inherently misleading as a measure of transferability value. In this paper, we propose a Selector-Guided Autonomous Curriculum (SGAC) approach, which employs a learnable selector model on a multi-dimensional feature space consisting of success probability, reward variance, output disagreement (entropy), and semantic difficulty level, instead of the static reward variance heuristic. In our empirical evaluation on pools of candidate problems, we observed that output disagreement, rather than reward variance, is the strongest predictor of reasoning gains in subsequent iterations. Leveraging this finding, we develop an autonomous curriculum algorithm for dynamically siphoning candidate problems from a large pool, ranking them by the learned selector, and running micro-bursts of 1-shot GRPO. Our framework is evaluated using the Hendrycks MATH benchmark, with the Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B model serving as the baseline. Our framework obtains an accuracy of 68.0\% on the hold-out dataset, which is better than the accuracy obtained from the state-of-the-art model, 64.0\%, as well as the 1-shot RLVR checkpoint proposed by Wang et al., which achieved an accuracy of 66.0\%. The results confirm that entropy-based intelligent data curation leads to strict reasoning improvement over static training methods, particularly in severely limited data conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出选择器引导的自主课程学习（SGAC），利用输出熵而非奖励方差作为迁移性指标，在单次RLVR中提升数学推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有1-shot RLVR方法使用基于奖励方差的启发式选择实例，但奖励方差作为迁移性度量具有误导性，导致数据选择效率低下，限制了推理能力的提升。
analysis.problem: 如何设计更有效的实例选择策略，以在单次RLVR中最大化推理增益。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到输出熵（输出分歧）比奖励方差更能预测后续迭代的推理增益，表明熵是更好的迁移性指标。
analysis.method: 提出选择器引导的自主课程（SGAC），包含一个可学习的选择器模型，基于成功概率、奖励方差、输出熵和语义难度等多维特征对候选问题进行排序，并动态执行微批次的1-shot GRPO训练。
contributions: 揭示了输出熵比奖励方差更适合作为实例迁移性的预测指标。
提出了SGAC框架，通过可学习选择器和自主课程算法动态筛选问题，显著提升1-shot RLVR的数学推理性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Hendrycks MATH基准上使用Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B模型评估，SGAC在保留集上达到68.0%准确率，优于SOTA的64.0%和Wang等人的66.0%。
limitations: 仅针对数学推理任务验证，可能不适用于其他领域。
依赖可学习选择器，需要额外训练开销。

papers.title: Meta-LegNet: A Transferable and Interpretable Framework for Surface Adsorption Prediction via Self-Defined Adsorption-Environment Learning
papers.abstract: A central challenge in computational catalysis is the identification of low-energy and chemically plausible adsorption configurations, as these directly affect adsorption energies, reaction pathways, and catalytic performance. Existing approaches generally rely on enumerating candidate adsorption sites followed by iterative refinement through density functional theory calculations or machine-learning-based relaxations. However, such workflows remain computationally expensive and are difficult to scale to complex surfaces or multi-adsorbate systems. Here, we introduce Meta-LegNet, a graph learning framework that combines SE(3)-equivariant atom-level message passing with voxel-based multiscale aggregation and cross-domain meta-learning to learn transferable representations of local adsorption environments across diverse catalyst--adsorbate systems. Rather than following a conventional regression-only paradigm, Meta-LegNet encodes local chemical environments using invariant radial features and equivariant directional information, and further incorporates broader structural context through coordinate-frame voxel pooling, assignment-based upsampling, and gated feature fusion. The resulting local-global decomposition produces atom-resolved attribution maps, which are processed to identify adsorption-relevant local environments in an interpretable manner. Based on the learned representations, we further construct an adsorption-environment database and develop a template-matching strategy to propose likely adsorption sites on previously unexplored surfaces without exhaustive site enumeration. Overall, our results suggest that learning transferable adsorption environments provides an accurate, interpretable, and practical route for accelerating catalyst screening.

analysis.tldr: 提出Meta-LegNet框架，通过可迁移的吸附环境学习实现表面吸附预测，兼具准确性与可解释性。

papers.title: Cross-Domain Adversarial Augmentation: Stabilizing GANs for Medical and Handwriting Data Scarcity
papers.abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) offer a pragmatic route to mitigate data scarcity in vision tasks. We study generative augmentation across two low-resource domains: Bangla handwritten characters and chest X-ray imaging using DCGAN-style models trained at 64x64 resolution. We evaluate fidelity and diversity via Inception Score (IS), Fr'echet Inception Distance (FID), and embedding visualizations (t-SNE/UMAP), and assess downstream utility by training classifiers on real versus real synthetic data. Our experiments show that generative augmentation improves sample diversity and yields consistent gains in classifier performance under limited-data regimes. We analyze stability enhancements (e.g., gradient-penalized objectives and spectral normalization) and report ablations on synthetic-to-real ratios and sample filtering. We discuss evaluation caveats for medical images, dataset licensing, and privacy risks associated with synthetic data. The resulting protocol is simple to reproduce and provides a strong baseline for applying generative augmentation to resource-constrained imaging tasks.

analysis.tldr: 跨域对抗增强通过梯度惩罚和谱归一化稳定GAN训练，在孟加拉手写字符和胸部X光数据稀缺场景下提升分类器性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉任务中数据稀缺是常见痛点，GAN生成增强提供了一种实用缓解方案，但训练不稳定和评估标准不统一限制了其应用。

papers.title: Federated Semi-Supervised Graph Neural Networks with Prototype-Guided Pseudo-Labeling for Privacy-Preserving Gestational Diabetes Mellitus Prediction
papers.abstract: Gestational Diabetes Mellitus (GDM) is a high-prevalence pregnancy complication that requires accurate early risk stratification to reduce maternal and fetal morbidity. However, real-world clinical deployment of machine learning is hindered by two coupled constraints: (i) label scarcity, where a large fraction of electronic health records (EHR) lack confirmed diagnostic labels, and (ii) data privacy, which prevents sharing patient-level data across hospitals. This paper proposes FedTGNN-SS, a privacy-preserving federated semi-supervised framework for clinical tabular EHR. Each hospital builds a local k-nearest-neighbor patient similarity graph and trains a topology-adaptive GNN encoder. To robustly exploit unlabeled records, FedTGNN-SS combines (1) prototype-guided pseudo-labeling with neighborhood agreement, (2) adaptive graph refinement that periodically updates the k-NN graph using learned embeddings, (3) clinical-aware consistency augmentation applied only to continuous variables, and (4) privacy-safe prototype sharing that exchanges only class-level centroids. Across three diabetes-related datasets (GDM: N = 3,525; Pima: N = 768; Early Stage: N = 520) under 10\%-80\% missing labels per silo, FedTGNN-SS achieves 56 significant wins ($p < 0.05$) against 11 federated baselines and attains strong AUROC under extreme scarcity (Pima: 0.8037 at 80\% missing, Early Stage: 0.9634 at 80\% missing).

analysis.tldr: 提出FedTGNN-SS，一种隐私保护的联邦半监督图神经网络框架，通过原型引导伪标签和自适应图细化，在妊娠期糖尿病预测中显著优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 妊娠期糖尿病（GDM）早期风险分层对降低母婴发病率至关重要，但真实临床部署面临标签稀缺和数据隐私两大耦合约束，现有方法难以同时解决。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护数据隐私的前提下，利用大量无标签电子健康记录（EHR）进行准确的GDM预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FedTGNN-SS框架，每个医院构建局部k近邻患者相似图并训练拓扑自适应GNN编码器；结合原型引导伪标签与邻域一致性、自适应图细化、仅对连续变量的临床感知一致性增强，以及仅交换类级质心的隐私安全原型共享。
contributions: 提出首个结合联邦学习、半监督学习和图神经网络的GDM预测框架，同时解决标签稀缺和隐私问题。
设计原型引导伪标签与邻域一致性机制，鲁棒利用无标签数据。
引入自适应图细化和临床感知一致性增强，提升表征质量。
在三个糖尿病数据集上，与11个联邦基线相比取得56次显著胜利（p<0.05），在极端标签稀缺下仍保持高AUROC。
analysis.experiments: 在三个糖尿病相关数据集（GDM: N=3,525; Pima: N=768; Early Stage: N=520）上，每个数据分片缺失10%-80%标签，与11个联邦基线对比，FedTGNN-SS取得56次显著胜利（p<0.05），在80%缺失下Pima AUROC达0.8037，Early Stage达0.9634。
limitations: 仅适用于表格数据，未验证对其他模态（如图像、文本）的泛化能力。

papers.title: TMD-Bench: A Multi-Level Evaluation Paradigm for Music-Dance Co-Generation
papers.abstract: Unified audio-visual generation is rapidly gaining industrial and creative relevance, enabling applications in virtual production and interactive media. However, when moving from general audio-video synthesis to music-dance co-generation, the task becomes substantially harder: musical rhythm, phrasing, and accents must drive choreographic motion at fine temporal resolution, and such rhythmic coupling is not captured by unimodal metrics or generic audiovisual consistency scores used in current evaluation practice. We introduce TMD-Bench, a benchmark for text-driven music-dance co-generation that assesses systems across unimodal generation quality, instruction adherence, and cross-modal rhythmic alignment. The benchmark integrates computable physical metrics with perceptual multimodal judgments, and is supported by a curated rhythm-aligned music-dance dataset and a fine-grained Music Captioner for structured music semantics. TMD-Bench further reveals that (i) modern commercial audio-visual models, such as Veo 3 and Sora 2, produce high-quality music and video, while rhythmic coupling remains less consistently optimized and leaves room for improvement, and (ii) our unified baseline RhyJAM trained on rhythm-aligned data achieves competitive beat-level synchronization while maintaining competitive unimodal fidelity. This presents prospects for building next-generation music-dance models that explicitly optimize rhythmic and kinetic coherence.

analysis.tldr: 提出音乐-舞蹈协同生成的多级评测基准TMD-Bench，揭示现有模型在节奏耦合上的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 音乐-舞蹈协同生成在虚拟制作和交互媒体中具有重要应用价值，但现有评测仅使用单模态指标或通用音视频一致性分数，无法捕捉精细的节奏耦合关系。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门针对音乐-舞蹈协同生成的多级评测基准，无法全面评估系统在单模态质量、指令遵循和跨模态节奏对齐方面的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现代商业音视频模型（如Veo 3和Sora 2）能生成高质量音乐和视频，但节奏耦合优化不足；而基于节奏对齐数据训练的RhyJAM基线在节拍级同步上具有竞争力。
analysis.method: 构建TMD-Bench基准，包含可计算的物理指标与感知多模态判断，并配套节奏对齐数据集和细粒度音乐描述器。
contributions: 提出首个针对文本驱动音乐-舞蹈协同生成的多级评测基准TMD-Bench。

papers.title: Embody4D: A Generalist 4D World Model for Embodied AI
papers.abstract: World models have made significant progress in modeling dynamic environments; however, most embodied world models are still restricted to 2D representations, lacking the comprehensive multi-view information essential for embodied spatial reasoning. Bridging this gap is non-trivial, primarily due to challenges from severe scarcity of paired multi-view data, the difficulty of maintaining spatiotemporal consistency in generated 3D geometries, and the tendency to hallucinate manipulation details. To address these challenges, we propose Embody4D, a dedicated video-to-video world model for embodied scenarios, capable of synthesizing arbitrary novel views from a monocular video. First, to tackle data scarcity, we introduce a 3D-aware compositional synthesis pipeline to curate a heterogeneous dataset compositing cross-embodiment robotic arms with diverse backgrounds, guaranteeing broad generalization. Second, to enforce geometric stability, we devise an adaptive noise injection strategy; by leveraging confidence disparities across image regions, this method selectively regularizes the diffusion process to ensure strict spatiotemporal consistency. Finally, to guarantee manipulation fidelity, we incorporate an interaction-aware attention mechanism that explicitly attends to the robotic interaction regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Embody4D achieves state-of-the-art performance, serving as a robust world model that synthesizes high-fidelity, view-consistent videos to empower downstream robotic planning and learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出Embody4D，一个面向具身AI的4D世界模型，能从单目视频合成任意新视角视频，解决数据稀缺、时空一致性和操作细节幻觉问题。

papers.title: VT-Bench: A Unified Benchmark for Visual-Tabular Multi-Modal Learning
papers.abstract: Multi-model learning has attracted great attention in visual-text tasks. However, visual-tabular data, which plays a pivotal role in high-stakes domains like healthcare and industry, remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce \textit{VT-Bench}, the first unified benchmark for standardizing vision-tabular discriminative prediction and generative reasoning tasks. VT-Bench aggregates 14 datasets across 9 domains (medical-centric, while covering pets, media, and transportation) with over 756K samples. We evaluate 23 representative models, including unimodal experts, specialized visual-tabular models, general-purpose vision-language models (VLMs), and tool-augmented methods, highlighting substantial challenges of visual-tabular learning. We believe VT-Bench will stimulate the community to build more powerful multi-modal vision-tabular foundation models. Benchmark: https://github.com/Ziyi-Jia990/VT-Bench

analysis.tldr: 首个统一视觉-表格多模态基准VT-Bench，覆盖14个数据集和23个模型，揭示该领域挑战。

papers.title: Neural Decision-Propagation for Answer Set Programming
papers.abstract: Integration of Answer Set Programming (ASP) with neural networks has emerged as a promising tool in Neuro-symbolic AI. While existing approaches extend the capabilities of ASP to real world domains, their reasoning pipelines depend on classical solvers, which is a bottleneck for scalability. To tackle this problem, we propose a new method to compute stable models, called decision-propagation (DProp), which alternates falsity decisions and truth propagations. Successful DProp computations are shown to capture the stable model semantics. We then develop Neural DProp (NDProp), a differentiable extension of DProp with neural computation for decisions and fuzzy evaluation for propagations. We evaluate the capabilities of NDProp for learning decision heuristics as well as neuro-symbolic integration, and compare it with existing neuro-symbolic approaches. The results show that NDProp can learn to efficiently compute stable models, and it improves accuracy and scalability on neuro-symbolic benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经决策传播方法，将ASP推理与神经网络可微分结合，提升可扩展性。

papers.title: Discover Fast Power Allocation Solution for Multi-Target Tracking via AlphaEvolve Evolution
papers.abstract: Efficient radar resource allocation is a fundamental yet computationally challenging problem, as optimal solutions typically require iterative optimization with high complexity. Motivated by the need for real-time scheduling, robust generalization, and low data dependency, this paper proposes a novel paradigm that leverages large language model (LLM)-guided evolutionary search (AlphaEvolve) to autonomously discover a closed-form power allocation solution for multi-target tracking. The approach encodes high-dimensional radar states into physically inspired features, then evolves a compact and interpretable scoring function, which is transformed to feasible power allocations via a deterministic constraint-satisfying transformation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the discovered closed-form solution achieves near-optimal tracking accuracy (average relative performance loss of only $1.51\%$), reliable generalization across diverse scenarios and target counts, and over three orders of magnitude speedup compared to conventional iterative solvers. These results highlight the potential of LLM-guided symbolic search to revolutionize not only radar resource management but also broader classes of engineering optimization problems.

analysis.tldr: 用LLM引导的进化搜索自动发现雷达多目标跟踪的闭式功率分配方案，性能接近最优且速度提升三个数量级。
analysis.research_motivation: 雷达资源分配需要实时调度、鲁棒泛化和低数据依赖，但传统迭代优化复杂度高，难以满足实时需求。

papers.title: Khala: Scaling Acoustic Token Language Models Toward High-Fidelity Music Generation
papers.abstract: A common design pattern in high-quality music generation is to handle structure and fidelity in different representation spaces: a generator first models high-level structure, followed by diffusion-based or neural decoding stages that reconstruct fine details. In this work, we explore an alternative view: both may be progressively modeled within a single deep acoustic-token hierarchy. To study this, we build a 64-layer residual vector quantization (RVQ) acoustic representation and propose a two-stage coarse-to-fine generation framework. A backbone model first generates coarse acoustic tokens for the full track, and a super-resolution model then completes finer tokens within the same acoustic token space. The super-resolution stage works at full-track scale and refines tokens layer by layer while running in parallel over time, leading to a fixed 62-step inference process. To jointly improve lyric alignment and fine-detail reconstruction, we further introduce hybrid-attention training: the alignment objective uses causal attention, while layer-wise refinement uses full attention. A key finding is that text--vocal alignment can emerge within pure acoustic-token language modeling, without requiring a separate semantic token stage. Moreover, initializing the super-resolution model from the trained backbone significantly improves convergence and final quality. Taken together, our results suggest that high-quality music generation can be effectively pursued without separating structure and fidelity into heterogeneous representation spaces. Instead, both can be progressively modeled within a unified acoustic-token hierarchy, pointing toward a simpler and more unified path to high-quality music generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出Khala，在单一声学标记层次中通过粗到细生成实现高保真音乐生成，无需分离结构和保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有高质量音乐生成通常将结构和保真度分离到不同表示空间（如先建模结构再扩散重建），流程复杂。探索是否能在单一声学标记层次中渐进建模两者，以简化流程。
analysis.problem: 如何在单一深度声学标记层次中同时建模音乐的高层结构和细粒度保真度，实现高质量音乐生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本-人声对齐可以在纯声学标记语言模型中涌现，无需单独的语义标记阶段；从训练好的骨干模型初始化超分辨率模型能显著提升收敛速度和最终质量。
analysis.method: 构建64层残差向量量化（RVQ）声学表示，提出两阶段粗到细生成框架：骨干模型生成全曲的粗声学标记，超分辨率模型在同一声学标记空间中逐层细化标记（并行时间步，固定62步推理）。引入混合注意力训练：对齐目标使用因果注意力，逐层细化使用全注意力。

发现文本-人声对齐可在纯声学标记语言模型中涌现，无需语义标记阶段。
验证了从骨干模型初始化超分辨率模型能显著改善收敛和最终质量。

papers.title: DataEvolver: Let Your Data Build and Improve Itself via Goal-Driven Loop Agents
papers.abstract: Constructing controllable visual data is a major bottleneck for image editing and multimodal understanding. Useful supervision is rarely produced by a single rendering pass; instead it emerges through iterative generation, inspection, correction, filtering, and export. We present DataEvolver, a closed-loop visual data engine that organizes this process around explicit goals, persistent artifacts, bounded corrective actions, and acceptance decisions. DataEvolver supports multiple artifact types, including RGB images, masks, depth maps, normal maps, meshes, poses, trajectories, and review traces. In the current release, the system operates through two coupled loops: generation-time self-correction within each sample and validation-time self-expansion across dataset rounds. We validate the framework on an image-level object-rotation setting. With a fixed Qwen-Edit LoRA probe, our final Ours+DualGate model outperforms both the unadapted base model and a public multi-angle LoRA on SpatialEdit and a held-out evaluation set. Ablations show a consistent improvement path from scene-aware generation to feedback-driven correction and dual-gated validation. Beyond the released rotation data, our main contribution is a reusable framework for building visual datasets through explicit goal tracking, review, correction, and acceptance loops.

analysis.tldr: 提出DataEvolver闭环视觉数据引擎，通过目标驱动的循环智能体让数据自我构建和改进，在图像旋转编辑任务上验证了有效性。

papers.title: Runtime Evaluation of Procedural Content Generation in an Endless Runner Game Using Autonomous Agents
papers.abstract: Procedural Content Generation (PCG) enables game content to be created algorithmically without direct manual level-design effort, but it introduces a serious evaluation problem: generated content may become unbalanced, blocked, repetitive, or technically unsolvable. This paper presents Momentum, an endless-runner game that integrates runtime terrain generation, environment object spawning, and autonomous agent-based evaluation into a single gameplay loop. Ground tiles and environmental objects are generated dynamically as the player advances, object placement follows a constraint-driven mechanism inspired by Wave Function Collapse (WFC), and the runtime navigation surface is rebuilt asynchronously to remain consistent with the streamed environment. Two autonomous evaluation agents move ahead of the player and inspect the generated path: an aerial scanner that examines the corridor geometrically, and a ground-traversal agent that validates the same region from a navigational perspective. The evaluation pipeline combines ray casting, volumetric physics sweeps, obstacle-layer filtering, and structured crash reporting to identify problematic generated scenarios before they reach the player. The work demonstrates how generation and validation can be unified within the same runtime loop, rather than treating evaluation as a separate offline pass. Around this implementation, the paper formulates a measurable evaluation framework along the canonical PCG axes of playability, diversity, controllability, and runtime performance, derives a structural saturation bound on the spawner from its own placement constraints, and quantifies the per-segment scanning cost of the agents from first principles.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在无尽跑酷游戏中集成运行时程序化内容生成与自主智能体评估的统一框架。
