papers.title: Probe-Geometry Alignment: Erasing the Cross-Sequence Memorization Signature Below Chance
papers.abstract: Recent attacks show that behavioural unlearning of large language models leaves internal traces recoverable by adversarial probes. We characterise where this retention lives and show it can be surgically removed without measurable capability cost. Our central protocol is a leave-one-out cross-sequence probe that tests whether a memorisation signature generalises across held-out sequences. The signature is real and consistent across scale: memorisation-specific gaps of +0.32, +0.19, +0.30 on Pythia-70M, GPT-2 medium, and Mistral-7B; on Pythia-70M, the random-initialisation control collapses to -0.04 at the deepest layer where the pretrained signature peaks. The probe direction is causally separable from recall -- projecting it out collapses the signature locally (+0.44 -> -0.19) while behavioural recall barely changes -- and a probe trained on naturally memorised content does not classify fine-tuning-injected secrets, marking two representationally distinct regimes. We then introduce probe-geometry alignment (PGA), a surgical erasure that aligns activations along the probe's live readout direction at each depth. PGA drives the cross-sequence probe below random chance at all four scales tested (toy depth-4: 0.17; Pythia-70M: 0.07; Mistral-7B: 0.45; GPT-2 medium: 0.06 via MD-PGA k=2) and remains robust to six adversarial probe variants. Against a re-fitting attacker who trains a fresh probe on PGA-treated activations, we extend PGA adversarially, defeating the re-fit probe at every memorisation-relevant depth while preserving five zero-shot capability benchmarks within 2.8 percentage points per task (mean Δacc = +0.2pp). The cross-sequence signature is a real, causally separable, regime-specific property of pretrained representations -- removable below chance with a single rank-one intervention per depth at no measurable capability cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出探针-几何对齐（PGA）方法，通过单秩干预将大语言模型中的跨序列记忆签名擦除至随机水平以下，且不损害模型能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型的行为遗忘（unlearning）会留下内部痕迹，可被对抗性探针恢复，威胁隐私安全。现有方法无法在不牺牲能力的前提下彻底消除这些记忆痕迹。
analysis.problem: 如何在不影响模型能力的情况下，从LLM表征中精确移除跨序列记忆的签名（memorisation signature）？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 记忆签名是真实且跨尺度一致的：在Pythia-70M、GPT-2 medium和Mistral-7B上，记忆特定间隙分别为+0.32、+0.19、+0.30；随机初始化控制组在深层降至-0.04。探针方向与回忆（recall）因果可分离：投影去除后签名局部坍塌（+0.44→-0.19），但行为回忆几乎不变。自然记忆与微调注入的秘密在表征上属于两个不同机制。
analysis.method: 提出探针-几何对齐（PGA），在每一层沿探针的实时读出方向对齐激活值，进行手术式擦除；并扩展为对抗性PGA以抵御重新拟合攻击。
contributions: 首次系统刻画了LLM中跨序列记忆签名的存在性、尺度一致性和因果可分离性。
提出PGA方法，通过单秩干预将记忆签名擦除至随机水平以下，且不损害模型能力。
在四种规模模型上验证了PGA的有效性，并展示了对抗性PGA对重新拟合攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在Pythia-70M、GPT-2 medium、Mistral-7B和玩具深度4模型上测试，PGA将跨序列探针驱动至随机水平以下（如Pythia-70M: 0.07，GPT-2 medium: 0.06）；对抗性PGA在保留五个零样本能力基准（平均Δacc = +0.2pp）的同时，在所有记忆相关深度击败重新拟合探针。
limitations: 方法依赖于预训练探针，可能无法泛化到未知的记忆类型。
实验仅在有限规模模型上进行，更大模型（如70B）上的效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对LLM隐私安全有重要价值，但摘要未提及更大规模验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出探针-几何对齐（PGA）方法，通过单秩干预将大语言模型中的跨序列记忆签名擦除至随机水平以下，且不损害模型能力。

papers.title: BIM Information Extraction Through LLM-based Adaptive Exploration
papers.abstract: BIM models provide structured representations of building geometry, semantics, and topology, yet extracting specific information from them remains remarkably difficult. Current approaches translate natural language into structured queries by assuming a fixed data organization (static approach), which BIM heterogeneity eventually invalidates. We address this with a new paradigm, adaptive exploration, where an LLM-based agent iteratively executes code to extract information from a BIM model, discovering its structure at runtime instead of assuming it. We evaluate this approach on ifc-bench v2, an open-source BIM question-answering benchmark introduced alongside this work, comprising 1,027 tasks across 37 IFC models from 21 projects. A factorial ablation across two LLM capability levels and four augmentation strategies shows that adaptive exploration significantly outperforms static query generation across all configurations, regardless of the augmentation strategy. These results indicate that BIM heterogeneity is best addressed at the paradigm level, not by further optimizing static approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于LLM的自适应探索范式，通过运行时代码执行动态发现BIM结构，显著优于静态查询生成。
analysis.research_motivation: BIM模型异构性强，现有静态查询方法因假设固定数据组织而失效，亟需能适应动态结构的提取方法。

papers.title: Latent State Design for World Models under Sufficiency Constraints
papers.abstract: A world model matters to an agent only through the state it constructs. That state must preserve some information, discard other information, and support some future function: prediction, control, planning, memory, grounding, or counterfactual reasoning. This paper treats world-model research as latent state design under sufficiency constraints. We propose a functional taxonomy that groups methods by what their latent state is for, rather than by architecture or application domain: predictive embedding, recurrent belief state, object/causal structure, latent action interface, grounded planning interface, and memory substrate. These roles expose distinctions that architecture-based groupings hide, including the gap between predictive sufficiency and control sufficiency, and the gap between passive video prediction and counterfactual action modeling. The taxonomy supports an evaluation framework that judges a model by the sufficiency constraint its latent state was built to satisfy. We compare methods along seven axes: representation, prediction, planning, controllability, causal/counterfactual support, memory, and uncertainty. We use the resulting matrix as a diagnostic for what a latent state preserves, discards, and enables. The conclusion that follows is that an actionable world model is the one whose state construction matches the task, not the one that preserves the most information.

analysis.tldr: 将世界模型研究重新定义为在充分性约束下的潜在状态设计，提出功能分类法并构建评估框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界模型研究常按架构或应用领域分类，忽略了潜在状态设计背后的功能角色差异，导致模型评估与任务需求脱节。
analysis.problem: 如何根据任务所需的充分性约束来系统设计世界模型的潜在状态，并建立相应的评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出预测充分性与控制充分性之间存在差距，被动视频预测与反事实动作建模之间也存在差距，这些是架构分类法所掩盖的关键现象。
analysis.method: 提出功能分类法，将潜在状态按角色分为预测嵌入、循环信念状态、对象/因果结构、潜在动作接口、接地规划接口和记忆基质六类；并构建七轴评估矩阵（表示、预测、规划、可控性、因果/反事实支持、记忆、不确定性）。
contributions: 提出基于功能角色的潜在状态分类法，揭示架构分类法隐藏的充分性差距。
构建基于充分性约束的评估框架，通过七轴矩阵诊断潜在状态保留、丢弃和启用的信息。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分类法可能无法覆盖所有新兴的潜在状态设计。
评估框架的实用性需在更多实际任务中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 论文提出新颖的功能分类法和评估框架，但摘要未提供实验验证，适合精读以了解其方法论。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将世界模型研究重新定义为在充分性约束下的潜在状态设计，提出功能分类法并构建评估框架。

papers.title: GRAVITY: Architecture-Agnostic Structured Anchoring for Long-Horizon Conversational Memory
papers.abstract: Long-horizon conversational agents rely on memory systems with increasingly sophisticated retrieval mechanisms. However, retrieved fragments are typically fed to the language model as unstructured text, lacking the relational, temporal, and thematic structures essential for complex reasoning. To bridge this reasoning gap, we introduce GRAVITY (\textbf{G}eneration-time \textbf{R}elational \textbf{A}nchoring \textbf{V}ia \textbf{I}njected \textbf{T}opological Memor\textbf{Y}), a plug-and-play structured memory module. GRAVITY extracts three complementary knowledge representations from raw conversational utterances: entity profiles grounded in relational graphs, temporal event tuples linked into causal traces, and cross-session topic summaries. At generation time, it injects these representations into the host system's prompt as structured anchoring contexts. This approach effectively synthesizes scattered evidence into a coherent, query-relevant context without requiring any architectural modifications to the host model. Extensive evaluations across five diverse memory systems on the LongMemEval and LoCoMo benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of our approach. On average, GRAVITY improves LLM-judge accuracy by 7.5--10.1%. Gains are inversely correlated with baseline strength: the weakest host improves by 12.2% while the strongest still gains 3.8--5.7%. These findings establish structured context anchoring as a broadly effective, architecture-agnostic augmentation paradigm for long-horizon conversational memory.

analysis.tldr: GRAVITY 是一种即插即用的结构化记忆模块，通过注入实体、事件和主题三种知识表示，在不修改模型架构的情况下提升长对话记忆的推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长对话记忆系统检索到的片段通常以非结构化文本形式输入语言模型，缺乏关系、时间和主题结构，难以支持复杂推理。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改宿主模型架构的前提下，为长对话记忆系统提供结构化上下文以增强推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GRAVITY 从对话中提取三种知识表示：基于关系图的实体档案、因果事件元组和跨会话主题摘要，并在生成时作为结构化锚定上下文注入提示中。
contributions: 提出一种即插即用的结构化记忆模块 GRAVITY，无需修改宿主模型架构。
在 LongMemEval 和 LoCoMo 基准上，GRAVITY 平均提升 LLM 评判准确率 7.5-10.1%，且增益与基线强度负相关。
analysis.experiments: 在 LongMemEval 和 LoCoMo 基准上对五种不同记忆系统进行评估，GRAVITY 平均提升 LLM 评判准确率 7.5-10.1%，最弱宿主提升 12.2%，最强宿主提升 3.8-5.7%。
limitations: 可能依赖外部知识提取模块的质量。
未讨论对超长对话或实时性要求高的场景的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与长对话 Agent 方向相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GRAVITY 是一种即插即用的结构化记忆模块，通过注入实体、事件和主题三种知识表示，在不修改模型架构的情况下提升长对话记忆的推理能力。

papers.title: Class-Aware Adaptive Differential Privacy in Deep Learning for Sensor-Based Fall Detection
papers.abstract: Fall detection is a critical task in healthcare, particularly for elderly people. Timely fall detection and treatment can prevent severe injuries. Sensor-based activity data can be used to detect fall. However, this data are highly sensitive and raises significant privacy concerns. Existing privacy approaches apply uniform noise across all training samples, which affects the prediction performance. To address this limitation, we propose a Class-Aware Adaptive Differential Privacy (CA-ADP) framework integrated with a hybrid 3D Convolutional Neural Network and Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (3D CNN-BiLSTM) architecture. The CA-ADP mechanism dynamically adjusts the magnitude of noise added to gradients based on the class composition of each mini-batch. This process ensures privacy while mitigates performance degradation. We formally analyze the $(ε,δ)$-Differential Privacy guarantee and provide a privacy-utility trade-off analysis. The proposed method is evaluated on three public benchmark datasets, namely SisFall, UP-Fall, and MobiAct. The experimental results show that the proposed privacy model achieves improvements of 3.3\%, 8.5\%, and 7.5\% over the conventional privacy-based model in terms of F-score for the SisFall, UP-Fall, and MobiAct datasets, respectively. Comparisons with prior studies show that the CA-AD based framework achieves competitive performance and provides formal privacy guarantees, which are largely overlooked in existing studies. Wilcoxon signed-rank tests confirm that the proposed mechanism consistently outperforms conventional differential privacy. Those results establish the proposed CA-ADP framework as an effective approach to privacy-preserving fall detection in real-world healthcare settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出类别感知自适应差分隐私框架，在传感器跌倒检测中平衡隐私与性能，F-score提升3.3%-8.5%。
analysis.research_motivation: 跌倒检测对老年人健康至关重要，但传感器数据高度敏感，现有隐私方法对所有样本添加统一噪声，导致预测性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护传感器跌倒检测数据隐私的同时，减少性能损失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 统一噪声添加会过度扰动某些类别，导致模型性能下降；不同类别对噪声的敏感度不同。
analysis.method: 提出类别感知自适应差分隐私（CA-ADP）框架，根据每个小批量的类别组成动态调整梯度噪声幅度，并集成3D CNN-BiLSTM架构。
contributions: 提出CA-ADP机制，动态调整噪声幅度以平衡隐私与效用
在三个公开数据集上验证，F-score提升3.3%-8.5%，并优于传统差分隐私
analysis.experiments: 在SisFall、UP-Fall和MobiAct三个数据集上评估，与常规隐私模型相比F-score分别提升3.3%、8.5%和7.5%，并通过Wilcoxon检验确认显著性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于传感器跌倒检测任务，泛化性未验证

papers.title: Missingness-aware Data Imputation via AI-powered Bayesian Generative Modeling
papers.abstract: Missing data imputation remains a fundamental challenge in modern data science, especially when uncertainty quantification is essential. In this work, we propose MissBGM, an AI-powered missing data imputation method via Bayesian generative modeling that bridges the expressive flexibility of neural networks with the statistical rigor of Bayesian inference. Unlike existing methods that often focus on point estimates or treat the missingness mechanism implicitly, MissBGM explicitly and jointly models the data-generating and missingness mechanisms, providing principled posterior uncertainty over imputations rather than a single point estimate. We develop a stochastic optimization framework with alternating updates among missing values, model parameters, and latent variables until convergence. Our theoretical analysis shows that estimates of missing values from MissBGM converge consistently under mild assumptions. Empirically, we demonstrate that MissBGM achieves superior performance over traditional imputers and recent neural network-based methods across extensive experimental settings. These results establish MissBGM as a principled and scalable solution for modern missing data imputation. The code for MissBGM is open sourced at https://github.com/liuq-lab/MissBGM.

analysis.tldr: 提出 MissBGM，一种基于贝叶斯生成建模的缺失数据插补方法，联合建模数据生成与缺失机制，提供插补的后验不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 缺失数据插补是数据科学中的基础挑战，现有方法多关注点估计或隐式处理缺失机制，缺乏对插补不确定性的量化。
analysis.problem: 如何同时建模数据生成和缺失机制，并提供插补的后验不确定性估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MissBGM，通过贝叶斯生成模型联合建模数据生成和缺失机制，采用随机优化框架交替更新缺失值、模型参数和潜变量直至收敛。
contributions: 提出 MissBGM，一种显式联合建模数据生成和缺失机制的贝叶斯生成插补方法。
提供插补的后验不确定性而非点估计，并给出理论收敛保证。
analysis.experiments: 在广泛实验设置中，MissBGM 优于传统插补器和近期基于神经网络的方法。摘要未提供具体数据集或指标。
limitations: 可能对高维数据计算开销较大。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 MissBGM，一种基于贝叶斯生成建模的缺失数据插补方法，联合建模数据生成与缺失机制，提供插补的后验不确定性。

papers.title: CP-SynC: Multi-Agent Zero-Shot Constraint Modeling in MiniZinc with Synthesized Checkers
papers.abstract: Constraint Programming (CP) is a powerful paradigm for solving combinatorial problems, yet translating natural language problem descriptions into executable models remains a significant bottleneck. While Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise in automating this translation, they often struggle with subtle semantic errors in the absence of oracle validation at test time. To address this, we introduce CP-SynC (Constraint Programming modeling with Synthesized Checkers), a multi-agent workflow for zero-shot constraint modeling in MiniZinc. CP-SynC coordinates modeling agents that generate and refine candidate models and validation agents that synthesize semantic checkers to provide feedback on semantic correctness. To mitigate noise inherent in individual LLM outputs, CP-SynC explores multiple modeling trajectories in parallel and employs selection agents to select the final model via multi-agent evidence aggregation. Extensive experiments on a benchmark of 100 CP problems show that CP-SynC substantially outperforms existing baselines in MiniZinc modeling.

analysis.tldr: CP-SynC 通过多智能体协作与合成检查器，在零样本下提升 MiniZinc 约束建模的语义正确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 将自然语言问题描述自动转化为可执行的约束模型是约束编程的瓶颈，现有 LLM 方法在缺乏验证时易产生语义错误。
analysis.problem: 零样本场景下，如何自动生成语义正确的 MiniZinc 约束模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM 生成的模型常包含细微语义错误，且缺乏测试时 oracle 验证。
analysis.method: 多智能体工作流：建模智能体生成并优化候选模型，验证智能体合成语义检查器提供反馈，选择智能体通过多智能体证据聚合选出最终模型。
contributions: 提出 CP-SynC，一种多智能体零样本约束建模方法，利用合成检查器验证语义正确性。
在 100 个 CP 问题基准上显著优于现有基线。

papers.title: IMPACT-Scribe: Interactive Temporal Action Segmentation with Boundary Scribbles and Query Planning
papers.abstract: Dense temporal annotation of procedural activity videos is vital for action understanding and embodied intelligence but remains labor-intensive due to reactive tools. Each correction is treated as an isolated edit, limiting reuse of information on annotator uncertainty and model reliability. We introduce IMPACT-Scribe, a correction-driven framework for dense labeling that uses each correction to improve future human-machine collaboration. IMPACT-Scribe combines uncertainty-aware boundary scribble supervision, local proposal modeling, cost-aware query planning, structured propagation, and correction-driven adaptation. Experiments and a human study show that this closed-loop design improves labeling quality per effort, enhances boundary accuracy, and fosters better human-machine interaction over time. The code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/BanzQians/IMPACT_AS.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个利用边界涂鸦和查询规划的交互式时序动作分割框架，通过闭环校正提升标注效率与质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 密集时序标注对动作理解至关重要，但现有工具反应式且每次校正孤立，无法复用标注者不确定性和模型可靠性信息，导致标注效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能利用每次校正来改进未来人机协作的密集标注框架，以提升标注效率与边界精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合不确定性感知的边界涂鸦监督、局部提议建模、成本感知查询规划、结构化传播和校正驱动自适应，形成闭环设计。
contributions: 提出IMPACT-Scribe框架，将每次校正用于改进后续人机协作。
通过实验和用户研究验证了闭环设计在标注质量、边界精度和人机交互方面的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在程序活动视频数据集上进行了实验和用户研究，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖边界涂鸦的初始质量。
查询规划策略在复杂场景下可能计算开销较大。

papers.title: Deep neural networks with Fisher vector encoding for medical image classification
papers.abstract: Orderless encoding methods have shown to improve Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for image classification in the context of limited availability of data. Additionally, hybrid CNN + Vision Transformers (ViT) models have been recently proposed to address CNN locality bias issues. These models outperformed CNN-only approaches. Despite that, the integration of such hybrid models with more elaborated feature representation can be highly beneficial and remains large unexplored in the literature. In this context, we propose the introduction of an orderless encoding method, Fisher Vectors, to hybrid CNN + ViT architectures, aiming at achieving a model suitable for both small and large datasets. Such enconding method relies on estimating a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) on image features. In large datasets, computational costs of the GMM estimation is a limiting factor for the application of Fisher Vectors. Thus, we propose a method to limit the growth of GMM estimation costs as we increase the size of the dataset. We explore the feasibility of our method in the context of medical image classification by appling it to MedMNIST (v2), Clean-CC-CCII and ISIC2018. This collection of datasets contains a wide variety of data scales and modalities. We outperform benchmark results in all MedMNIST (v2) datasets and obtain literature-competitive results in Clean-CC-CCII and ISIC2018.

analysis.tldr: 将Fisher向量编码引入CNN+ViT混合架构，提升医学图像分类性能，尤其在数据有限场景下。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CNN+ViT混合模型虽优于纯CNN，但未充分利用更精细的特征表示方法；无顺序编码方法（如Fisher向量）在数据有限时能提升CNN性能，但其与混合模型的结合及在大数据集上的计算成本问题尚未解决。
analysis.problem: 如何将Fisher向量编码有效集成到CNN+ViT混合架构中，并降低其在大数据集上的高斯混合模型估计计算成本，以实现对小数据集和大数据集的通用医学图像分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出将Fisher向量编码引入CNN+ViT混合架构，并设计一种方法限制高斯混合模型估计成本随数据集规模增长的速度。
contributions: 首次将Fisher向量编码与CNN+ViT混合架构结合用于医学图像分类。
提出一种降低高斯混合模型估计计算成本的方法，使Fisher向量适用于大规模数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在MedMNIST (v2)、Clean-CC-CCII和ISIC2018数据集上评估，在MedMNIST (v2)上超越基准结果，在Clean-CC-CCII和ISIC2018上取得与文献竞争的结果。
limitations: 可能仅在医学图像领域验证，通用性待进一步检验。
计算成本降低方法的具体效果和适用范围未详细说明。

papers.title: IMPACT-HOI: Supervisory Control for Onset-Anchored Partial HOI Event Construction
papers.abstract: We present IMPACT-HOI, a mixed-initiative framework for annotating egocentric procedural video by constructing structured event graphs for Human-Object Interactions (HOI), motivated by the need for high-quality structured supervision for learning robot manipulation from human demonstration. IMPACT-HOI frames this task as the incremental resolution of a partially specified, onset-anchored event state. A trust-calibrated controller selects among direct queries, human-confirmed suggestions, and conservative completions based on empirical annotator behavior and evidence quality. A risk-bounded execution protocol, utilizing atomic rollback, ensures that human-confirmed decisions are preserved against conflicting automated updates. A user study with 9 participants shows a 13.5% reduction in manual annotation actions, a 46.67% event match rate, and zero confirmed-field violations under the studied protocol. The code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/541741106/IMPACT_HOI.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合主动框架IMPACT-HOI，通过信任校准控制器和原子回滚机制，高效构建以起始锚定的部分HOI事件图，用于机器人操作学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 从人类演示中学习机器人操作需要高质量的结构化监督，但现有HOI事件标注方法效率低、易出错，难以满足需求。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、可靠地构建以起始锚定的部分HOI事件图，同时减少人工标注负担并保证标注质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出IMPACT-HOI混合主动框架，将任务建模为部分指定、起始锚定事件状态的增量求解；使用信任校准控制器根据标注者行为和证据质量选择直接查询、人工确认建议或保守补全；采用原子回滚的风险受限执行协议，确保人工确认的决策不受冲突的自动更新影响。
contributions: 提出IMPACT-HOI框架，实现混合主动的HOI事件图构建。
设计信任校准控制器和原子回滚协议，平衡自动化与人工控制。
用户实验表明该方法减少13.5%手动标注动作，事件匹配率达46.67%，零确认字段违规。
analysis.experiments: 9名参与者的用户研究，结果显示手动标注动作减少13.5%，事件匹配率46.67%，确认字段违规为零。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合主动框架IMPACT-HOI，通过信任校准控制器和原子回滚机制，高效构建以起始锚定的部分HOI事件图，用于机器人操作学习。

papers.title: Video Active Perception: Effective Inference-Time Long-Form Video Understanding with Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models (VLMs) have advanced multimodal tasks such as video question answering (QA). However, VLMs face the challenge of selecting frames effectively and efficiently, as standard uniform sampling is expensive and performance may plateau. Inspired by active perception theory, which posits that models gain information by acquiring data that differs from their expectations, we introduce Video Active Perception (VAP), a training-free method to enhance long-form video QA using VLMs. Our approach treats keyframe selection as data acquisition in active perception and leverages a lightweight text-conditioned video generation model to represent prior world knowledge. Empirically, VAP achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot results on long-form or reasoning video QA datasets such as EgoSchema, NExT-QA, ActivityNet-QA, IntentQA, and CLEVRER, achieving an increase of up to 5.6 x frame efficiency by frames per question over standard GPT-4o, Gemini 1.5 Pro, and LLaVA-OV. Moreover, VAP shows stronger reasoning abilities than previous methods and effectively selects keyframes relevant to questions. These findings highlight the potential of leveraging active perception to improve the frame effectiveness and efficiency of long-form video QA.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的视频主动感知方法，利用轻量级视频生成模型选择关键帧，显著提升长视频问答效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM处理长视频时均匀采样帧效率低且性能易饱和，亟需高效的关键帧选择方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不额外训练的情况下，高效选择与问题相关的关键帧以提升长视频问答的准确性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Video Active Perception (VAP)，将关键帧选择视为主动感知中的数据获取，利用轻量级文本条件视频生成模型表示先验世界知识，无需训练即可选择关键帧。
contributions: 提出训练自由的VAP方法，结合主动感知理论和视频生成模型实现高效关键帧选择。
在多个长视频QA数据集上达到零样本SOTA，帧效率提升高达5.6倍。
analysis.experiments: 在EgoSchema、NExT-QA、ActivityNet-QA、IntentQA和CLEVRER数据集上评估，VAP在零样本设置下取得SOTA结果，帧效率较GPT-4o、Gemini 1.5 Pro和LLaVA-OV提升高达5.6倍。
limitations: 依赖轻量级视频生成模型的质量，可能影响复杂场景下的关键帧选择。
方法在极长视频或实时场景中的效率有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与VLM和视频理解方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的视频主动感知方法，利用轻量级视频生成模型选择关键帧，显著提升长视频问答效率与性能。

papers.title: TRIMMER: A New Paradigm for Video Summarization through Self-Supervised Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: The rapid growth of video content across domains such as surveillance, education, and social media has made efficient content understanding increasingly critical. Video summarization addresses this challenge by generating concise yet semantically meaningful representations, but existing approaches often rely on expensive manual annotations, struggle to generalize across domains, and incur significant computational costs due to complex architectures. Moreover, unsupervised and weakly supervised methods typically underperform compared to supervised counterparts in capturing long-range temporal dependencies and semantic structure. In this work, we propose TRIMMER (Temporal Relative Information Maximization for Multi-objective Efficient Reinforcement), a novel self-supervised reinforcement learning framework for video summarization. TRIMMER operates in two stages: it first learns robust representations via self-supervised learning and then performs spatio-temporal decision making through reinforcement learning guided by information-theoretic reward functions. Unlike prior approaches that rely on similarity-based objectives, our method introduces entropy-based metrics to capture higher-order temporal dynamics and semantic diversity, while computing rewards directly over selected frame indices to improve computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that TRIMMER achieves state-of-the-art performance among unsupervised and self-supervised methods, while remaining competitive with leading supervised approaches, highlighting its effectiveness for scalable and generalizable video summarization.

analysis.tldr: TRIMMER提出自监督强化学习框架，通过信息论奖励函数实现高效视频摘要，性能达到无监督SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频内容快速增长使得高效内容理解至关重要，现有视频摘要方法依赖昂贵人工标注、跨域泛化差且计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖人工标注的情况下，生成高质量、可泛化的视频摘要，并高效捕获长程时序依赖和语义结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无监督和弱监督方法在捕获长程时序依赖和语义结构方面通常不如监督方法。
analysis.method: 两阶段自监督强化学习框架：先通过自监督学习获得鲁棒表征，再通过信息论奖励函数引导的强化学习进行时空决策。
contributions: 提出TRIMMER，首个结合自监督学习和信息论奖励的强化学习视频摘要框架。
引入熵度量捕获高阶时序动态和语义多样性，并直接在选定帧索引上计算奖励以提高效率。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上，TRIMMER在无监督和自监督方法中达到SOTA，并与领先监督方法竞争。
limitations: 摘要未提及在极长视频或实时场景下的性能。
可能对视频内容类型敏感，需进一步验证跨域泛化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，结合自监督和强化学习，实验表现好，但应用领域较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRIMMER提出自监督强化学习框架，通过信息论奖励函数实现高效视频摘要，性能达到无监督SOTA。

papers.title: Act2See: Emergent Active Visual Perception for Video Reasoning
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) typically rely on static initial frames for video reasoning, restricting their ability to incorporate essential dynamic information as the reasoning process evolves. Existing methods that augment Chain-of-Thought (CoT) with additional frame information often exhibit suboptimal CoT quality and lack the crucial ability to synthesize visual information for hypothetical or counterfactual scenarios. We introduce Act-to-See (Act2See), a novel framework that enables active visual perception by empowering VLMs to actively interleave video frames within text CoTs. Act2See is developed via Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) on a high-quality dataset of reasoning traces generated by a frontier VLM. These traces integrate active calls to either retrieve existing frames or generate new ones, and are rigorously verified against human-annotated CoTs to ensure quality. This approach cultivates an emergent capability: at inference time, the model actively determines when to search for or synthesize the necessary visual evidence. Act2See establishes new state-of-the-art results on challenging benchmarks, including VideoEspresso and ViTIB, and outperforms comparable or larger models on Video-MME, EgoNormia, and VCR-Bench, demonstrating an advancement in enabling VLMs with active visual perception for video reasoning.

analysis.tldr: Act2See通过让VLM在推理时主动插入视频帧，实现了主动视觉感知，在多个视频推理基准上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM依赖静态初始帧进行视频推理，无法随推理过程动态获取关键视觉信息，且现有CoT增强方法缺乏合成假设或反事实场景视觉信息的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM在视频推理中主动获取或合成所需的视觉证据，以提升推理质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过监督微调（SFT）在高质量推理轨迹数据集上训练，该数据集由前沿VLM生成，包含主动调用检索或生成帧的动作，并经人工标注CoT验证质量。
contributions: 提出Act2See框架，使VLM能在文本CoT中主动穿插视频帧，实现主动视觉感知。
构建高质量推理轨迹数据集，通过SFT训练模型，在多个视频推理基准上取得SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在VideoEspresso、ViTIB、Video-MME、EgoNormia、VCR-Bench等基准上评估，Act2See取得SOTA或优于可比/更大模型。
limitations: 依赖前沿VLM生成训练数据，可能引入偏差。
主动帧生成的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，在视频推理任务上取得显著提升，与VLM方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Act2See通过让VLM在推理时主动插入视频帧，实现了主动视觉感知，在多个视频推理基准上取得SOTA。

papers.title: From Cortical Synchronous Rhythm to Brain Inspired Learning Mechanism: An Oscillatory Spiking Neural Network with Time-Delayed Coordination
papers.abstract: Human cognition emerges from coordinated spiking dynamics in distributed neural circuits, where information is encoded via both firing rates and precise spike timing determined by brain rhythms. Inspired by this notion, we propose a brain-inspired learning primitive in which cognition-level neural synchrony emerges through iterative bottom-up and top-down interactions between micro-scale dynamics of spiking neurons and a macro-scale mechanism of oscillatory synchronization. Specifically, we model each parcel (e.g., a cortical region or an image pixel) in the target system as a spiking neuron embedded in a predefined connectivity scaffold. Low-level information is encoded in a spatiotemporal domain, where neurons are selectively grouped and fire spontaneously over time through self-organized dynamics. In the bottom-up route, oscillatory synchronization is formed from past spiking activity accumulated over a finite memory window. Since brain dynamics operate in a regime of partial and transient synchronization rather than global phase locking, we model oscillatory coordination using a time-delayed synchronization formulation, which enables a top-down modulation of heterogeneous neural spiking for a large-scale distributed system. Together, we devise a spiking-by-synchronization neural network (S2-Net) that uses rhythmic timing as a control mechanism for efficient information processing. Promising results have been achieved across a broad range of tasks, including neural activity decoding, energy-efficient signal processing, temporal binding and semantic reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于振荡同步的脉冲神经网络S2-Net，通过时滞协调实现类脑信息处理。
analysis.research_motivation: 人脑认知依赖于分布式神经回路中协调的脉冲动力学，现有脉冲神经网络缺乏对脑节律和同步机制的模拟，难以实现高效的信息处理。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种学习机制，使脉冲神经网络能够通过自组织振荡同步实现认知水平的神经协调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出S2-Net，将目标系统每个单元建模为脉冲神经元，通过自下而上的振荡同步（基于有限记忆窗口的脉冲累积）和自上而下的时滞同步调制，实现大规模分布式系统的异质脉冲协调。
contributions: 提出一种脑启发学习原语，将认知级神经同步建模为微观脉冲动力学与宏观振荡同步机制的迭代交互。
设计时滞同步公式实现部分、瞬态同步，避免全局锁相，适用于大规模分布式系统。
在神经活动解码、节能信号处理、时间绑定和语义推理等任务上取得有希望的结果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏与现有脉冲神经网络方法的全面对比。
时滞同步机制的计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合脑节律与脉冲神经网络，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于振荡同步的脉冲神经网络S2-Net，通过时滞协调实现类脑信息处理。

papers.title: SteeringDiffusion: A Bottlenecked Activation Control Interface for Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: We introduce SteeringDiffusion, a bottlenecked activation-level control interface for diffusion models that exposes a smooth, monotonic, and runtime-adjustable control surface over the content--style trade-off. Our method keeps the U-Net backbone frozen and learns a small, prompt-conditioned latent code projected to FiLM/AdaGN-style modulation parameters. A zero-initialized design guarantees exact equivalence to the base model at zero scale, while timestep-aware gating restricts modulation to later denoising stages. A single scalar at inference continuously traverses the control surface without retraining. Across experiments on Stable Diffusion~1.5 and SDXL covering multiple artistic styles, we show that SteeringDiffusion produces smooth and monotonic content--style trade-offs. Under matched parameter budgets, it outperforms LoRA in controllability and stability, while ControlNet and rank-1 adapters do not expose a comparable control surface. We further introduce an inversion-stability diagnostic based on DDIM inversion, used as a post-hoc trajectory probe, which reveals strong correlations with intervention magnitude. These results position \emph{Steering Bottlenecked Explicit Control (S-BEC)} as a practical, general-purpose control interface for frozen diffusion backbones.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种瓶颈激活控制接口，通过冻结U-Net并学习轻量提示条件潜码，实现扩散模型内容-风格权衡的平滑单调运行时控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型控制方法（如LoRA、ControlNet）在内容-风格权衡上缺乏平滑、单调且运行时可调的连续控制表面，限制了生成灵活性和用户交互体验。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的前提下，为冻结的扩散模型骨干提供一种可连续、单调调节内容-风格权衡的激活级控制接口。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出LoRA在可控性和稳定性上不如本方法，ControlNet和rank-1适配器无法暴露类似的控制表面。
analysis.method: 冻结U-Net骨干，学习一个小的、提示条件的潜码，投影为FiLM/AdaGN风格的调制参数；采用零初始化设计保证零尺度时与基础模型等价，时间步感知门控限制调制仅作用于后期去噪阶段；推理时单个标量连续遍历控制表面。
contributions: 提出SteeringDiffusion，一种瓶颈激活级控制接口，实现平滑单调的内容-风格权衡。
引入基于DDIM反转的反演稳定性诊断作为事后轨迹探针，揭示与干预幅度的强相关性。
在Stable Diffusion 1.5和SDXL上实验，证明在相同参数预算下优于LoRA的可控性和稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在Stable Diffusion 1.5和SDXL上覆盖多种艺术风格，与LoRA、ControlNet和rank-1适配器对比，显示本方法产生平滑单调的内容-风格权衡，且在可控性和稳定性上优于LoRA。
limitations: 仅针对内容-风格权衡，可能不适用于其他类型的控制（如空间布局）。
需要为每个提示学习潜码，可能增加少量计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，对扩散模型可控生成有实用价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种瓶颈激活控制接口，通过冻结U-Net并学习轻量提示条件潜码，实现扩散模型内容-风格权衡的平滑单调运行时控制。
